Some Republicans (RINOs, we call them) sadly cave to the radical Left Democrats at every turn.
It’s these very same RINOs who refuse to lift a finger when the Left not only weaponizes the FBI against our campaign, but also against _YOU_ – hardworking, freedom-loving patriots.
Their excuse? They’re afraid of a little Deep State _“drama.”_
But it isn’t _“drama.”_ **It’s tyranny. It’s a declaration of war on _everything_ we value as Americans.**
And that’s what has always separated our MAGA movement from the RINOs – _**we will NEVER SURRENDER our country to tyranny!**_
Now more than ever, when the stakes have never been higher, we need courage – _not cowardice_ – to WIN BACK the White House and save our country.
**And that’s exactly why we’re LEADING in the GOP primary by 50 POINTS.**
Now is the time to solidify our lead so that we can turn 100% of our focus to CRUSHING Crooked Joe Biden and DISMANTLING the Deep State once and for all.

Friend,
Every Republican elected official should be UNITED in outrage at what the Deep State has done to me and the America First movement.
**But sadly, some Republicans want to shy away from the topic, because they say they get tired of all the Deep State “drama.”**
Friend, the weaponization of the FBI is one of the single biggest threats to our free Republic.
My home has been raided. I was framed as a Russian asset. My family and associates have been intimidated. My private communications have been spied on. I’ve even been indicted and arrested – despite committing NO CRIME.
And it’s not _just_ me... Everyday, hardworking, freedom-loving patriots are also being targeted for holding views that go against the Deep State.
**That’s not _“drama.”_ That’s a declaration of war on everything we value as Americans.**
_If these politicians get fatigued from a bit of “drama,” then the Deep State will eat them alive. They will not rise to the challenge to defend our Republic, and most importantly, defend YOU._
But even though the Deep State has put me through hell, I am ready to do it again! Because I love our country, and I will _NEVER_ let it get destroyed.
_It’s no surprise that we’re leading the primary by 50 POINTS. Voters know that during these dark times, we need courage – not cowardice – in the White House._
The time has now come to solidify our lead so that we can turn our focus 100% to beating Crooked Joe Biden and DISMANTLING the Deep State.
Let’s finish the job we started, dismantle the Deep State, and MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!

clean_body: We NEVER SURRENDER to tyranny! | | Friend, Some Republicans (RINOs, we call them) sadly cave to the radical Left Democrats at every turn. It’s these very same RINOs who refuse to lift a finger when the Left not only weaponizes the FBI against our campaign, but also against YOU – hardworking, freedom-loving patriots. Their excuse? They’re afraid of a little Deep State “drama.” But it isn’t “drama.” It’s tyranny. It’s a declaration of war on everything we value as Americans. And that’s what has always separated our MAGA movement from the RINOs – we will NEVER SURRENDER our country to tyranny! Now more than ever, when the stakes have never been higher, we need courage – not cowardice – to WIN BACK the White House and save our country. And that’s exactly why we’re LEADING in the GOP primary by 50 POINTS. Now is the time to solidify our lead so that we can turn 100% of our focus to CRUSHING Crooked Joe Biden and DISMANTLING the Deep State once and for all. Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Donald J. Trump Date: Wed, May 24, 2023 Subject: Sadly... To: <[dpwillis67@gmail.com]> | Friend, Every Republican elected official should be UNITED in outrage at what the Deep State has done to me and the America First movement. But sadly, some Republicans want to shy away from the topic, because they say they get tired of all the Deep State “drama.” Friend, the weaponization of the FBI is one of the single biggest threats to our free Republic. My home has been raided. I was framed as a Russian asset. My family and associates have been intimidated. My private communications have been spied on. I’ve even been indicted and arrested – despite committing NO CRIME. And it’s not just me... Everyday, hardworking, freedom-loving patriots are also being targeted for holding views that go against the Deep State. That’s not “drama.” That’s a declaration of war on everything we value as Americans. If these politicians get fatigued from a bit of “drama,” then the Deep State will eat them alive. They will not rise to the challenge to defend our Republic, and most importantly, defend YOU. But even though the Deep State has put me through hell, I am ready to do it again! Because I love our country, and I will NEVER let it get destroyed. It’s no surprise that we’re leading the primary by 50 POINTS. Voters know that during these dark times, we need courage – not cowardice – in the White House. The time has now come to solidify our lead so that we can turn our focus 100% to beating Crooked Joe Biden and DISMANTLING the Deep State. Let’s finish the job we started, dismantle the Deep State, and MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! Thank you, | Donald J. name: Brown, Sherrod
subject: Trump attacked me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| **Friend – Donald Trump attacked me on Truth Social, calling me "one of the worst in the Senate!"** It's never been more clear: The GOP is doing everything it can to replace me with a Trump yes-man and flip the Senate red.

To be clear, I'm not scared of their attacks. But I do know that where Trump goes GOP dark money follows – and if I'm being attacked this early in the race, we're in for a long, challenging, and expensive road ahead.

**That's why I'm urgently asking for your grassroots support so I can fight back, friend:** [Will you rush $10 or more today to help me stand up to the GOP's attacks and protect Ohio's critical seat?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/46139?t=6&akid=7960%2E878179%2EUiBXNU) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sherrod Brown and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/46140?t=7&akid=7960%2E878179%2EUiBXNU)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/46141?t=8&akid=7960%2E878179%2EUiBXNU)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/46142?t=9&akid=7960%2E878179%2EUiBXNU)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/46143?t=10&akid=7960%2E878179%2EUiBXNU)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/46139?t=11&akid=7960%2E878179%2EUiBXNU)
_CNN_ analysts and _FiveThirtyEight_ are calling me one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot, and _Politico_ analysts are reporting Ohio could decide Senate control. The truth is: I can't win this battleground race and defend Ohio from right-wing attacks without your grassroots support.

**So please, will you donate $10 or more right now to help me prove the pundits wrong, win in Ohio, and defend our Democratic Senate majority?**

Thanks for helping me fight back against the GOP attacks and protect this critical seat. It means so much to have you on my team.

– Sherrod
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=7960%2E878179%2EUiBXNU). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=7960%2E878179%2EUiBXNU).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=7960%2E878179%2EUiBXNU) to request fewer emails. name: AdamSchiff.com
subject: A coordinated broadside attack
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| What if we told you that in the past week, Adam has been the target of right-wing fury following the publication of Trump’s special counsel’s partisan report?
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=2329%2E5257348%2EkVOeW6)
Derek, is there _anything_ we can say to convince you to chip in to Adam’s Senate campaign today?
What if we told you that in the past week, Adam has been the target of right-wing fury following the publication of Trump’s special counsel’s partisan report?
Or that he’s been attacked by a whole host of right-wing media outlets? By _Fox News, Newsmax, The Washington Examiner,_ and who knows how many more?
What if we shared the news that Kevin McCarthy openly pondered whether Adam should be expelled from Congress?
Or that MAGA Republican Anna Paulina Luna of Florida **actually introduced a House Resolution** to expel him.
And that now, she’s introduced _yet another resolution_ — this time to **censure** and **fine** Adam for **_$16 MILLION, which could pass with a partisan majority vote._**
Republicans have removed him from the House Intelligence Committee. Threatened to expel him entirely. Now, MAGA Republicans are seeking to officially censure him and wipe him out financially.
**If that isn’t proof that Republicans are hellbent on stopping Adam’s election to the United States Senate, we don’t know what is. It is also more proof of what we know — Adam Schiff is an effective leader and they know it.**
No Democrat in Congress has faced more relentless and concerted attacks from the far-right than Adam, and _all as retribution for holding Trump accountable._ They are _terrified_ of what might happen with Adam in the Senate. They would not attack him otherwise.
**[Adam needs our support — today. Please, with less than one week until our monthly fundraising deadline, chip in $10 to support Adam’s campaign today:](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=may2023_abs_em.TpLEiB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC60_20230525_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=2329%2E5257348%2EkVOeW6)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=may2023_abs_em.zFhEHH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC60_20230525_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=2329%2E5257348%2EkVOeW6)

subject: Another head-turning WIN to add to the week
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
Largest package of tax cuts in history almost a reality! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f14a73a32645/n41kepo7ku-12605515?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=64e6a49826&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | Peter,
---
| With only two weeks left of this legislative session, we are pushing hard to secure as many WINS as possible for Nebraskans.

This week has been a **HISTORIC** week of **WINS**.

[LB 243](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=49ef138fff&e=25844e23a8) has passed final reading, and it will deliver property tax relief to Nebraskans once Governor Pillen signs it into law. Governor Pillen has previously stated that the measure would be part of the largest package of tax cuts in state history!

**We are extremely grateful to Senator Briese for introducing this legislation, and for every lawmaker’s efforts to advance this bill towards reality!**

Peter,

It's official: I'M IN.

**I'm running for President of the United States. **
---
| | [JOIN ME](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bb9e900e80844ed995849b60668d25a7&_e=f5y03iToKstdfVIz3XPWAeKdhHrXbovUKedgtP4TPiDhxCi-JrBc2csTtokUtI4osIYTLe0q0a3901alTeGK5RyHEm44n0th1mGxPSLIM8WW2fx-xEjVoF-wtihnAF6FwDdgXEauzTpGUU3uEXne-oqTBAgyPaWxcb_xJ9H256mcROjsBw3Cx7369jFI2JS2bXxKQBJ7COJVNJ7goH0bsUPJq9NPjg3YziyQdQiL84c5mkF4rhfF1hizWvcCoZsIzd2kxQLNUGqYNo_5Sh3xKPAioIXtbQCxqB-Wlj4IfwuLCqY4r6RL2bla41pajGHNm5U5nzr2P1uGr4vaTei3a_Kkco_Glwmxolf-JNTtPf8kW6LQO-uwapMXTp3F6wV8fU3QUT8Tw_yyyr0mfQPGSBqwYMcLmltXeXf6ShfG0Kk%3D)
---
Have you ever noticed how often Joe Biden tries to take potshots at Florida?

It's because he HATES what we're doing in the Sunshine State.

While he pushes the woke agenda, we're fighting back with freedom.

Joe Biden is taking the country in the wrong direction. But I know I can turn it around.

The American people know it, too. That's why they are ALREADY voting with their feet. Our population is booming in the free state of Florida.

Now, I want to put that choice on the ballot--but I need your support. ** **

We sometimes take freedom for granted. You should not do that after the last few years. It is contested, and we have seen it wither on the vine in many places in our country.

But Florida was different. We chose facts over fear. We chose education over indoctrination. We chose law and order over rioting and disorder. Florida was a refuge of sanity when the world went mad.

We held the line when freedom hung in the balance.

We showed that we can -- and must -- revitalize America.

**I believe freedom is worth fighting for, and as your next President I promise I will never stop fighting for your freedom.** **[Will you fight alongside me?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bb9e900e80844ed995849b60668d25a7&_e=f5y03iToKstdfVIz3XPWAeKdhHrXbovUKedgtP4TPiDhxCi-JrBc2csTtokUtI4osIYTLe0q0a3901alTeGK5RyHEm44n0th1mGxPSLIM8WW2fx-xEjVoF-wtihnAF6FwDdgXEauzTpGUU3uEXne-oqTBAgyPaWxcb_xJ9H256mcROjsBw3Cx7369jFI2JS2bXxKQBJ7COJVNJ7goH0bsUPJq9NPjg3YziyQdQiL84c5mkF4rhfF1hizWvcCoZsIzd2kxQLNUGqYNo_5Sh3xKE89sSfpwkcFpAfKcfQxQ4UEsH6auz58SuujFAVohu1OJGPaak5H-o8KqXYnwzuXfpG5ErEXWigRepYLbtGvkh8cnpivOBtkGJytgLjKtbKeQ5qAc6Nraq3tKOHxhoCND405OGIAlirkbWssMM79VJk%3D "Will you fight alongside me?")**
---
| | [YES, I'M READY TO WIN](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bb9e900e80844ed995849b60668d25a7&_e=f5y03iToKstdfVIz3XPWAeKdhHrXbovUKedgtP4TPiDhxCi-JrBc2csTtokUtI4osIYTLe0q0a3901alTeGK5RyHEm44n0th1mGxPSLIM8WW2fx-xEjVoF-wtihnAF6FwDdgXEauzTpGUU3uEXne-oqTBAgyPaWxcb_xJ9H256mcROjsBw3Cx7369jFI2JS2bXxKQBJ7COJVNJ7goH0bsUPJq9NPjg3YziyQdQiL84c5mkF4rhfF1hizWvcCoZsIzd2kxQLNUGqYNo_5Sh3xKBHwlr_WsPGVcoEYGc3Enqb_en99NbIaBqocbCB14UDTWohvPLC-waDcIQ3MP6SImyVVUvJrRYM4aQyCGk3l_cqTMFMic2XuWmoPqrhjmN4xaH69yixsH8Uqo5eiM_c2BDW1adP-8a1tY1NOjleUF70%3D)

And we can win, Peter.

I'll make sure we have an economy that works for working families, a secure border that works for our nation, and so much more. The battle won't be easy and will require a lot of toil and sweat to get it all done. I'm excited to share my agenda for America with you over the course of this campaign.

**But here 's why I'm writing you today, Peter: [I want to ask you to become a Launch Day Donor to my presidential campaign and join our first team tele-townhall.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bb9e900e80844ed995849b60668d25a7&_e=f5y03iToKstdfVIz3XPWAeKdhHrXbovUKedgtP4TPiDhxCi-JrBc2csTtokUtI4osIYTLe0q0a3901alTeGK5RyHEm44n0th1mGxPSLIM8WW2fx-xEjVoF-wtihnAF6FwDdgXEauzTpGUU3uEXne-oqTBAgyPaWxcb_xJ9H256mcROjsBw3Cx7369jFI2JS2bXxKQBJ7COJVNJ7goH0bsUPJq9NPjg3YziyQdQiL84c5mkF4rhfF1hizWvcCoZsIzd2kxQLNUGqYNo_5Sh3xKDGePA5e5znB_D1Q2QLvMvHoxDNoOCZfUOBc2qHqowUTTtZ_Gm6_OqY3R1DVg8AuPjQmVcNLZqIxYFLYw-xS7-6O0t5YPB0VSMfdMhJ5Hc4cJdZx1pP43PLYK3Lh7g0nx-TC5WbVsPR6jDctZ3aqNbE%3D "I want to ask you to become a Launch Day Donor to my presidential campaign and join our first Team Teletownhall.")**

I promise you, unlike other campaigns, our grassroots fundraising program is built on the principle that our donors are a part of our team, not our personal piggybank.

**_[I vow to treat you with respect: No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bb9e900e80844ed995849b60668d25a7&_e=f5y03iToKstdfVIz3XPWAeKdhHrXbovUKedgtP4TPiDhxCi-JrBc2csTtokUtI4osIYTLe0q0a3901alTeGK5RyHEm44n0th1mGxPSLIM8WW2fx-xEjVoF-wtihnAF6FwDdgXEauzTpGUU3uEXne-oqTBAgyPaWxcb_xJ9H256mcROjsBw3Cx7369jFI2JS2bXxKQBJ7COJVNJ7goH0bsUPJq9NPjg3YziyQdQiL84c5mkF4rhfF1hizWvcCoZsIzd2kxQLNUGqYNo_5Sh3xKA6NsSioEi080Q8zt_jjebmM0-jh6WdzenMcdwaO0pHfpbj4oiyjNnujVRSP1htrsuzfzzxQn5VYbC7WuPHWdVFMNxxu1mXeYeUGC6dOiPgYGABgg3wCG73WvCufIMDbYJObkhJYlpKVPfh8XHj_bP4%3D "I vow to treat you with respect: No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.")_**

Can I count on you?

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America's veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|

A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

---
Friend,
Every Republican elected official should be UNITED in outrage at what the Deep State has done to me and the America First movement.
**But sadly, some Republicans want to shy away from the topic, because they say they get tired of all the Deep State "drama."**
Friend, the weaponization of the FBI is one of the single biggest threats to our free Republic.
My home has been raided. I was framed as a Russian asset. My family and associates have been intimidated. My private communications have been spied on. I've even been indicted and arrested - despite committing NO CRIME.
And it's not _just_ me... Everyday, hardworking, freedom-loving patriots are also being targeted for holding views that go against the Deep State.
**That 's not _" drama."_ That's a declaration of war on everything we value as Americans.**
_If these politicians get fatigued from a bit of "drama," then the Deep State will eat them alive. They will not rise to the challenge to defend our Republic, and most importantly, defend YOU._
But even though the Deep State has put me through hell, I am ready to do it again! Because I love our country, and I will _NEVER_ let it get destroyed.
_It 's no surprise that we're leading the primary by 50 POINTS. Voters know that during these dark times, we need courage - not cowardice - in the White House._
The time has now come to solidify our lead so that we can turn our focus 100% to beating Crooked Joe Biden and DISMANTLING the Deep State.
Let's finish the job we started, dismantle the Deep State, and MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: A beautiful collection of the most beloved patriotic songs
body:
This beautiful collection features some of the most beloved patriotic songs ever written

| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhk0c766418bnf48o7eng5anvd3fvfvk2htida88_rp22sh2s8i66o75c1ieaoj5c9h2bs)
---
Hello, For a limited time, we are offering a brand-new music CD from the First Baptist Dallas Choir and Orchestra called _For God and Country_. This beautiful collection features some of the most beloved patriotic songs ever written, performed by some of the most talented musicians in the country. Songs like “God Bless America” and “America the Beautiful” are not just musical masterpieces—they are timeless expressions of the love that we Americans have for our country and the godly values it stands for.

“God Bless America,” for example, was written by Irving Berlin during World War I to express his gratitude for the opportunities that America had given him. Later, during the Great Depression, it became a rallying cry for a nation needing hope and unity. And today, it remains a beloved anthem that reminds us of the blessings we enjoy as Americans—blessings bestowed on us by God Himself.

Similarly, “America the Beautiful” was written by Katharine Lee Bates as a tribute to the beauty and majesty of the American landscape. Her words remind us of the awe-inspiring vistas that grace our country, from the amber waves of grain to the purple mountain majesties. The song reminds me of Romans 1:20, which tells us that “since the creation of the world His invisible attributes, that is, His eternal power and divine nature, have been clearly perceived, being understood by what has been made.”
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2l02ojjpoo7545gkfb7m9nninqlb79dp6oqeu2o_rp22sh2s8i66o75c1ieaoj5c9h2bs)
---
| | When you donate any amount to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_ , we will send you this music CD as a thank-you gift. Your donation will help us continue to spread the gospel message and offer hope and inspiration to people across America and around the world.

Here’s the link to make your donation: **[https://ptv.org/donate/for-god-country-music-cd](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zq28ht42dciobamgg90t774ec0acnhbkugjt7jc8_rp22sh2s8i66o75c1ieaoj5c9h2bs)** Thank you for your support, and may God bless you and this great nation of ours.

Sincerely,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

Pro Life Update

name: Ron DeSantis for President
subject: Why I said yes to running for President
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
I wanted you to be one of the first people to know about this.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztgnpi85trquboomitfijvb0n153sst04i6q7260_rp22sh2s8i66o75c1ieaoj1cjh2bs)
---
Friend,

It's official: I'M IN.

**I'm running for President of the United States. **
---
| | [JOIN ME](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrrr0bheiqcj03pnpiipvls3rnrk386a529avkho_rp22sh2s8i66o75c1ieaoj1cjh2bs)
---
Have you ever noticed how often Joe Biden tries to take potshots at Florida?

It’s because he HATES what we’re doing in the Sunshine State.

While he pushes the woke agenda, we’re fighting back with freedom.

Joe Biden is taking the country in the wrong direction. But I know I can turn it around.

The American people know it, too. That’s why they are ALREADY voting with their feet. Our population is booming in the free state of Florida.

Now, I want to put that choice on the ballot--but I need your support. ** **
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd2kbd109jpmo8c8d3cgq71fje0eq9oec586l82o_rp22sh2s8i66o75c1ieaoj1cjh2bs)
---
We sometimes take freedom for granted. You should not do that after the last few years. It is contested, and we have seen it wither on the vine in many places in our country.

But Florida was different. We chose facts over fear. We chose education over indoctrination. We chose law and order over rioting and disorder. Florida was a refuge of sanity when the world went mad.

We held the line when freedom hung in the balance.

We showed that we can -- and must -- revitalize America.

**I believe freedom is worth fighting for, and as your next President I promise I will never stop fighting for your freedom.** **[Will you fight alongside me?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsb1532aqjsgm700p39sv09mv0m4h89q71rnj8i8_rp22sh2s8i66o75c1ieaoj1cjh2bs "Will you fight alongside me?")**
---
| | [YES, I’M READY TO WIN](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr9mpdl22igkd5sjigmfqqfoao5r6kb8fpcjip18_rp22sh2s8i66o75c1ieaoj1cjh2bs)
---
And we can win, Friend.

I'll make sure we have an economy that works for working families, a secure border that works for our nation, and so much more. The battle won’t be easy and will require a lot of toil and sweat to get it all done. I’m excited to share my agenda for America with you over the course of this campaign.

**But here’s why I’m writing you today, Friend:[I want to ask you to become a Launch Day Donor to my presidential campaign and join our first team tele-townhall.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlc5bsljshdnv9phcj2u9eg9iebft7948hsu5bs8_rp22sh2s8i66o75c1ieaoj1cjh2bs "I want to ask you to become a Launch Day Donor to my presidential campaign and join our first Team Teletownhall.")**

I promise you, unlike other campaigns, our grassroots fundraising program is built on the principle that our donors are a part of our team, not our personal piggybank.

**_[I vow to treat you with respect: No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z60gtpr96kvehgrsjvd6bskop4s775o9cjd9sbsg_rp22sh2s8i66o75c1ieaoj1cjh2bs "I vow to treat you with respect: No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.")_**

Can I count on you?
---
| | [DONATE NOW](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze5b0j6vpkobnh7evqsdce9jjb5fslnng3kblskg_rp22sh2s8i66o75c1ieaoj1cjh2bs)
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsvjmbtopho7q42a4su70mi8ik1fskukigtkpae0_rp22sh2s8i66o75c1ieaoj1cjh2bs)
---
In Freedom,

Ron DeSantis
---
_P.S I want to show you my appreciation for standing with me from Day 1 of this campaign. It’s why my team prepared gifts to thank our Day 1 donors.

If you chip in $47 by midnight on 5/25, we’ll send you a limited-edition Day 1 membership card and an invite to our first-ever team tele-townhall.

Make sure you get yours now at this secure link: **[https://dsnts.com/aexHpu](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za6b8c2gin5p7qu68d65sj16a83jmt980fvk3928_rp22sh2s8i66o75c1ieaoj1cjh2bs)**_
---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9frlulagmr4502113hljj66m3gtaq1s2po2vk3g_rp22sh2s8i66o75c1ieaoj1cjh2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America’s veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

name: Ron DeSantis for President
subject: Why I said yes to running for President
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Let’s put the rumors to rest once and for all.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zscfn5l1bisck35drkbrmotap3q80k4kue6jrbjo_rp22sh2s8i66o75c1ieeo34c5h2bs)
---
Friend,

It's official: I'M IN.

**I'm running for President of the United States. **
---
| | [JOIN ME](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zv52pi04tp85pbib693i21amp9qftvacmpq16ntg_rp22sh2s8i66o75c1ieeo34c5h2bs)
---
Have you ever noticed how often Joe Biden tries to take potshots at Florida?

It's because he HATES what we're doing in the Sunshine State.

While he pushes the woke agenda, we're fighting back with freedom.

Joe Biden is taking the country in the wrong direction. But I know I can turn it around.

The American people know it, too. That's why they are ALREADY voting with their feet. Our population is booming in the free state of Florida.

Now, I want to put that choice on the ballot--but I need your support. ** **
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zekksgena8dqjc22iqii6fh5gjlogs30ftv2rtcg_rp22sh2s8i66o75c1ieeo34c5h2bs)
---
We sometimes take freedom for granted. You should not do that after the last few years. It is contested, and we have seen it wither on the vine in many places in our country.

But Florida was different. We chose facts over fear. We chose education over indoctrination. We chose law and order over rioting and disorder. Florida was a refuge of sanity when the world went mad.

We held the line when freedom hung in the balance.

We showed that we can -- and must -- revitalize America.

**I believe freedom is worth fighting for, and as your next President I promise I will never stop fighting for your freedom.** **[Will you fight alongside me?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zlbdeia5ln6sapls9dnkmdj1fc2dl904ji6nt19g_rp22sh2s8i66o75c1ieeo34c5h2bs "Will you fight alongside me?")**
---
| | [YES, I'M READY TO WIN](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znmm76gh21669dh7nhgpavgai9r87e2hnbkldpp0_rp22sh2s8i66o75c1ieeo34c5h2bs)
---
And we can win, Friend.

I'll make sure we have an economy that works for working families, a secure border that works for our nation, and so much more. The battle won't be easy and will require a lot of toil and sweat to get it all done. I'm excited to share my agenda for America with you over the course of this campaign.

**But here 's why I'm writing you today, Friend: [I want to ask you to become a Launch Day Donor to my presidential campaign and join our first team tele-townhall.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2rpdu3kgrrsa30f3vumeljrv6c4ccm096ft91l8_rp22sh2s8i66o75c1ieeo34c5h2bs "I want to ask you to become a Launch Day Donor to my presidential campaign and join our first Team Teletownhall.")**

I promise you, unlike other campaigns, our grassroots fundraising program is built on the principle that our donors are a part of our team, not our personal piggybank.

**_[I vow to treat you with respect: No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zfijf2kplgk2duh2pe1i4npjjne42a913ibcaiu0_rp22sh2s8i66o75c1ieeo34c5h2bs "I vow to treat you with respect: No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.")_**

Can I count on you?
---
| | [DONATE NOW](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zimgd86v5u1r7jrcg10cr0vfesp6c4ebdur89sh0_rp22sh2s8i66o75c1ieeo34c5h2bs)
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zt0mmj9thviaj9lh7i5got0oh4i1tlqjsl5pieo8_rp22sh2s8i66o75c1ieeo34c5h2bs)
---
In Freedom,

Ron DeSantis
---
_P.S I want to show you my appreciation for standing with me from Day 1 of this campaign. It 's why my team prepared gifts to thank our Day 1 donors.

If you chip in $47 by midnight on 5/25, we'll send you a limited-edition Day 1 membership card and an invite to our first-ever team tele-townhall.

Make sure you get yours now at this secure link: **[https://dsnts.com/aexHpu](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zgv08hsdspp0dkme9ac6tdg7tfa1ilbs60nldgao_rp22sh2s8i66o75c1ieeo34c5h2bs)**_
---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zfamki4f6bp5ljo4j1n63le9jr9uhm8a6e0l20co_rp22sh2s8i66o75c1ieeo34c5h2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America's veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

---

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Why you haven’t been hearing from me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
They didn’t censor me because it’s false. They censored me because it’s true...

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3hidd8eo025m1nqdc5eebk4v6m94bevs5chbo60_rp22sh2s8i66o75c1ieaoj5c1h2bs)
Fellow American,

Big Tech election interference has begun:

LinkedIn locked my account and censored me this week for posting videos where I expressed fact-based views as a presidential candidate about climate policy and Biden's relationships with China.

They said it violated their policies relating to "misinformation, hate speech, and violence."

_Watch my reaction here:_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoicvt2o671eteihf1rgrh792feut8k2n47tm9qo_rp22sh2s8i66o75c1ieaoj5c1h2bs)
| [** WATCH NOW ->**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8ahdjnltj5p1vie937pjd0460knf7hra2ougg3g_rp22sh2s8i66o75c1ieaoj5c1h2bs)
---

Two years ago, Big Tech censored people who argued that we shouldn't close schools for COVID. Now they're censoring presidential candidates for arguing that fossil fuels are required for prosperity.

**They didn't censor me because it's false. They censored me because it's true...**

This latest Big Tech censor is sad but not surprising.

If we want to win elections in 2024, we must take a stand.

I refuse to stand idly by as our fundamental rights are eroded. That is why I have decided to take a stand and fight back against this pervasive censorship. But I cannot do it alone. **[I need your help, your support, and your investment to make a real difference.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9eiv1hk4t7nb72t9arfl4geik1egp4q4s6mdf10_rp22sh2s8i66o75c1ieaoj5c1h2bs)**

**[Will you stand with me against Big Tech's unchecked power?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhm3aasbv6btv580rq1rcov8luqaii68hc2rs8v8_rp22sh2s8i66o75c1ieaoj5c1h2bs)**

[** STAND UP TO BIG TECH ->**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zukqcaft0sispni7a86gif43etmgg7d18jh5494o_rp22sh2s8i66o75c1ieaoj5c1h2bs)
---

They are censoring conservative messages because they know what we have to say resonates with voters.

Before the end of the day, I am asking for your help.

Thanks,

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9egs7s64ec83tflsu42lhnq7onpduugtansm20g_rp22sh2s8i66o75c1ieaoj5c1h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** STAND UP TO BIG TECH ->**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5vv2hctmdeu9jsj0ec6jhkmmdre14lqnh9us190_rp22sh2s8i66o75c1ieaoj5c1h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd7hkuq3qkrm5lvgkfmii9ceuje5ilisihmin6b0_rp22sh2s8i66o75c1ieaoj5c1h2bs)

---

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb19ejhhgunjdsha4g35tt262od7b6aj268i0bq0_rp22sh2s8i66o75c1ieaoj5c1h2bs)| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgquvuiptjgpvjkifs369n383b1poju829r8p5u8_rp22sh2s8i66o75c1ieaoj5c1h2bs)| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqkgijl4dqmtqu5rpd6nipm9uimnip17puk24dlg_rp22sh2s8i66o75c1ieaoj5c1h2bs)
---|---|---

He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. American Action News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T41e60b3a-b1c4-4532-8cc9-f2ba7264f360/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | Peter, **[Sign and send the petition to your U.S. senators: Pass a clean funding bill to extend the debt limit. Period.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb02992a2-3e32-43c1-9cad-c51c18fd6b69/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** The U.S. is dangerously close to defaulting on our debt, and House Republicans exploited this crisis by passing legislation that would make extreme, steep spending cuts. This package would cut TRILLIONS of dollars from crucial programs, focusing the cruelty on safety net programs, housing, education, Medicaid, and veterans. It would roll back measures to tackle the climate crisis and cause job loss, including among federal employees. **It’s a callous deal and it cannot be entertained.[The U.S. Senate cannot pass this deal and must, instead, raise the debt ceiling without conditions.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8ccbfb7e-7765-4c2d-95a6-73adfc37399a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Our debt limit was reached in January. Urgent action must be taken to allow the federal government to pay bills Congress has already incurred, or else face an unprecedented fiscal crisis. Raising the debt ceiling does not add or create any new debt, it's simply a promise the government makes to pay its bills–we do not need to slash spending to raise the debt limit. We can pass a clean funding bill to extend the debt limit and avert a fiscal crisis, one without cuts to vital programs and benefits, job risk, or benefits for Big Oil and Gas. The U.S. Senate must pass clean debt ceiling legislation. [**Sign and send the petition to the U.S. Senate: Pass clean debt ceiling legislation.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T711dee27-4619-44a9-84dd-547f73d39788/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Cliff

Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Ron D (personal)
subject: FWD: big announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Did you see this headline? It says it ALL...

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zthqjsellmfjgvn780v41jqerl1aonq9a64ug8vo_rp22sh2s8i66o75chg64ob2cjh2bs)
---
Friend

It's been a busy 24 hours, but I couldn't be more pleased with how it's going.
---
There's just one more thing I want our team to get done before the day is through: **_I want you on my team,_ Friend**

_Donate $47 by midnight tonight, and my team will send you a thank you gift for officially joining the DeSantis Launch Team_ -- because we truly appreciate your support from the very beginning.

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfdm9lqkqjn5runjgccsetu3o7kt5e1p2dic6u3o_rp22sh2s8i66o75chg64ob2cjh2bs)
---

Are you with me? Join the team here: **[secure.winred.com/desantis/Day-1](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu1csr4n6s4pmq74idaoeufsh721dpspbk3karo0_rp22sh2s8i66o75chg64ob2cjh2bs "secure.winred.com/desantis/Day-1")**

---
|
---
In Freedom,
Ron DeSantis
---
\----------- Forwarded message -----------
From: Ron DeSantis
Date: May 24, 2023 at 6:15 PM EDT
Subject: big announcement
Friend,

It's official: I'M IN.

**I'm running for President of the United States. **
---
| | [JOIN ME](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zq5p5dmviellctidd8vlc1nt2jeqvv6ejhlsfc50_rp22sh2s8i66o75chg64ob2cjh2bs)
---
Have you ever noticed how often Joe Biden tries to take potshots at Florida?

It's because he HATES what we're doing in the Sunshine State.

While he pushes the woke agenda, we're fighting back with freedom.

Joe Biden is taking the country in the wrong direction. But I know I can turn it around.

The American people know it, too. That's why they are ALREADY voting with their feet. Our population is booming in the free state of Florida.

Now, I want to put that choice on the ballot--but I need your support. ** **
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zc363hfr3oei5o3i30mjn5l4ubonsjtnqnrpmoho_rp22sh2s8i66o75chg64ob2cjh2bs)
---
We sometimes take freedom for granted. You should not do that after the last few years. It is contested, and we have seen it wither on the vine in many places in our country.

But Florida was different. We chose facts over fear. We chose education over indoctrination. We chose law and order over rioting and disorder. Florida was a refuge of sanity when the world went mad.

We held the line when freedom hung in the balance.

We showed that we can -- and must -- revitalize America.

**I believe freedom is worth fighting for, and as your next President I promise I will never stop fighting for your freedom.** **[Will you fight alongside me?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z96lvqgjo8c16ac5oeh9h2dv0uaa4pns470tpckg_rp22sh2s8i66o75chg64ob2cjh2bs "Will you fight alongside me?")**
---
| | [YES, I'M READY TO WIN](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zq5omt9jffjfjgi9admas4nrp3ch2vhsk78bvks0_rp22sh2s8i66o75chg64ob2cjh2bs)
---
And we can win, Friend.

I'll make sure we have an economy that works for working families, a secure border that works for our nation, and so much more. The battle won't be easy and will require a lot of toil and sweat to get it all done. I'm excited to share my agenda for America with you over the course of this campaign.

**But here 's why I'm writing you today, Friend: [I want to ask you to become a Launch Day Donor to my presidential campaign and join our first team tele-townhall.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhjvilos56ve342fbjfbel9g71v6vnoijht994lg_rp22sh2s8i66o75chg64ob2cjh2bs "I want to ask you to become a Launch Day Donor to my presidential campaign and join our first Team Teletownhall.")**

I promise you, unlike other campaigns, our grassroots fundraising program is built on the principle that our donors are a part of our team, not our personal piggybank.

**_[I vow to treat you with respect: No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z312dh7joosf3g6sl2uuukb20hq0fitkijrqn9ng_rp22sh2s8i66o75chg64ob2cjh2bs "I vow to treat you with respect: No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.")_**

Can I count on you?
---
| | [DONATE NOW](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcrhlc6d4oavuqq54kmf98gn495j5l3r6te62pr0_rp22sh2s8i66o75chg64ob2cjh2bs)
---
|
---
In Freedom,
Ron DeSantis
---
_P.S I want to show you my appreciation for standing with me from Day 1 of this campaign. It 's why my team prepared gifts to thank our Day 1 donors.

If you chip in $47 by midnight on 5/25, we'll send you a limited-edition Day 1 membership card and an invite to our first-ever team tele-townhall.

Make sure you get yours now at this secure link: **[https://dsnts.com/aexHpu](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9f14tqhndmep6dmj98mbhu5ds5l6td2msn5fc98_rp22sh2s8i66o75chg64ob2cjh2bs "https://secure.winred.com/desantis/great-american-comeback-popa?utm_source=_&utm_medium=em_p&utm_campaign=2023-05-25__popacta_ha_rd_PopActa_ImIn_ImIn_greatamericancomebackpopa_fr_&utm_tc=1600D-20230526")**_
---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkhglcsfkdgbv6r21clnlv7uvatoamon0e53jpi8_rp22sh2s8i66o75chg64ob2cjh2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America's veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: The Beginning of the End for woke ideology…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
I wanted you to be one of the first people to know about this.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z02lu3j0gduibn8csd57835v9pc4shgku38ttvgg_rp22sh2s8i66o75chg64ob2cjh2bs)
---
Friend,

It's official: I'M IN.

**I'm running for President of the United States. **
---
| | [JOIN ME](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze3l94uqbnoadarfefa05vnnqoj6t9m7a6ms2vng_rp22sh2s8i66o75chg64ob2cjh2bs)
---
Have you ever noticed how often Joe Biden tries to take potshots at Florida?

It's because he HATES what we're doing in the Sunshine State.

While he pushes the woke agenda, we're fighting back with freedom.

Joe Biden is taking the country in the wrong direction. But I know I can turn it around.

The American people know it, too. That's why they are ALREADY voting with their feet. Our population is booming in the free state of Florida.

Now, I want to put that choice on the ballot--but I need your support. ** **
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zs4ubqub1t115abb6kgjvfs7k7av707s53iie1po_rp22sh2s8i66o75chg64ob2cjh2bs)
---
We sometimes take freedom for granted. You should not do that after the last few years. It is contested, and we have seen it wither on the vine in many places in our country.

But Florida was different. We chose facts over fear. We chose education over indoctrination. We chose law and order over rioting and disorder. Florida was a refuge of sanity when the world went mad.

We held the line when freedom hung in the balance.

We showed that we can -- and must -- revitalize America.

**I believe freedom is worth fighting for, and as your next President I promise I will never stop fighting for your freedom.** **[Will you fight alongside me?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zojnd027uf4vis0nhe0a5odh2c0shdaerstdop38_rp22sh2s8i66o75chg64ob2cjh2bs "Will you fight alongside me?")**
---
| | [YES, I'M READY TO WIN](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2se0rgi2pl7h7u5lsbm5k9m32seap88bld20q38_rp22sh2s8i66o75chg64ob2cjh2bs)
---
And we can win, Friend.

I'll make sure we have an economy that works for working families, a secure border that works for our nation, and so much more. The battle won't be easy and will require a lot of toil and sweat to get it all done. I'm excited to share my agenda for America with you over the course of this campaign.

**But here 's why I'm writing you today, Friend: [I want to ask you to become a Launch Day Donor to my presidential campaign and join our first team tele-townhall.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zc9nagv7an40qee0bttjoptoj9gtm6euskru0v50_rp22sh2s8i66o75chg64ob2cjh2bs "I want to ask you to become a Launch Day Donor to my presidential campaign and join our first Team Teletownhall.")**

I promise you, unlike other campaigns, our grassroots fundraising program is built on the principle that our donors are a part of our team, not our personal piggybank.

**_[I vow to treat you with respect: No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zb6lr9l96rvkdv5gc9jlo6nea7trk0c3k475b6tg_rp22sh2s8i66o75chg64ob2cjh2bs "I vow to treat you with respect: No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.")_**

Can I count on you?
---
| | [DONATE NOW](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztlisgh5s7h75un19usftrpsoeqkm7n3bm4t4gjo_rp22sh2s8i66o75chg64ob2cjh2bs)
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcm0cvf5molavf7qdeujkeohmhn13sgkrhds0r7g_rp22sh2s8i66o75chg64ob2cjh2bs)
---
In Freedom,

Ron DeSantis
---
_P.S I want to show you my appreciation for standing with me from Day 1 of this campaign. It 's why my team prepared gifts to thank our Day 1 donors.

If you chip in $47 by midnight on 5/25, we'll send you a limited-edition Day 1 membership card and an invite to our first-ever team tele-townhall.

Make sure you get yours now at this secure link: **[https://dsnts.com/aexHpu](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1liop0vk4kofolb97v571dg6dtbed2oim8u64lg_rp22sh2s8i66o75chg64ob2cjh2bs)**_
---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zc4ho01namuu2pls54sdt6lph3tb4urqa3d3rf7o_rp22sh2s8i66o75chg64ob2cjh2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America's veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

And we can win, Friend.

I'll make sure we have an economy that works for working families, a secure border that works for our nation, and so much more. The battle won’t be easy and will require a lot of toil and sweat to get it all done. I’m excited to share my agenda for America with you over the course of this campaign.

**But here’s why I’m writing you today, Friend:[I want to ask you to become a Launch Day Donor to my presidential campaign and join our first team tele-townhall.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667207%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rhttO56gs9aYtsl7eUueqQ&sysid=1 "I want to ask you to
become a Launch Day Donor to my presidential campaign and join our first Team
Teletownhall.")**

I promise you, unlike other campaigns, our grassroots fundraising program is built on the principle that our donors are a part of our team, not our personal piggybank.

**_[I vow to treat you with respect: No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667208%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xsm2yWdmbvmYPzoj2OW6Pw&sysid=1 "I vow to treat you with
respect: No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.")_**

Can I count on you?

In Freedom,

Ron DeSantis

Make sure you get yours now at this secure link: **[https://dsnts.com/aexHpu](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667200%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CgOoprsCv5umvZCFxsgLXw&sysid=1)**_

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667294%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6MkEDnEU4swt5om%2bfA%2btAg&sysid=1)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America’s veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|

Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79480%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1BVEPZWpXX8MUA%2bvWNWedw&sysid=1)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79480%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1BVEPZWpXX8MUA%2bvWNWedw&sysid=1)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79481%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HcBAGi%2byRSuv9O%2fpjI641Q&sysid=1)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[**_Donate Now >>_**](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79482%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CwOU5joNN2ZbDe%2bzfdb9mg&sysid=1)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79483%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=g6wuille%2b9fK2zEX8wZUEg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79484%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uVwq%2f8eUp6BXRuPAUdgHpQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79495%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=N7qMKTGfqedZfMbgYtyT0Q&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79496%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uJmRMsLqjW1CXmiXmcLK2A&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79497%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iTJC37jO%2f7vgDuBVmo037Q&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79498%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Y4Yal89wxiDSefD2WvEnrQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79499%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nIQQqs9ns%2fnrg83%2bRdXXAQ&sysid=1)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79490%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RLRqEKWemcS2VSl3CORbyw&sysid=1)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79491%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fohiDsMwn6NWi%2fSPcLrLWg&sysid=1)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I‘m humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79492%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DhT4U9QmqAMkhb5cJAycDw&sysid=1)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79493%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fyLpU9Yt%2b1UhJ98cA3ha8Q&sysid=1)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

_The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible._

name: Eddie
subject: Out with the old Virginia
body:
keeping up the winning momentum

| | |
---
| | Friend,

The Democrat-controlled Senate is a roadblock for good legislation, a green light for federal waste, and a rubber stamp for the Biden agenda. **In 2021 Virginia flipped the Governor’s office red, it’s time to do the same with our Senate seats.** We have the momentum, we know the right path forward, and we can help flip the Senate. For over a decade, Virginia has elected Democrats to the United States Senate and gotten nothing in return but our jobs shipped overseas, heavy inflation, and a political circus. **Why?** Because we keep running the same people, and getting the same underwhelming results. I am running to change that.
---
| [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667217%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=93UddGuh6ea3cKf5imiTeA&sysid=1)
---
| I’m Eddie Garcia. I’m the son of a ranch hand and a traveling nurse, raised in rural America and taught the unwavering values of faith and patriotism.
---
| [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667217%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=93UddGuh6ea3cKf5imiTeA&sysid=1)
---
| I spent 22 years and 6 combat tours serving our nation as an Army Officer in Iraq and Afghanistan. I’ve been an Army Congressional Liaison, advocating for gold star families, a stronger military, and our nation’s veterans in the United States House of Representatives. But there’s always so much more to do.
---
| [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667217%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=93UddGuh6ea3cKf5imiTeA&sysid=1)
---
| Our institutions are hurting. The trust is not there. It has become the people versus the government and I believe that by following freedom, faith, family, and putting people before politics we can change that. [**I’m in this for the long haul because I believe we can be better. Are you with me?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667218%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Au7qbNvkG6B%2bnC64DjKuqg&sysid=1) I need your help, the support of the men and women who make our nation great, to take back Virginia and change our broken system. [**By donating $25, $50, $100, $250 or more today you help us keep up the momentum we’ve seen in Virginia. **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667219%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1DYp5afzCy4qFmXZ62SYbQ&sysid=1)

# Friday, May 26, 2023
---|---
**Happy Friday!** In today's edition, we’re writing about Target’s huge drop in value due to consumer backlash, Kevin McCarthy and President Biden nearing a compromise in the debt ceiling negotiations, and a huge day in the stock market for Nvidia. If this is your first time reading The Flyover, [sign up here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FOwzAQgOGnsbdG5zvnEg_eULeyMkZOfG4POTUKpoi3R2Kl6y_9w_d2WS5Jq96vr2mX2Etb0tb1IQuMJ-QT0oI2xyKCQlai43l0ABMGe4ve-XUtCJIDJ5AEbvYMnIPgRlCC1YiABCMyhJFhGmiGdc3I4pILhN54kKy9HcN703u_Sak_7SHHsLXd1vg_GjwbOn_13dCLB3vE_PGtteonT8bDdU9a_97-nPIbAAD__7qaSas) and make sure you don't miss our next edition. ## Target Stock Plummets
Americans are upset about Target's _Pride Month_ displays, and [the backlash](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFzhCAQRn-NdjjroqgFRRq7S5vSQVl0E4QbIGfu32cudfrvm_fmfdyWm2HPYX83J-ni4mK2wg9aoBeoBMoFa6sdEZKsSbdq7FuAAaf60LCNZCwRgR2d2_pWrhJaGFYzqK43rmaNgBJ6VDD1CoZGjrCuFhW1pp0kdlUHZLnE1HxGDuUg55_xQanZ4ll7fZRyz5V8q3CucL6uq3HxZ_3OHCjn16bC-TTpi0qucC4m7VSEj5mymMTK3nMMwpxsxT2xJXFS2g4TLGcOu9hiKOlFy886aXu_XoeshqqD_TTs_yTK_01-AwAA__8DM2ZH) has wiped out $9 billion in market value since May 17th. Target has boosted profits with LGBTQ-themed merchandise for a decade, but consumers have been especially bothered this year by the aggressive nature of the items: female bathing suits with "[extra crotch coverage](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOszAQhJ_GdI6WNTZQuPgbuvztlcjEa-KLsSO8ScTbn7j6mtFII30afV_X-epiinn97zayHMrsbhzfNIOWaCSqGRtvAxGSasi2ZtAtQI9jc7ee2uDDQv0Iw7BoHVyHujOwKNc6cqaJFgEVaDQwagP9RQ2wLB4Nta4dFXaiA_KRy375LjHznUI6ypv2y61sTbJ35mcV6p_ASeCUj2epfE4CpxMscAJ99jM2Wo8sH5TSIZfkKlfJbl-J5QmU_Lo9ZNgjZZ8O-Skb5SrrJ271FbkKnJrd-ucnphSr6UUH6-Zi-v3Bf2v5CQAA__-vbmQq)," children's swim skirts designed for "multiple gender expressions," and children's books about gender fluidity. Shares dropped by 12% as the S&P 500 held steady, and Target's CEO [has responded](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLtuhDAQAL8GOp_Wa7Bx4SIN3aVNiWy8wEbmEdjcKX8fXeqUo2lG83Ef7pELb_N7XCnItA9xFH7QAK1Cq9AMWOcwESGZmoK2XasBHPp6CWl0uemm0XadJ22yzjlnR5DyCGDA1xwQ0ECLFnxrwd1MBylltKSj9gabqgHKLPt5-9x5k4Wm8rM_6LyN-1qXsIgcV2XeKuwr7OOx0fN6qRecwmOhCnuJ50yiypzkSx0nZ1LrvsmiUpSFt1ld3yyXQm28Ia9jR8lqDamxFk3WLpo0teDqM-TjyaXwZV3VwLxGLn8d8v-W3wAAAP__10Nikw) by shrinking the _Pride_ displays and moving them to the back of the store.
## McCarthy, Biden Nearing Deal
President Biden and Speaker McCarthy are reportedly [nearing an agreement](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGSrCAQRb8Gs7awEcWA4CVm89INLZRmZAfFAhxr_37LiTc5yU3OuV-P6WF88Pvzv9lIFxcnsxT_polLwA5QTFhZ7YiQREW66ZRsOO9xqFYtlWoHaQanuLXYcjGrXgk3L41ThEJUXiNHwSV2fJAd72uh-Dxb7KgxzSCwZS0n60tM9Xf0e1nJhZ_4plQvcauCXks5MhP_GI4Mx-u66kRnoZTvneG4mfSikhmO541r9YVgjWcmSHScc_CL2TNkohcsIWaCM4OlucBCn2iwZMING_xOsJNJGW5nuPMlw7FK2h6XD8Hnrmctf27Gh49e-fut3wAAAP__JLlrkw) on the government's debt ceiling. The two sides are now $70 billion apart in a negotiation over $1 trillion+ in spending. Rep. Garret Graves, a top Republican negotiator, says there are several hang-ups stalling a resolution--including work requirements for anti-poverty programs. Talks [continued](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLuO6yAURb_G7ogOh5cpKG6TLred0uJxiBlhY9lMovz9KKmn3NrNWuvrNt98qWW7__cruZ7b7GMvD5pBMdQMxYxjcpkISYzkuJ4UBzBox8VZUHKS2YggPGrJE4WUMqgctBIIOBaHgAIUarBKg7mICUJIqIl7bgXKQQKl0ttx-W5l6wvl-moPOi6xrWN1S-_7OYh_A14HvPp9o-f5vt7j6CVWGvCaKHQW6SPBQkm0sTVGf_TlxRJl_1M72-jeevG9tO1kMYCWOmoBPPOUrUHOJ6sna1IWBsV4uLQ_S63l1GaQcF99qR-i_neg3wAAAP__PPBllA) into the night on Thursday, and it's unclear exactly how much time is left on the clock before the Treasury Department runs out of money. 35 House Republicans [wrote a letter](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7GO6yAQAL8GukTLYhZcUDzpyV2uvdLCZh1zwiGyN4nu70_KtdeNNMVoPi_jJZVabtePtHGUpY1plvLkEdwJ6YR2RJ3jwoxsNUdDwRkAj71eIzkwJgTbOZq8zTRlNyXuUrA9g1mcLhEBLTgk6B2BP9sA05SR2CTTW-xUB5yLtP381cpNVl7qd3vyfp7bpmtcRe6Hsv8UDgoHeRWRX6dwWHbm3LY5PebHoXA4JMkbDJHx3gUMfUBHGAwpOxzK_kfQe8z3V6m1HORVB9ctlfqOyd_vPwEAAP__YldWyQ) to McCarthy urging him to "hold the line" and questioning the math behind Janet Yellen's claim that America will not be able to pay its bills on June 1st.
## Memorial Day Travel Expenses Rise
42 million Americans are traveling on Memorial Day, despite [airline prices rising](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDGPhCAUhH8Ndhh8KGJBcY3dXnulecJzl1uUDXCS_fcXr75ukplMvnxft-WGPvjj_ok7mbLFBW3xJy1i4KA4yAUaZzYiINmQ6ZQeOiFGmJqHkaRw7RVoGvUGFjWCBItWa7UJO1HjDQiQYgAlpkGJsZVarKsDRR12k4Se9YKcLzG139Ef5UFbeMeTUmvj3gTzKOWVmfxgMDOYa62tXfNBNV89g_mKDOZENibH10T49Med77TH5DFwh29eiZ50OL79UMg8R0zXpCQ8KXAbc7kemmTcq_oQfFYj68V9Rx_-IMr_Tn4DAAD__3uHZSQ) 11% since last year. Hotel and food prices have also risen, putting the squeeze on families choosing to road-trip rather than fly. Although expenses are higher, more than 37 million will hit the highways--that's up 6% since last year. Cruise port cities in Alaska, Florida, and Seattle are among [this weekend's](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FuhSAUANCvge0RuAjKwNCF7XXtaFAuz9ugGKWa9_dNOvcLTs7Xc3xGKrS9PuOKvuU6xrnRhaM0D7AP0CPw5DMioObolR2MkrIHxxef8pR1b7QGGECBU65XThvlcjd06BQnDxK0NGClM1b2Qg9ymhJYVFE5DR3rJCZq9RDflba2YC7veuEh5rry4pfW9pPpDwaBQbjvW1xRvOrFINQ9Mgj7z1Rojo3qdjIIMxacjtiQQVhxTfEt9pT54dN-Uyl02p518rVGKn9C-z_8GwAA___f01Xp) most popular destinations.
