clean_body: It's been a tough year in the Mississippi legislature for Conservatives. We started this year hopeful that real conservative legislation like a full personal income tax elimination bill would be passed into law. But in the moderate at best Mississippi Legislature, hoping for a full income tax elimination was apparently a pipe dream. A proposed bill that would have taken steps towards a complete personal income tax elimination in the state was discussed in the MS House of Representatives among the Republicans in Caucus meetings, and it was Republicans, not Democrats, that fought the bill to its ultimate demise. | | ---|---|--- | | | or ? ? from the desk ofDana Criswell | | | May 26 | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- It was a tough year in the Mississippi legislature for Conservatives. We started this year hopeful that real conservative legislation like a full personal income tax elimination bill would be passed into law. But in the moderate at best Mississippi Legislature, hoping for a full income tax elimination was apparently a pipe dream. A proposed bill that would have taken steps towards a complete personal income tax elimination in the state was discussed in the MS House of Representatives among the Republicans in Caucus meetings, and it was Republicans, not Democrats, that fought the bill to its ultimate demise. Thanks for reading Dana Criswell! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work. ? The bill would have required a 3/5 majority vote for passage, meaning all Republicans in the MS House of Representatives would need to vote in favor of the bill for it to pass. Surely no Republican would fight against a tax cut, right? The MS GOP's platform states in clear language that we should support the reduction of the tax burden for our citizens: Mississippi Republicans believe that people, not government, know best how to spend their own money. When people keep more of their hard-earned money, jobs and economic growth will flourish in the free market system. Mississippi Republicans support the reduction of the tax burden on our citizens. We believe in the reduction of taxes to empower taxpayers, to create a more competitive environment for job creation, to incentivize work, entrepreneurship, and investment, and to prevent the excessive growth of government. But it was a dozen Republicans' betrayal to our Party's Platform of cutting taxes that killed the only chance of an income tax elimination bill this year. It's apparent that at least a dozen Republicans in the MS House of Representatives are either unaware of their own party's platform, or they are deliberately hostile to it. Determining where a candidate stands on this issue is extremely important. States without an income tax draw more businesses and have stronger economies. Do not vote for anyone who does not understand that our state suffers when government takes your money. Here are two reports from the Magnolia Tribune about the effort to eliminate the state income tax. Thanks for reading Dana Criswell! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work. ? Read all of Dana 's post and stay informed about politics in Mississippi ? | | | | | | | (C) 2023 Dana Criswell 530 George St., Suite 200, Jackson, MS ? ?

name: Tom Fitton
subject: We are taking on government at the federal, state and local levels!
body:
You and our other members have helped Judicial Watch take an historic leadership role in forcing states to follow federal election laws that are our last line of defense against voter fraud and corrupt elections.

| | |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Thanks to our members’ commitment, our small army of investigators and attorneys are successfully battling public corruption and unlawful government secrecy.
**We could not continue to score key victories without their steadfast support...and we can do even more if you will[join the Judicial Watch team today!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63518&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)**
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63518&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

Here's a quick, recent recap of Judicial Watch's impact:

* **_We scored another win for free and fair elections_** as we just settled our National Voter Registration Act (NVRA) lawsuit against the state of **Pennsylvania** after the state admitted it had removed 178,258 ineligible voter registrations. This landmark achievement comes on the heels of our NVRA settlement with **Colorado** in late March! **_Others talk about stopping voter fraud ...Judicial Watch acts_!**

* We filed a new lawsuit against the **Biden Department of Homeland Security** for records **related to potential _Deep State cooperation between its Cybersecurity and Information Security Agency and social media platforms to censor and suppress free speech_**. Documents already released by Elon Musk confirm Twitter's cooperation with the FBI, and the unholy conspiracy in the Biden administration to censor conservative Americans in partnership with **Big Tech**. _Judicial Watch is the national leader educating the American people about the frightening expansion of the Biden administration 's "Big Brotherism" against conservative news and opinion_!

* We sued the **Biden Justice and State Departments** for extradition records of illegal alien Saul Chavez, who killed the brother of our client Brian McCann in Chicago in 2011. We are committed to forcing the federal government to come clean about why it took over a decade to extradite Chavez from Mexico. We are also making sure the American people understand that **_this murderous criminal was released from custody and allowed to flee to Mexico as a result of Chicago 's lawless sanctuary policies_**. **Our fight against illegal city and state sanctuary policies continues!**

* **And we received blockbuster government documents from the Department of Health and Human Services, in response to one of our lawsuits, that reveal U.S. federal funding for China 's Wuhan Institute's research helped create Coronavirus "mutants" **- meaning it is increasingly likely that U.S. funding in China for mutant virus, gain-of-function research may have been responsible for the emergence of the COVID pandemic in Wuhan. _We expect these additional revelations to prompt criminal_ _investigations_!

None of these victories and work on behalf of the rule of law would be possible without the support of our members_!

But we have so much more to do...and that's **[why I hope you will help us with a generous contribution today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63518&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)**

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63518&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

You can be sure that Judicial Watch has never fought harder for your conservative values...and for the rule of law.

And we can do even more with your help today!

I thank you in advance for joining with us today to uphold the rule of law and fight for the American people’s “right to know!”

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63518&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)

name: Edwards Policy Team
subject: Mayor Turner’s FY24 Budget
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Amanda Edwards Campaign, Melanie Gray, Treasurer
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ae-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ae-email]
Friend,
Mayor Turner released his FY24 Proposed budget last week and we wanted to share some of the highlights from it:
Houston Keeps Growing
The total proposed budget of $6.2 billion is a 6.6% increase over the FY23 budget of $5.8 billion.
Working for a Safe, Clean City
Total proposed general fund expenditures are $2.89 billion , a 4.3% increase over the FY23 budget of $2.77 billion . Proposed expenditures include 3% raises for police and municipal employees and a 6% raise for fire. Public safety expenditures are 68% of general fund expenditures.
Where the Money Comes From
Estimated property tax revenue is the largest source of general fund revenue at 47.3% , or $1.37 billion.
At 29.9%, estimated sales tax is the second largest general fund revenue segment. Because of uncertainty in the consumer economy, the mayor characterizes the proposed budget as conservative in its estimate of sales tax totals, budgeting at $866 million , which is a 3% decrease compared to the FY23 estimate.
The FY24 Proposed Budget utilizes $160 million in ARPA funds, which are temporary federal funds initially distributed to cities during the pandemic.
Challenges to Watch
The FY24 budget highlights three structural barriers that have concerned city leadership and drawn the attention of credit rating agencies over time: unfunded pension liabilities, OPEB (other post-employment benefits), and the revenue cap.
*
Pension.
The
mayor
highlights
his
successful
pension
reform,
reducing
the
$8.2
billion
liability
to
$2.2
billion
since
2017
and
implementing
a
30
year
plan
to
address
the
remainder.
*
OPEB.
The
proposed
budget
establishes
an
OPEB
trust
with
a
starting
contribution
of
$10
million
.
The
mayor
proposes
to
grow
the
trust
through
investment
and
additional
future
contributions
to
take
steps
to
address
the
city's
OPEB.
*
Revenue
Cap.
The
mayor's
accompanying
budget
letter
makes
a
point
of
noting
that
Houston
is
subject
to,
and
in
compliance
with,
both
the
State
of
Texas
revenue
cap
and
the
Houston-specific
cap
adopted
in
2004.
Through her municipal finance law experience and prior service as Vice Chair of the City of Houston Budget & Fiscal Affairs Committee, Amanda has spent her career addressing complex issues relating to municipal finance. We will continue to deliver important updates on these issues!
Thank you.
The Edwards Policy Team

name: Wes Moore
subject: I see book bannings and teachers being censored. And I see not just a threat to our history but a threat to our strength.
body:
I want to share some of the words I delivered to the Morehouse Class of 2023 on Sunday. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63851012/408192693/224150735?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230526morehouse_wm_180da_v1s1_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjY0Mzc2Zi1jOWZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rcVmlZEM2pJFP79ELCk7TDqu4rHkqWCYvnaFPhbZDEY=)
---
Team, Normally, this would be the time of the month where I email to let you know we've got a big end-of-month fundraising goal we need to hit (and we still do). **But honestly, I truly want to take this time to share some of the words I delivered to the Morehouse Class of 2023 on Sunday.** I was honored, as the first Black governor of Maryland and one of only three Black governors in our country's entire history, to speak at one of the most prestigious historically Black colleges in America to a class full of hundreds of young men who look like me. While graduations are a moment to look to the future, I was remiss not to speak to those young men – and you, Maryland – about history.
* * *
I look around our country, and I see book banning, teachers being censored, curriculum of truth being taken out. This is not just a threat to our history but a threat to our strength.
* * *
Not just because those who do not learn from history are doomed to repeat it. But because **those who do not learn their past will never learn their own power.** When I was polling at a mere 1% during my campaign, it was Maryland's history that showed me the path. For ours is a state that:
* Was home to one of the largest slave ports in North America
* Birthed redlining and other discriminatory housing policies that have served as one of the greatest wealth thefts in our history
* Lynched Black men in their streets and neighborhoods not even a century ago

**But Maryland also has a history of courage** , of leaders and thinkers and writers and scholars. And their contributions paved the way not just for me to run for office, but their stories helped me to see the path. People like:
* Reginald Lewis who was the first Black man to build a multibillion dollar company in America
* Cab Calloway who was one of the first Black men to break the color barrier in the entertainment industry
* Lillie May Carroll Jackson who founded the Baltimore City NAACP and was known as the mother of the civil rights movement

It was those stories that I looked to on the hard days of our campaign. And they are the same ones I look to as we fight for the future of our state – and agonize over the future of our country.
* * *
Our history is our strength. And we must never forget that those who seek to minimize it are simply seeking to steal our power.
* * *
Thank you – for choosing to confront the ugliness of our past without fear, the hardship of our present without hesitation, and to move the earth by the power of your own will. Elevate, Wes
---
| Wes Moore is a combat veteran, Rhodes Scholar, former small business owner and leader of one of the nation’s largest poverty-fighting organizations — and now, your Governor! Thanks to supporters like you, we made history by electing Wes the 63rd Governor of Maryland. Support Wes as he works to move our state forward and leave no one behind.
---

# 🇺🇸 Remembering our Heroes on Memorial Day 🇺🇸
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012J8o9BGtngtzC9NglVnh20fUVH07p0VXB2_R8t1kBxuOtk19m4k_Buqk3G53kkfKQIbM--60oKHgFcZDaK-3M1cmel7ET1eDasx_6Vqi0JN-qQwgh4SxB5BgETnMGwQ0E4Cx10o-Qh8zLrnfJa81vQ==&c=gC9EwgOd2IaqVu99m5HAUsvLHc7-VEQezpjwbKAxmY1KOQoyWftCsQ==&ch=2vaqdyzyD9eacBXqSPuyhuO6MNAgyOHfB1xZtk4juHtbAlA9Z7vFvA==)
---
| Today, as we gather with family and friends, let us take a moment to remember and honor the brave men and women who made the ultimate sacrifice to protect the freedom we hold dear. On this Memorial Day, we pay tribute to those who selflessly gave their lives in service to our great nation.
They were ordinary people who did extraordinary things. They were sons and daughters, brothers and sisters, fathers and mothers, and friends. They hailed from different backgrounds and walks of life, but they shared a common bond--a deep love for our country and an unwavering commitment to safeguarding the values and principles we hold sacred.
Their sacrifices remind us of the true cost of freedom. They fought valiantly on distant shores, in the air, and on the seas, often enduring unimaginable hardships. They fought for a cause greater than themselves, protecting the rights and liberties we often take for granted. Their legacy lives on in the fabric of our nation, inspiring us to strive for a better, more united America.
Today, we extend our gratitude to every fallen hero, from the brave soldiers who fought in the Revolutionary War to the courageous men and women who served in recent conflicts. We honor their memory by cherishing the freedoms they fought to defend and by supporting the veterans who returned home, forever changed by their experiences.
Let us also remember the families left behind, who bear the weight of their loved one's absence every day. They, too, deserve our gratitude and support. Their sacrifice should never be forgotten.
On this Memorial Day, let us unite as a nation and stand together in solemn remembrance. Let us pause to reflect on the extraordinary courage displayed by our fallen heroes and renew our commitment to upholding the values they fought to protect.
As we enjoy this day, let us also educate the next generation about the significance of Memorial Day, instilling in them a deep appreciation for the sacrifices made by those who came before us. By passing down this knowledge, we ensure that the memories of our fallen heroes remain etched in the hearts and minds of future generations.
Today, we remember, we honor, and we give thanks to those who made the ultimate sacrifice. May their bravery and devotion never be forgotten.
Respectfully yours,

---
|
---
| |
---
| |
---

clean_body: Memorial Day 2023 | | | | == | | == | == | | | 🇺🇸 Remembering our Heroes on Memorial Day 🇺🇸 | == | Today, as we gather with family and friends, let us take a moment to remember and honor the brave men and women who made the ultimate sacrifice to protect the freedom we hold dear. On this Memorial Day, we pay tribute to those who selflessly gave their lives in service to our great nation. They were ordinary people who did extraordinary things. They were sons and daughters, brothers and sisters, fathers and mothers, and friends. They hailed from different backgrounds and walks of life, but they shared a common bond--a deep love for our country and an unwavering commitment to safeguarding the values and principles we hold sacred. Their sacrifices remind us of the true cost of freedom. They fought valiantly on distant shores, in the air, and on the seas, often enduring unimaginable hardships. They fought for a cause greater than themselves, protecting the rights and liberties we often take for granted. Their legacy lives on in the fabric of our nation, inspiring us to strive for a better, more united America. Today, we extend our gratitude to every fallen hero, from the brave soldiers who fought in the Revolutionary War to the courageous men and women who served in recent conflicts. We honor their memory by cherishing the freedoms they fought to defend and by supporting the veterans who returned home, forever changed by their experiences. Let us also remember the families left behind, who bear the weight of their loved one's absence every day. They, too, deserve our gratitude and support. Their sacrifice should never be forgotten. On this Memorial Day, let us unite as a nation and stand together in solemn remembrance. Let us pause to reflect on the extraordinary courage displayed by our fallen heroes and renew our commitment to upholding the values they fought to protect. As we enjoy this day, let us also educate the next generation about the significance of Memorial Day, instilling in them a deep appreciation for the sacrifices made by those who came before us. By passing down this knowledge, we ensure that the memories of our fallen heroes remain etched in the hearts and minds of future generations. Today, we remember, we honor, and we give thanks to those who made the ultimate sacrifice. May their bravery and devotion never be forgotten. Respectfully yours, | | | | | | == | == 248 Route 25A, Suite 5 East Setauket, NY 11733 (631) 762-3410 | mailto:TeamFig@anthonyfigliola.com | == == == == | | | | | | | www.AnthonyFigliola.com | 248 Route 25A, Suite 5, 6317623410, East Setauket, NY 11733 631-762-3410 | | Sent by mailto:teamfig@anthonyfigliola.com in collaboration with

body:
The Party Line — An Indiana Republican Party Newsletter
| | |
---
|
---
# _Default Democrats_
---
President Biden has already attempted to distance himself from a potential debt default, claiming that he has "done [his] part" and would be "blameless" if a deal isn't reached in time. This weekend, he's leaving Washington, D.C. Yes, really. For more than 100 days he ignored calls from Speaker McCarthy to begin negotiations on a reasonable and responsible debt limit increase. And it wasn't until House Republicans took action and passed the Limit, Save, Grow Act, which avoids default, grows the economy, and most importantly, limits government spending, that he finally decided to come to the table. But that's his leadership style for you — ignore a problem until it becomes a crisis, rinse, and repeat. It's no secret that Washington, D.C., has a spending problem. And despite his numerous false claims that he's lowered the debt, President Biden and Democrats have already added nearly $6 trillion to it. That spending spree sent inflation soaring, causing hardship for far too many, and has put our nation on an unsustainable financial path. That's why 60% of Americans say Congress should only raise the debt ceiling if it cuts spending at the same time. Democrats can continue to throw around made-up numbers, debunked claims about Social Security and Medicare, and veterans benefits or they can get serious. If not, they'll earn the new nickname of Default Democrats. Enjoy this week's newsletter, and this Memorial Day Weekend, please join me in praying for the fallen, their families, their loved ones, and for our great country. Sincerely,
---
---
Chairman Kyle Hupfer
---
|
---
**Forwarded this newsletter from a friend?[Sign up for The Party Line here.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/9a242b99081b6d8a/e0a8f237f5dd973ac3d6b838967d376c/40313)**
---
|
---
| |
# **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
| |
# _Ceremonially Signing_
---
| |
---
_**Governor Eric Holcomb** poses for a photo after ceremonially signing HEAs 1492._**
---
This week, **Governor Eric Holcomb** ceremonially signed over 50 bills from the 2023 legislative session.
* "Each signing was a reminder of all the good that came out of the session this year," said **Gov. Holcomb**.
* Some signings featured a special four-legged friend, Yuki.

**Fresh ink:** **Gov. Holcomb** was joined by **State Rep. Wendy McNamara** and **State Sen. Mike Crider** for the ceremonially signing of HEA 1492, pictured above.
* A part of **Gov. Holcomb's** 2023 Next Level Agenda, HEA 1492 expands Indiana's matching grant program to help cover the costs of employing a school resource officer and increasing building security, among other items.
* Now, more projects will be eligible to be covered by the grant program, including digital mapping of school floor plans to help first responders, multi-disciplinary threat assessments, and technology to detect fire, chemical, visual, and audible threats.

---
|
---
| | **More:** Today, **Gov. Holcomb** will participate in the Gold Star Ceremony and The American Legion 500 Festival Memorial Service at the Indiana War Memorial.
---
|
---
# _Register for Our 2023 Municipal Candidate Training_
---
---
Our 2023 municipal candidate training —**** IN IT TO WIN: Victory in Indiana's Cities & Towns — **is fast approaching!** **Details:** The training will be held on**** Saturday, June 10, 2023,**** at the University of Indianapolis. **What to expect: **This one-day session will include breakout sessions with industry experts and consultants on all things grassroots, finance, and communications, to give candidates and their campaigns the winning edge for November.

* Breakout sessions include: Door to door and phone app training, one on one media training, communications and messaging, campaign finance and fundraising, digital advertising, and discussions on various municipal issues, **and more!**

**Take action:** [Register](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/9a242b99081b6d8a/b05fffa036085062c3d6b838967d376c/40313) for $100 and [see more details](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/9a242b99081b6d8a/56bc8b6051859614c3d6b838967d376c/40313).
---
|
---
# _Congressman Yakym Presides Over House Floor_
---
---
On Monday, **Congressman Rudy Yakym (IN-02)** presided over the floor of the U.S. House for the first time. **What they're saying: Congressman Yakym** took to social media to thank those that sent him to D.C.
* "Today I had the honor of presiding over the U.S. House floor for the very first time," he said. "Thank you [#IN02](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/9a242b99081b6d8a/c71462898c02317ec3d6b838967d376c/40313) for giving me the privilege to serve and represent you in the People’s House!"

---
|
---
# _Goss-Reaves Wins Caucus for House District 31 Seat_
---
Yesterday, **Lori Goss-Reaves** won the caucus to fill the vacancy in the office of State Representative for District 31, created by the resignation of **Ann Vermilion** shortly after the conclusion of the 2023 legislative session. **What they're saying: Lori** gave brief remarks after the results were tallied.
* "Thank you for this opportunity," said **Goss-Reaves**. "I will do my very best to serve you well."
* "Lori will be a strong voice for the 31st District, and we look forward to her joining the rest of the Republican caucus at the statehouse to continue the work of delivering results for all Hoosiers," said **Chairman Kyle Hupfer**

**(Re)Watch:** You can watch the caucus proceedings on our [Facebook page](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/9a242b99081b6d8a/f90ad05d81eedca8c3d6b838967d376c/40313).
---

* Or lounge in our [crewneck](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/9a242b99081b6d8a/dbb2cdc8a3ddcd65c3d6b838967d376c/40313) on a cool summer night.

# _Session Spotlight: SEA 1_
---
This session, there were 252 bills passed by the legislature and signed by **Gov. Holcomb**. Over the next several weeks, this section will be dedicated to highlighting some of those bills. **The bill:** SEA 1 (behavioral health matters), signed May 4, 2023. **The details:** SEA 1, together with the state budget, provides ongoing funding to build out a system of certified behavioral health clinics, establishing the next step for improving Indiana's mental health care system.
* This legislation follows the implementation of the 9-8-8 National Suicide and Crisis Line last year.
* SEA 1 will help Indiana improve access to mental-health services and infrastructure, ensuring Hoosiers have access to the resources they need.

---
|
---
# _The Latest from FactCheckBiden.com_
---
Biden has absurdly claimed that he would be “[blameless](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/9a242b99081b6d8a/6d183234f8121829c3d6b838967d376c/40313)” if the U.S. defaulted on its debt. **The facts:** Desperate to shift responsibility from his own failures, Biden attempted to blame Republicans – despite House Republicans being the only ones who have taken responsible action and [passed](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/9a242b99081b6d8a/85bf3c32ec5bb693c3d6b838967d376c/40313) a debt limit increase.
* Biden hypocritically refused to negotiate for 100 days.
* **See this[timeline graphic](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/9a242b99081b6d8a/65451e583a09ff18c3d6b838967d376c/40313) from Speaker McCarthy.**
* House Republicans passed a responsible debt limit increase. Biden hasn’t, and nor have Senate Democrats.
* What’s worse, Biden is caving to the far-left of his party, refusing [commonsense](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/9a242b99081b6d8a/608b5999674cb0f2c3d6b838967d376c/40313) proposals he has [supported](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/9a242b99081b6d8a/c744f93fabf95dc0c3d6b838967d376c/40313) and [applauded](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/9a242b99081b6d8a/626adbffac6a7399c3d6b838967d376c/40313) in the past while absurdly wanting to [spend more this year than last](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/9a242b99081b6d8a/d766f9448d85f62bc3d6b838967d376c/40313).

"Thank you for giving me the privilege to serve and represent you in the People’s House!" | Goss-Reaves Wins Caucus for House District 31 Seat Yesterday, Lori Goss-Reaves won the caucus to fill the vacancy in the office of State Representative for District 31, created by the resignation of Ann Vermilion shortly after the conclusion of the 2023 legislative session. What they're saying: Lori gave brief remarks after the results were tallied. "Thank you for this opportunity," said Goss-Reaves. "I will do my very best to serve you well." "Lori will be a strong voice for the 31st District, and we look forward to her joining the rest of the Republican caucus at the statehouse to continue the work of delivering results for all Hoosiers," said Chairman Kyle Hupfer (Re)Watch: You can watch the caucus proceedings on our . | Shop the New 'Hoosier Republican' Collection There's merchandise on our online store! What's new: Show off your pride in our latest gear with shirts, can coolers, and bumper stickers inspired by the seal of Indiana. Or lounge in our on a cool summer night. Don't forget: There's on our store. Including a guaranteed to help you win the front nine a supermajority of the time. | Session Spotlight: SEA 1 This session, there were 252 bills passed by the legislature and signed by Gov. Holcomb. Over the next several weeks, this section will be dedicated to highlighting some of those bills. The bill: SEA 1 (behavioral health matters), signed May 4, 2023. The details: SEA 1, together with the state budget, provides ongoing funding to build out a system of certified behavioral health clinics, establishing the next step for improving Indiana's mental health care system. This legislation follows the implementation of the 9-8-8 National Suicide and Crisis Line last year. SEA 1 will help Indiana improve access to mental-health services and infrastructure, ensuring Hoosiers have access to the resources they need. | The Latest from FactCheckBiden.com Biden has absurdly claimed that he would be “” if the U.S. defaulted on its debt. The facts: Desperate to shift responsibility from his own failures, Biden attempted to blame Republicans – despite House Republicans being the only ones who have taken responsible action and a debt limit increase. Biden hypocritically refused to negotiate for 100 days. See this from Speaker McCarthy. House Republicans passed a responsible debt limit increase. Biden hasn’t, and nor have Senate Democrats. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Republicans are gonna use the debt ceiling to take your Social Security. They've always wanted to rip away your Social Security.
body:
Protect Social Security in the debt ceiling fight
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5b1ef378-cf6c-49fe-9ad2-5c5b63832f7f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [**Republicans are gonna use the debt ceiling to take your Social Security. They've always wanted to rip away your Social Security.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T53fcce69-2d37-43ba-8a9d-60bbe1fa07cc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Former Republican House Speaker, Paul Ryan, had a plan to dismantle Social Security. Had he succeeded, it would've become a stock gamble, with Congress corporations playing with inside information._ **_Now, we are confronted with this reckless and vicious ploy by Speaker McC...Taylor Greene to threaten the world economy and plunge us into recession by defaulting on our debt._** _The Washington Post wrote "U.S. debt defaults could hit Social Security payments first", while CNBC laid out the dangerous financial repercussions clearly:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb6eee466-4fc9-4cb5-9d92-00a0cedca335/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) But to Republicans stuffing their pockets with lobbyist cash, whether you can pay the rent, or eat dinner, is a political game. It's who the are. **_Social Security Works, in the most effective campaign I've witnessed, took apart GOP efforts to cut Social Security by using the debt ceiling a decade ago. They've been on the front lines a long time. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. I’ve led our state through tough times – the pandemic, climate emergencies, the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ , and more. And one thing I’ve learned is that smart, determined leadership matters. That’s why we’re wasting no time to pass good legislation that will help the people of Michigan.

We flipped both chambers – it’s only happened four times in 130 years in Michigan. And with that comes an immense responsibility to show that when Democrats lead, we make people’s lives better.

Just this year, we’ve been able to cut costs for hard-working Michiganders and put money back into their pockets, reaffirm and defend the right to abortion, expand worker’s rights and LGBTQ+ rights, make progress on gun safety legislation, and so much more.

**_We’ve done all of this with your support, and we’re not stopping our progress now._**

**[If you’re ready to help keep our progress going and move Michigan forward, I’m asking you to pitch in $5 today to defend and expand our majorities in the House and Senate. name: Dan Goldman
subject: Republicans’ cop-out vote on George Santos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
Every New York Republican voted to protect George Santos. |
#
---
Peter, Last week, I was eager to vote to expel Rep. George Santos from Congress after he was indicted on 13 criminal counts related to his suspicious campaign finance disclosures and his scheme to defraud the voters of New York’s 3rd Congressional District. **But Republicans voted to kill the motion by referring it to the Ethics Committee — where it had already been referred to. Every Republican member from New York voted to support George Santos, showing exactly where they stand.** That includes New York Rep. Brandon Williams (R, NY-22), who has repeatedly said George Santos “must resign.” It includes New York Rep. Mike Lawler (R, NY-17), who in January said that Santos “lost the confidence and support of his party.” And it also includes New York Rep. Anthony D’Esposito (R, NY-4), who said _on the House floor_ ahead of the vote that he supports expelling George Santos from Congress — right before voting _against_ expelling him. Republicans talk a good game, but when push came to shove, they voted with George Santos. It is clear that maintaining their razor-thin majority in the House is more important than getting rid of a complete liar and fraud like Santos. And the New York Republicans are just like the rest of them. How do we know? **Because George Santos hand-delivered personal ‘thank-you’ notes to his Republican colleagues who voted to keep him in office!** **[It was the one of the most glaring examples of Republican hypocrisy I’ve seen in Congress so far — and it’s yet another reason why I’m going all-in to win back New York for Democrats and flip the House blue in 2024. Kevin McCarthy and House Republicans might think that their cop-out vote on George Santos’ expulsion will somehow be overlooked. But New Yorkers can see right through this — and we know that we must elect Democrats in 2024 if we want truth-tellers in Congress who will put people above politics.
Thanks for chipping in to support our work today.

But New Yorkers can see right through this — and we know that we must elect Democrats in 2024 if we want truth-tellers in Congress who will put people above politics. Thanks for chipping in to support our work today. — Dan Dan Goldman for New York PO BOX 3306 New York, NY 10008 United States | mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com | Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ron=20DeSantis?=
subject: battle plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Let’s put the rumors to rest once and for all. | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=debf201bec&e=84ee529f47)
---
Friend,

It's official: I'M IN.

**I'm running for President of the United States.**
---
| | [JOIN ME](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=f07b89a532&e=84ee529f47)
---
Have you ever noticed how often Joe Biden tries to take potshots at Florida?

It’s because he HATES what we’re doing in the Sunshine State.

While he pushes the woke agenda, we’re fighting back with freedom.

Joe Biden is taking the country in the wrong direction. But I know I can turn it around.

The American people know it, too. That’s why they are ALREADY voting with their feet. Our population is booming in the free state of Florida.

Now, I want to put that choice on the ballot—but I need your support. ****
---
| [](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=2940b5c805&e=84ee529f47)
---
We sometimes take freedom for granted. You should not do that after the last few years. It is contested, and we have seen it wither on the vine in many places in our country.

But Florida was different. We chose facts over fear. We chose education over indoctrination. We chose law and order over rioting and disorder. Florida was a refuge of sanity when the world went mad.

We held the line when freedom hung in the balance.

We showed that we can — and must — revitalize America.

**I believe freedom is worth fighting for, and as your next President I promise I will never stop fighting for your freedom.** **[Will you fight alongside me?](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=158bcb6346&e=84ee529f47 "Will you fight alongside me?")**
---
| | [YES, I’M READY TO WIN](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=7593e7148a&e=84ee529f47)
---
And we can win.

I'll make sure we have an economy that works for working families, a secure border that works for our nation, and so much more. The battle won’t be easy and will require a lot of toil and sweat to get it all done. I’m excited to share my agenda for America with you over the course of this campaign.

**But here’s why I’m writing you today:[I want to ask you to become a Launch Day Donor to my presidential campaign and join our first team tele-townhall.](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=757cb0f737&e=84ee529f47 "I want to ask you to become a Launch Day Donor to my presidential campaign and join our first Team Teletownhall.")**

I promise you, unlike other campaigns, our grassroots fundraising program is built on the principle that our donors are a part of our team, not our personal piggybank.

**_[I vow to treat you with respect: No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=2792b76111&e=84ee529f47 "I vow to treat you with respect: No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.")_**

Can I count on you?
---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=68ced57152&e=84ee529f47)
---
| [](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=62094d023f&e=84ee529f47)
---
In Freedom,

Ron DeSantis
---
_P.S I want to show you my appreciation for standing with me from Day 1 of this campaign. It’s why my team prepared gifts to thank our Day 1 donors.

If you chip in $47 by midnight on 5/25, we’ll send you a limited-edition Day 1 membership card and an invite to our first-ever team tele-townhall.

Make sure you get yours now at this secure link: **[https://dsnts.com/aexHpu](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=d17e119016&e=84ee529f47)**_
---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=11fd0f39da&e=84ee529f47)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America’s veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Democrats Keep Lying
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAN CRENSHAW FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_KOJSzfNu1IxJm_Br6QmHwFOujYd5sCg4U6iLidgzsgovCeUo08zpR3b01K9JwTW7IANn4fWIBe5OUZVR_-TbvBainW7MfEMrqf8xOeRME8AgIRx80-pOCfyRa5Z42p5BNohB6NVCrp2JG3txpqZBLy-ZvfTnpv45GtIxkHFZVgHY7HQZrzUFPB09gYVa9nzPseHY3yCFl_ACeJP9NRP4aF-Fau8c0089WbAnOTRdQzkGua35Pxev2aCCvBMJujfnH_g3CB32WTyDBU2FWbKJupfvKNl3ZWHv5P7U5eSMQGEAQjI6xCkjP4Kuu8jVMCyj1EHm6F1hYtV-OYLvMpxFQ==&c=9uSIQPhqEnROBtiCceHuXKptIoCeXadYRoDAB7c8QL7An3IZwO8ajg==&ch=K_RxRN8VB5q3edIrAjqMVZd3eVa1Np4Hngb2uP6EF74KnOmTSxnYnQ==)
---
|
Peter –
This week, I continued to debunk the lies Democrats are spreading about the debt ceiling. I also detailed my plans to combat the Mexican drug cartels and explained why I called out a highly-regarded medical institution in Texas for their position on "transgender care" for minors.
As always, thank you for your support. Now, here's your brief:
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| WHEN DEMS ARE LOSING, THEY LIE
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_KOJSzfNu1IxJm_Br6QmHwFOujYd5sCg4U6iLidgzsgovCeUo08zpa-kexashWDADHO7sHxQrCRu15aVKxhsTMsKKpxrVpyFJYaKuLEtrWU-BQqSgVXSNx8ALCYfIdswnGb2Tm4xewbS0bioGORaa6ewLLVOIByPq9RBiJ-ujVI=&c=9uSIQPhqEnROBtiCceHuXKptIoCeXadYRoDAB7c8QL7An3IZwO8ajg==&ch=K_RxRN8VB5q3edIrAjqMVZd3eVa1Np4Hngb2uP6EF74KnOmTSxnYnQ==)
---
| [CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO WATCH](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_KOJSzfNu1IxJm_Br6QmHwFOujYd5sCg4U6iLidgzsgovCeUo08zpa-kexashWDADHO7sHxQrCRu15aVKxhsTMsKKpxrVpyFJYaKuLEtrWU-BQqSgVXSNx8ALCYfIdswnGb2Tm4xewbS0bioGORaa6ewLLVOIByPq9RBiJ-ujVI=&c=9uSIQPhqEnROBtiCceHuXKptIoCeXadYRoDAB7c8QL7An3IZwO8ajg==&ch=K_RxRN8VB5q3edIrAjqMVZd3eVa1Np4Hngb2uP6EF74KnOmTSxnYnQ==)
---
| |
---
| Democrats are really mad they are losing the messaging battle over the debt ceiling. Even CNN had a poll that found 60% of Americans agree with the Republican position in the negotiations--that increasing the debt ceiling must be paired with commonsense spending cuts.
The left is channeling that anger by doing what they always do: lie about everything. Their lies about the debt ceiling are more egregious than usual. Democrats claim Republicans passed a bill that would cause a default--they label our bill the "Default on America Act." The only problem with that? House Republicans are the only ones in Washington who RAISED THE DEBT CEILING. We did it last month with a bill called the Limit, Save, Grow Act. Our bill raises the debt ceiling while reducing spending, making it easier to boost energy production here in America, and preventing abuse of our welfare programs. That bill has been sitting in the Democrat-controlled Senate for a month while we inch closer to a default.
Joe Biden waited 100 days to even negotiate with Republicans on this issue. And since then, the only counter offer Democrats have proposed is RAISING TAXES. This is after they already enacted billions in tax increases just last year.
Democrats are lying about these negotiations, their position is deeply unpopular with the American people, and they are the only ones to blame if we default. Don't fall for their lies.
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| MY PLAN TO GO AFTER THE DRUG CARTELS
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_KOJSzfNu1IxJm_Br6QmHwFOujYd5sCg4U6iLidgzsgovCeUo08zpa-kexashWDA9kEjSTge5At-ak9uMKsmIRm6pRSolV2B8WthY-qqKz1W3rZ3ltcrIMwBTO3M2gf1BI02khTQMBNx3FmEF1DES9bYzj4uctrYQiY1BcXYkBY=&c=9uSIQPhqEnROBtiCceHuXKptIoCeXadYRoDAB7c8QL7An3IZwO8ajg==&ch=K_RxRN8VB5q3edIrAjqMVZd3eVa1Np4Hngb2uP6EF74KnOmTSxnYnQ==)
---
| [CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO WATCH](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_KOJSzfNu1IxJm_Br6QmHwFOujYd5sCg4U6iLidgzsgovCeUo08zpa-kexashWDA9kEjSTge5At-ak9uMKsmIRm6pRSolV2B8WthY-qqKz1W3rZ3ltcrIMwBTO3M2gf1BI02khTQMBNx3FmEF1DES9bYzj4uctrYQiY1BcXYkBY=&c=9uSIQPhqEnROBtiCceHuXKptIoCeXadYRoDAB7c8QL7An3IZwO8ajg==&ch=K_RxRN8VB5q3edIrAjqMVZd3eVa1Np4Hngb2uP6EF74KnOmTSxnYnQ==)
---
| |
---
| The Mexican drug cartels have control over our southern border and facilitate and take advantage of our border crisis. Migrants cannot illegally cross into our country without going through and paying the drug cartels first. The drug cartels make billions off our border crisis, and then use that money to fund their fentanyl business which kills tens of thousands of our fellow citizens every year. We need to take action to stop this.
Thankfully, House Republicans are taking this threat seriously by creating a new cartel task force in Congress that I will lead. This task force will be the focal point for all legislation to target these transnational criminal organizations. Here are some of the solutions I've personally put forth to neutralize this threat:

* Authorize military force against the drug cartels.
* Increase criminal penalties against anyone who acts as part of or on behalf of the cartels.
* Target cartel finances and use the money we seize to fund border security efforts.
* Penalize Mexican officials who facilitate or ignore the cartel threat.
* Terminate foreign assistance to countries that don't take action against the cartels (Mexico is a prime example).

These are just several examples of what we can do to stop the cartels from threatening our safety and sovereignty. Other members of Congress have proposed serious solutions to tackle this threat as well, and I look forward to working on a comprehensive legislative package that shows the American people we have a plan to stop the Mexican drug cartels.
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| WE NEED TO PROTECT CHILDREN FROM "TRANSGENDER CARE"
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_KOJSzfNu1IxJm_Br6QmHwFOujYd5sCg4U6iLidgzsgovCeUo08zpa-kexashWDA4HUYyL23OvNLbn5nr8DjYD6N5fw0H3ZHOb3FiSi7iObjw0-Md1Z8uzIWSynmsFKuKjs-fdQMFaTUPnfar2pJSOglQAEz7VKAFQxdYQv6p9gA9aq-LfCcN1N-zO1Fz_gYhl4q91CClD8lCFSY86D2_dr9-W5X3Vavrkq_YAiFnIZh1qfF-PLEvm5L4CKTVRQZau8lGQ8KwySubD5HKxGMeQ==&c=9uSIQPhqEnROBtiCceHuXKptIoCeXadYRoDAB7c8QL7An3IZwO8ajg==&ch=K_RxRN8VB5q3edIrAjqMVZd3eVa1Np4Hngb2uP6EF74KnOmTSxnYnQ==)
---
| [CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO READ THE ARTICLE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_KOJSzfNu1IxJm_Br6QmHwFOujYd5sCg4U6iLidgzsgovCeUo08zpa-kexashWDA4HUYyL23OvNLbn5nr8DjYD6N5fw0H3ZHOb3FiSi7iObjw0-Md1Z8uzIWSynmsFKuKjs-fdQMFaTUPnfar2pJSOglQAEz7VKAFQxdYQv6p9gA9aq-LfCcN1N-zO1Fz_gYhl4q91CClD8lCFSY86D2_dr9-W5X3Vavrkq_YAiFnIZh1qfF-PLEvm5L4CKTVRQZau8lGQ8KwySubD5HKxGMeQ==&c=9uSIQPhqEnROBtiCceHuXKptIoCeXadYRoDAB7c8QL7An3IZwO8ajg==&ch=K_RxRN8VB5q3edIrAjqMVZd3eVa1Np4Hngb2uP6EF74KnOmTSxnYnQ==)
---
| |
---
| The leadership of Texas Children's Hospital responded to the Texas legislature's ban on "transgender care" for minors by saying it was "heart-wrenching" they would no longer be able to provide "high-quality" hormone "therapy" for minors.
This is extremely disappointing rhetoric coming from one of the best medical institutions in the country. Frankly I'm angry I even have to make a statement about this, but I feel the need to speak out strongly about this because it impacts the health of our children.
Texas Children's Hospital has continuously provided exceptional, advanced care. I've worked with them closely in the past and they are staffed with good, professional practitioners. Unfortunately, their leadership has adopted an ideology that is unscientific and dangerous--providing "gender-affirming" care to MINORS. Maybe they were pressured to do so by outside actors or woke activists within their organization. Either way, this ideology has no place in an institution like Texas Children's.
At least 16 states have restricted or banned gender surgery for minors, with the Texas legislature recently passing a bill to become the largest state to ban "gender-affirming health care" for minors. This includes hormone therapies, puberty blockers, and surgeries for children under 18 in the state. The timing of the bill's passage coincided with news reports about Texas Children's Hospital's use of hormone therapy for minors, and child welfare investigations into parents who supported "gender-affirming care" for their children.
Children under 18 are not legally able to smoke, drink, or get a tattoo. We can't expect them to understand the consequences of life-altering decisions like attempting to change their biological sex. Responsible parents should stop their children from going down this dangerous path before it even gets to a serious discussion about permanently altering the physiology of their kids. When parents fail to do this, it's up to doctors to honor their Hippocratic oath to DO NO HARM and refuse to participate in what amounts to a pseudoscientific, pathological social trend with irreversible ramifications.
It's sad to see that this ideology has infiltrated even the most highly respected medical institutions, but I'm proud to see that the Texas legislature is taking a stand against it and that Governor Abbott said he will sign the bill. Texas Children's Hospital can save their reputation for world-class care that took them years to build if they simply have the courage to own up to their mistake. It's not too late.
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| ON SOCIAL MEDIA
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_KOJSzfNu1IxJm_Br6QmHwFOujYd5sCg4U6iLidgzsgovCeUo08zpa-kexashWDANRSSynD64AjXON4CuNzJG-bXmolrqJakZxi6uzEmVVuzrqFXJqn6XRDb6vpaMtDvvILqL0KO7Fa_fcKdwfkbbR_ZR8Cwxz4JS-IHCyu36xNnxij4ywTTT2VK09jfWCY-vf9ubzjr5cA=&c=9uSIQPhqEnROBtiCceHuXKptIoCeXadYRoDAB7c8QL7An3IZwO8ajg==&ch=K_RxRN8VB5q3edIrAjqMVZd3eVa1Np4Hngb2uP6EF74KnOmTSxnYnQ==)
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | == | Peter – This week, I continued to debunk the lies Democrats are spreading about the debt ceiling. I also detailed my plans to combat the Mexican drug cartels and explained why I called out a highly-regarded medical institution in Texas for their position on "transgender care" for minors. As always, thank you for your support. Now, here's your brief: | | | | | | | | WHEN DEMS ARE LOSING, THEY LIE | | | == | == | | | Democrats are really mad they are losing the messaging battle over the debt ceiling. Even CNN had a poll that found 60% of Americans agree with the Republican position in the negotiations--that increasing the debt ceiling must be paired with commonsense spending cuts. The left is channeling that anger by doing what they always do: lie about everything. Their lies about the debt ceiling are more egregious than usual. Democrats claim Republicans passed a bill that would cause a default--they label our bill the "Default on America Act." The only problem with that? House Republicans are the only ones in Washington who RAISED THE DEBT CEILING. We did it last month with a bill called the Limit, Save, Grow Act. Our bill raises the debt ceiling while reducing spending, making it easier to boost energy production here in America, and preventing abuse of our welfare programs. That bill has been sitting in the Democrat-controlled Senate for a month while we inch closer to a default. Joe Biden waited 100 days to even negotiate with Republicans on this issue. And since then, the only counter offer Democrats have proposed is RAISING TAXES. This is after they already enacted billions in tax increases just last year. Democrats are lying about these negotiations, their position is deeply unpopular with the American people, and they are the only ones to blame if we default. Don't fall for their lies. | | | | | | | | MY PLAN TO GO AFTER THE DRUG CARTELS | == | == | | | The Mexican drug cartels have control over our southern border and facilitate and take advantage of our border crisis. Migrants cannot illegally cross into our country without going through and paying the drug cartels first. The drug cartels make billions off our border crisis, and then use that money to fund their fentanyl business which kills tens of thousands of our fellow citizens every year. We need to take action to stop this. Thankfully, House Republicans are taking this threat seriously by creating a new cartel task force in Congress that I will lead. This task force will be the focal point for all legislation to target these transnational criminal organizations. Here are some of the solutions I've personally put forth to neutralize this threat: Authorize military force against the drug cartels. Increase criminal penalties against anyone who acts as part of or on behalf of the cartels. Target cartel finances and use the money we seize to fund border security efforts. Penalize Mexican officials who facilitate or ignore the cartel threat. * Terminate foreign assistance to countries that don't take action against the cartels (Mexico is a prime example). These are just several examples of what we can do to stop the cartels from threatening our safety and sovereignty. Other members of Congress have proposed serious solutions to tackle this threat as well, and I look forward to working on a comprehensive legislative package that shows the American people we have a plan to stop the Mexican drug cartels. | | | | | | | | | | WE NEED TO PROTECT CHILDREN FROM "TRANSGENDER CARE" | | | == | == | | | The leadership of Texas Children's Hospital responded to the Texas legislature's ban on "transgender care" for minors by saying it was "heart-wrenching" they would no longer be able to provide "high-quality" hormone "therapy" for minors. This is extremely disappointing rhetoric coming from one of the best medical institutions in the country. Frankly I'm angry I even have to make a statement about this, but I feel the need to speak out strongly about this because it impacts the health of our children. Texas Children's Hospital has continuously provided exceptional, advanced care. I've worked with them closely in the past and they are staffed with good, professional practitioners. Unfortunately, their leadership has adopted an ideology that is unscientific and dangerous--providing "gender-affirming" care to MINORS. Maybe they were pressured to do so by outside actors or woke activists within their organization. Either way, this ideology has no place in an institution like Texas Children's. At least 16 states have restricted or banned gender surgery for minors, with the Texas legislature recently passing a bill to become the largest state to ban "gender-affirming health care" for minors. This includes hormone therapies, puberty blockers, and surgeries for children under 18 in the state. The timing of the bill's passage coincided with news reports about Texas Children's Hospital's use of hormone therapy for minors, and child welfare investigations into parents who supported "gender-affirming care" for their children. Children under 18 are not legally able to smoke, drink, or get a tattoo. We can't expect them to understand the consequences of life-altering decisions like attempting to change their biological sex. Responsible parents should stop their children from going down this dangerous path before it even gets to a serious discussion about permanently altering the physiology of their kids. When parents fail to do this, it's up to doctors to honor their Hippocratic oath to DO NO HARM and refuse to participate in what amounts to a pseudoscientific, pathological social trend with irreversible ramifications. It's sad to see that this ideology has infiltrated even the most highly respected medical institutions, but I'm proud to see that the Texas legislature is taking a stand against it and that Governor Abbott said he will sign the bill. Texas Children's Hospital can save their reputation for world-class care that took them years to build if they simply have the courage to own up to their mistake. It's not too late. | | | | | | | | ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | | == | == | == | == | | | | | | NEWS | WASHINGTON EXAMINER: == WSJ: == FOX NEWS: == | That's it for this week's campaign brief. Thanks for reading and your support. Have a great Memorial Day Weekend! Any questions, comments, or concerns? Team,
We’re just a few days away from the end of the month, so I’m reaching out to you directly with an important ask: can you help us raise $5,500 before midnight on May 31st? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2305-q2-wn-eom?refcode=230526-email]
I’ll be honest, the last few weeks in North Carolina have come with disappointing decisions from the NC Supreme Court and the General Assembly. We’ve seen our Republican leaders show their true colors, and now we know exactly what happens when far-right leaders get elected in our state. If they have it their way, they’ll keep fighting for voter suppression tactics that keep them in power for years to come.
We need all of the momentum we can possibly build to keep Wiley’s seat safe and flip the House back to blue .
The summer months are a notoriously difficult time to fundraise for campaigns , so we’re making our end-of-month goal aggressive in order to prepare. We can get it done, but we need your help to do it.
Can you rush in a $25 donation to help us end the month on a high and go into the summer season with the power we need? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2305-q2-wn-eom?refcode=230526-email&amount=25]
Thanks, friend.
Mariah Morgan

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Yeah, right.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
I'm going to keep doing everything in my power to stand up to these extremists and fight for the bold, systemic change we need to protect our democracy and our values.
| | | I first ran for office because I’d studied how the system was rigged against hardworking people, and I wanted to do something about it.

I’m running for re-election because while we’ve made tremendous progress together, we’ve still got some serious challenges ahead of us.

The governor of Idaho recently signed an extreme “abortion trafficking” bill into law — restricting residents from traveling for abortions in states where it's legal.

Two Black lawmakers in Tennessee were expelled from the state House for peacefully protesting against gun violence following a horrific mass shooting in Nashville.

Anti-LGBTQ+ legislation is popping up all over, threatening the right to health care, expression, and safety for trans, gender-nonconforming, and nonbinary people.

Our judiciary system has been hijacked by the far-right, and these institutions continue to give the public more and more reason to lose trust. The more recent examples? I could bring up how a federal judge in Texas ruled to reverse the FDA’s approval of mifepristone — one of the most common methods of abortion. Or, I could go with the recent revelation that Justice Clarence Thomas has been accepting undisclosed luxury trips and other favors from GOP megadonor Harlan Crow.

Look: I won’t sugarcoat what we’re up against. Our values and rights are under siege from powerful interests. The gun lobby. Anti-abortion radicals. Big Pharma. Fossil fuel giants. Right-wing extremists. All using their deep pockets to block change. All hoping that we’ll get so frustrated we just tune out. Yeah, right.

**[I’m going to keep doing everything in my power to stand up to these extremists and fight for the bold, systemic change we need to protect our democracy and our values. If you’re able to, please split a donation of $5 between me and the DSCC to help continue this fight and defend our Senate majority.](https://go.dscc.org/go/12679?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230526-ElizabethWarren-WarrenTandem2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230526-ElizabethWarren-WarrenTandem2-Pros-sl1&akid=10888%2E9716520%2EVNHa0Z)**

Big problems require big solutions, and I’m in this fight all the way.

But real change doesn't just happen because of decisions made in Washington. It happens because people all across the country get into the fight — pushing from the outside while elected officials work on the inside.

I'll keep up the fight in the Senate, but I'm counting on you to stay in the fight, too.

**[If you believe that our elected leaders should be taking right-wing extremists head on, please pitch in $5 to support my re-election campaign and the DSCC to fuel this fight. I’m so grateful for your support.](https://go.dscc.org/go/12679?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230526-ElizabethWarren-WarrenTandem2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230526-ElizabethWarren-WarrenTandem2-Pros-sl1&akid=10888%2E9716520%2EVNHa0Z)**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

Elizabeth Warren
U.S. Senator, Massachusetts

clean_body: I'm going to keep doing everything in my power to stand up to these extremists and fight for the bold, systemic change we need to protect our democracy and our values. | | | I first ran for office because I’d studied how the system was rigged against hardworking people, and I wanted to do something about it. I’m running for re-election because while we’ve made tremendous progress together, we’ve still got some serious challenges ahead of us. The governor of Idaho recently signed an extreme “abortion trafficking” bill into law — restricting residents from traveling for abortions in states where it's legal. Two Black lawmakers in Tennessee were expelled from the state House for peacefully protesting against gun violence following a horrific mass shooting in Nashville. Anti-LGBTQ+ legislation is popping up all over, threatening the right to health care, expression, and safety for trans, gender-nonconforming, and nonbinary people. Our judiciary system has been hijacked by the far-right, and these institutions continue to give the public more and more reason to lose trust. The more recent examples? I could bring up how a federal judge in Texas ruled to reverse the FDA’s approval of mifepristone — one of the most common methods of abortion. Or, I could go with the recent revelation that Justice Clarence Thomas has been accepting undisclosed luxury trips and other favors from GOP megadonor Harlan Crow. Look: I won’t sugarcoat what we’re up against. Our values and rights are under siege from powerful interests. The gun lobby. Anti-abortion radicals. Big Pharma. Fossil fuel giants. Right-wing extremists. All using their deep pockets to block change. All hoping that we’ll get so frustrated we just tune out. Yeah, right. Big problems require big solutions, and I’m in this fight all the way. But real change doesn't just happen because of decisions made in Washington. It happens because people all across the country get into the fight — pushing from the outside while elected officials work on the inside. I'll keep up the fight in the Senate, but I'm counting on you to stay in the fight, too. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth Elizabeth Warren U.S. Senator, Massachusetts | | The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please . to receive fewer emails. to unsubscribe. | | My daughter Alex always tells me, “Mom, you use WAY too many emojis!” I can admit that I’m generous with my emojis, but they help me get my point across! There’s nothing wrong with being a little “extra,” whether it’s with emojis or with big ideas that seem a little out of left field at first. But my attitude is always to aim high and work out the kinks along the way. Small steps are important, but sometimes it takes a leap of faith to get where you want to go. **That’s how we increased access to healthcare , made historic investments in education , and navigated a major public health crisis in just ten years.** I’m so proud of all we’ve achieved, and I can’t wait to bring that positive energy to the U.S. Senate on behalf of Marylanders. name: Our Time To Run Team
subject: Honor those who served before your with YOUR service in elected office today.
body:
And get the expert advice you need FREE for 20 days with Our Time To Run!
| | [ ](https://nje015.keap-link001.com/v2/click/48b1756810f578173249303797b130c0/eJyNj00LgkAQQP_LnCW1rGhvESKL5iHqHKIDbensso5JiP-97YNOBV1n3rzhDcBIBbGsQACdMQjn4IHFUhmFxBtNXJTPbTSbLgIPakWXxOrOgBi-3n6Ax3i18oBvBh2w3603qcyTYybz1HGmsO7BX5YwWETL8GOKt2uZwTj-VGOjOL46ewuCbYePoEq5KD7Y2vEnZtMK3-_7fqI7y6pB1rajSakb_6wVOUdhDFL17k_x9jKNd7Q8Y4s=)
---
Hello ! With Memorial Day approaching, we are reminded of the sacrifice and service our fallen heroes have made to protect our country. It's a time when we reflect on the values that make America great and the importance of giving back to our communities. That's why we are reaching out to you today with an exciting opportunity.
---
Have you ever considered running for political office? As an everyday American, your voice and perspective are invaluable in shaping the future of our communities and our nation. At [Our Time To Run](https://nje015.keap-link001.com/v2/click/07ef3d59d6107e15049f92c54493b869/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnCU1rcCbhIhoHqLOITrQms4u65iI-N_bPvBU0HXmeZ_hnQkYqSBOKgiAanTcDVigsRRKIPFeEhfla-t7661jQSPoFmvZKwimr9kFeI5dx7OAR4WGOB3DfZrk8SVL8tSAqtDmwp-arb9zF1N0CJMM5vmnGlvB0d3YOwhY9_hsVAnTis-6MfyVWXWBbQ_DsJK9ZtEiS93TqpStXUtBxlEohVR9HpDi-DbND-8gY60=), we believe it is crucial for individuals like you to step up and make a difference through elected leadership.
---
Running for office may seem daunting, but don't worry—we are here to support you every step of the way. [Our Time To Run](https://nje015.keap-link001.com/v2/click/2104e7eaff302231124a13432505b943/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnMWPMgNvIiJieYg6h-hAazq7bGMi4n9v-8BTQdeZ532GdyZgpJI4qyEEatD1NmCBxkoogcSxJC6r19ZfrwLXglbQNdWyVxBOX7ML8Bx77tYCHhUa4niI4jwr0vMuK3IDqlKbC39qAn_rLaZkH2U7mOefauwEJ3djv0HIusdno1qYVnzSreEvzOoWOs4wDLbsNYsOWeqe7Ep2TiMFGUepFFL9eUCO49s0PwDyYGOx) offers expert education and resources that will equip you with everything you need to know about running for office for the first time. Our program provides a comprehensive roadmap that covers the entire campaign process, from getting started to building a winning team, crafting your message, and navigating campaign finance. # [2024 Is Coming](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=123818615&utm_source=post-email-title&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTIzODE4NjE1LCJpYXQiOjE2ODUxMTE3ODMsImV4cCI6MTY4NzcwMzc4MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.q8Dwne48sYIjbl2QGuxbR1Dvlhei8xg0THqQDqw6b-Y)
### We Must Re-Elect Freedom Caucus Members
| | [Andy Roth](https://substack.com/@sfcn)
---
| May 26
---
| [](https://substack.com/@sfcn)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack..NF0Ac14rEupBbIZqMfHI-Zuj2tyHc6j2MeX1uosF0A8?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
Friends,
We're months away from the 2024 election but the Establishment is already gearing up to come after Freedom Caucus members nationwide.
In South Carolina, Freedom Caucus member Rep. April Cromer, who upset a 10-term swampy incumbent in the 2022 Republican Primary, has been attacked in her district with a barrage of special interest money. Her crime? She fought the out-of-control spending in the Palmetto State's budget.
In Wyoming, Freedom Caucus Chairman Rep. John Bear got into a [war of words](https://substack.com/redirect/db6bbdfa-bb97-4397-a2b1-e7cc1e4e904f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) over the future of the Cowboy State with their RINO Speaker of the House Albert Sommers, who wrote that the WYFC "incites fear and stokes anger" and "panders to a national agenda" by demanding that the legislature actually keep the promises they make to their conservative voters.
We need your help to defend the seats of our Freedom Caucus members so they can continue standing up to the Swamp in both parties and deliver victories for conservatives.
Donate to [State Freedom Caucus Action](https://substack.com/redirect/3f60dd64-8a69-417e-bd1c-51d1fb142981?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) so we can keep electing true, principled conservative fighters in 2024.
If you truly want to help, please consider making [a recurring donation](https://substack.com/redirect/3f60dd64-8a69-417e-bd1c-51d1fb142981?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). No donation is too small.
Your contribution will ensure that the Uniparty fails and conservatives win.
[DONATE](https://substack.com/redirect/3f60dd64-8a69-417e-bd1c-51d1fb142981?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**Keep fighting,**

**Andy Roth**
_President
State Freedom Caucus Network_
PAID FOR BY STATE FREEDOM CAUCUS ACTION

subject: Lauren Boebert

body:
Doubles the problem and gives it to the next person.
#
We don’t say this very often, but take a minute to let Lauren Boebert’s comments from a recent hearing on prescription drug prices really sink in:
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230526.8G944D&refcode=em20230526-4390-P_FND_RES_TWT&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4390%2E2526796%2EWFUCa_)
Lauren Boebert voted against the Right to Contraception Act last year, which would have made birth control more affordable for everyone. Alexandria called out Boebert’s hypocrisy, as she’s done consistently with MAGA Republicans since Roe v. Wade fell last year.
[Alexandria is fighting back against extremists infringing on our basic rights. Will you support our movement with a $3 contribution today to help Alexandria keep up that fight?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230526.8G944D&refcode=em20230526-4390-P_FND_RES_TWT&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4390%2E2526796%2EWFUCa_)

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOGEL FOR CONGRESS
body:
Joe Vogel believes the generational challenges we face call for a new generation of leadership. In Congress, Joe will continue fighting for solutions and delivering for all Marylanders. To unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/oObdowbUrk-MGxOLwsSDAw2?unsubscribedata=%2BUpzD1f%2FaHOVzDacLjPESrtq0rEwZCygfLnxWW8mIFGjFunrWIpB96%2FGdeQh7SKe05ktnqAlibMqkCetSTdZstJkdPtXkME8I4gh6AtZeJYx4nYchK9GcQfPoZNCXZ5uEDGUaDLV64O66opVwEpH07Rb9SCvFx5ELABUihU9Pjy3wI7KTGEgKyWITgghuxETVp4gnvuRlH03SJu40ePZBJ6TJVidRVWLkGOVOvCeOmADTA4wF7Vox0O%2Bqtbx1s5rcBEN1LMYgDuvHSi2FaWF6QhU92%2B%2BOQUHeErpAPyvGgxDCLfLJCXPDW0y0%2BPIEK3uA%2FuUnxqqw8toIARiTLmR9Iv1uwHpoxzRwZNplF7JvWkO9tsWhpf0nrO57w%2FpT2INXXhRSxGH7cxFWhGK30fMdJeLQGRAe43yReAo7Bm4bLA%3D)

| |
---
**THIS JUST IN:** Far-right Republican Dan Cox is **strongly** considering entering the race for Maryland’s 6th Congressional District. We wanted to give you the chance to meet **Dan Cox: an extremist politician endorsed by none other than Donald Trump.** **Here’s what you need to know about Dan:**
1. Dan Cox spread the Big Lie that the 2020 election was stolen from Trump **and personally organized buses of insurrectionists to the Capitol on January 6th.**
2. He is a proud leader of the MAGA movement and has introduced bills to _restrict abortion, ban pandemic safety measures, and put more guns on our streets._
3. During his 2020 run for governor, even Republican Larry Hogan denounced Cox’s nomination, calling him “a QAnon wack job.”

| [SUPPORT JOE VOGEL (the literal opposite candidate to Dan Cox)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63858797/408221802/-1043532907?source=EM_NBI_JV_20230525_FR_vsDanCox_TeamVogel_NA_NA_JoevsDan&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU4NjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTM5MDY3NjEtZDNmYi1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=plOaQlDf0ONCeTj9vHBAt1f7xGOGcIBKgHzxpvnQNY8=)
---
Now, we want to introduce you to **Joe Vogel**. Joe is a gay Gen-Z immigrant committed to protecting democracy and creating a brighter future for Maryland.

At fifteen, he volunteered for President Barack Obama’s campaign. He then worked as one of Hillary Clinton’s youngest staffers during his first year of college. One week after the 2016 election, he became a United States citizen and jumped into the fight for gun violence prevention, reproductive rights, and LGBTQ equality. He went on to work for Senator Cory Booker and then-Vice President Joe Biden to defeat Donald Trump and restore faith in our democracy.

In the Maryland state legislature, Joe has taken on the big fights to _invest in mental health resources, combat hate crimes, and fight the fentanyl overdose epidemic._ Unlike Dan Cox, Joe Vogel has provided real solutions to issues that affect Marylanders.

**_Sound better than radical Dan Cox?_ Our campaign needs the resources to fight against right-wing extremists, and this starts with grassroots supporters like yourself. **[Will you chip in today to help us show the strength of our people-powered movement?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63858798/408221803/-1043532907?source=EM_NBI_JV_20230525_FR_vsDanCox_TeamVogel_NA_NA_JoevsDan&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU4NjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTM5MDY3NjEtZDNmYi1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=plOaQlDf0ONCeTj9vHBAt1f7xGOGcIBKgHzxpvnQNY8=)
If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
