clean_body: Joe Vogel believes the generational challenges we face call for a new generation of leadership. In Congress, Joe will continue fighting for solutions and delivering for all Marylanders. To unsubscribe, | | THIS JUST IN: Far-right Republican Dan Cox is strongly considering entering the race for Maryland’s 6th Congressional District. We wanted to give you the chance to meet Dan Cox: an extremist politician endorsed by none other than Donald Trump. Here’s what you need to know about Dan: 1. Dan Cox spread the Big Lie that the 2020 election was stolen from Trump and personally organized buses of insurrectionists to the Capitol on January 6th. 2. He is a proud leader of the MAGA movement and has introduced bills to restrict abortion, ban pandemic safety measures, and put more guns on our streets. 3. During his 2020 run for governor, even Republican Larry Hogan denounced Cox’s nomination, calling him “a QAnon wack job.” | = Now, we want to introduce you to Joe Vogel. Joe is a gay Gen-Z immigrant committed to protecting democracy and creating a brighter future for Maryland. At fifteen, he volunteered for President Barack Obama’s campaign. He then worked as one of Hillary Clinton’s youngest staffers during his first year of college. One week after the 2016 election, he became a United States citizen and jumped into the fight for gun violence prevention, reproductive rights, and LGBTQ equality. He went on to work for Senator Cory Booker and then-Vice President Joe Biden to defeat Donald Trump and restore faith in our democracy. In the Maryland state legislature, Joe has taken on the big fights to invest in mental health resources, combat hate crimes, and fight the fentanyl overdose epidemic. Unlike Dan Cox, Joe Vogel has provided real solutions to issues that affect Marylanders. Sound better than radical Dan Cox? Our campaign needs the resources to fight against right-wing extremists, and this starts with grassroots supporters like yourself. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for your support. Together, we can win this. Team Vogel * = | The generational challenges we face call for a new generation of leadership. Joe is ready to fight for the future of his community, his state, and his country. body:
https://www.crouchforindiana.com/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=f43c0cf8ca-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Throughout my campaign for Governor, I have been blessed to meet and share my vision for Indiana with Hoosiers. We are hitting the ground running with so much support across the state. This week, I am honored to share five endorsements I received...
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=f43c0cf8ca-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
"Suzanne Crouch has worked tirelessly for Hoosiers and their communities throughout her years of leadership in county, legislative and state government. I trust Suzanne to lean on her knowledge, experience and relationship with Hoosiers to move our state forward, together. I'm rooting for Suzanne to be our next Governor."
Becky Skillman, Former Lieutenant Governor for Indiana
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=f43c0cf8ca-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
"In my over 10 years in the Indiana House of Representatives, I have not met anyone more qualified than Suzanne Crouch to be Governor. She has been extremely effective as a legislator, Auditor of State, and Lieutenant Governor. She will not require a learning curve!"
State Representative Denny Zent, HD-51
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=f43c0cf8ca-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
"I am pleased to endorse Suzanne Crouch for Governor for many reasons: Her transparency as Auditor of State; her experience as a State Representative, where she and I served together; and commonsense Conservative strategies that incentivize business investment and job creation."
Woody Burton, Former State Representative, HD-58
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=f43c0cf8ca-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
"Suzanne has been crucial to the quality growth of our City. She has been instrumental in helping us get grants for our future sustainability. I'm endorsing her as the effective leader we need to be Governor of Indiana."
Mayor Bill Rock, Jr., Gas City
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=f43c0cf8ca-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
“I have had the pleasure of working with Suzanne for many years. Her energy and passion is unparalleled; I am excited to support her to be Governor!"
Dave Wedding, Former Sheriff, Vanderburgh County

name: Democratic Action
subject: can’t let the GOP set the agenda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democrats Win Seats PAC
body:
| **BAD NEWS→ A conservative appeals court looks like it’s going to side with the Texas judge who ruled to BAN mifepristone, the abortion medication, nationwide.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63859099/408222807/1252266067?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230526_FR_EOM.1.1_0_12MO_vanity_NA_NA_eom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWYzZjVlNS1kM2ZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JywejofbkRdXE0EJijyBn2Mot1mihCZSoSEzYYc2xoE=)

subject: did you see what Ted Cruz said about this race?

body:
BREAKING: Ted Cruz worried 2024 race will be a "firefight"
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP25/1/74758/images/cruz.png]
Maybe it's his relentless attacks on our fundamental rights. Or his loyalty to Trump, even as he spewed lies, pushed conspiracy theories and cheered on the mob on Jan. 6. Or the fact that he abandoned our state and flew to Cancun during a deadly winter storm.
There are a lot of reasons to vote against Ted Cruz – and he knows it .
Polling showed more Texans disapprove of the job he's doing than support him, and CNN ranks him as one of the most vulnerable incumbent senators on the ballot next year. He's already calling this race a "firefight" and launching lie-filled attacks against Colin Allred.
We're not scared of Ted Cruz, but we know failing to fight back against his lies could doom our campaign before it even gets off the ground. We have a real chance to defeat Cruz, but only if we have the money we need to compete. So we set a rapid-response goal to raise $250,000 by midnight, and we're urgently asking for your help, friend:
Please, rush $5, $10, or any amount you can spare to split between our campaign and Serve America so that we can compete with Ted Cruz's massive war chest. Every dollar will go toward our fight to flip Texas blue and expand Democrats' Senate majority. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Thanks for giving what you can to help us defeat Ted Cruz! Together, we can hold him accountable, flip Texas blue and defend the Senate.
Team Allred

subject: Bad news (and good news!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Hi there, _Cook Political Report_ has come out with their Senate rankings for 2024, and we have some good news and some bad news. **THE GOOD NEWS:** 15 of the 23 Senate races that Democrats are defending next year are in the “SOLID D” category, meaning that while anything can happen, they are not currently considered to be closely contested. **THE BAD NEWS:** The other 8 Senate races are ranked as “competitive,” and it’s up to all of us to do everything we can to protect vulnerable seats. Republicans need to flip _just 2_ seats to hand the Senate gavel back to Mitch McConnell, and we know this election is going to be tough. That’s why our monthly fundraising goals are important and why we’re reaching out to you today. **[Will you chip in any amount that makes sense for you right now to help us reach our end-of-month goals? clean_body: | Hi there, Cook Political Report has come out with their Senate rankings for 2024, and we have some good news and some bad news. THE GOOD NEWS: 15 of the 23 Senate races that Democrats are defending next year are in the “SOLID D” category, meaning that while anything can happen, they are not currently considered to be closely contested. THE BAD NEWS: The other 8 Senate races are ranked as “competitive,” and it’s up to all of us to do everything we can to protect vulnerable seats. Republicans need to flip just 2 seats to hand the Senate gavel back to Mitch McConnell, and we know this election is going to be tough. That’s why our monthly fundraising goals are important and why we’re reaching out to you today. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks always, Team Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

name: Ron DeSantis for President
subject: No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
This campaign is around the principle that our donors are a part of this team.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zai0ahorgnci6l9rjs54jl96ckq6bao1f8c07j9o_rp22sh2s8i66o75chh6eor6c1h2bs)
---

Hello Friend,

A lot of campaigns are urging you to donate before their self-constructed fundraising deadlines. They're probably making you feel terrible if you don't contribute too, aren't they?

At Team DeSantis we're taking a different approach.

Our entire fundraising & digital program's foundation is built on this principle: Our donors are a part of our team; they are NOT our personal piggy bank.

Look, I get it. Times are tough thanks to Joe Biden's Economy and our team doesn't want to pressure you towards donating if you can't afford it.

You will never receive a solicitation from this campaign that promises a fake match or degrades you for not donating.

No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.

That's what this campaign is all about, and I promise you, that's the kind of President you will have when I am in the White House.

If that sounds like the kind of campaign, you want to be a part of today then **_[please join Team DeSantis today by chipping in any amount you can afford.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpjhv3k0mkmgidhm0oedcvuur9j1plmn9jdr9tlo_rp22sh2s8i66o75chh6eor6c1h2bs "please join Team DeSantis today by chipping in any amount you can afford.")_**

---
Let's show the country we love that we're willing to fight for it.

Chip in today to join Team DeSantis.

Yours in freedom,
---
|
---
Ron DeSantis
---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6dlahbgkfppvbbh314mpod7vbv3nfmauv3oglqg_rp22sh2s8i66o75chh6eor6c1h2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America's veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

---

name: Alan Dershowitz
subject: The New York Sun is different
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New York Sun
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vs_AlPJD_N

In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced
first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad
journalism....

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os_AlPJD_N

FROM THE
DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ

Dear
friend,

In over
sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced first hand
the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism - mostly
the latter - and just how important and rare it is to get things
right.

In
today's media landscape there are far too many publications that
get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political
implications of a story than the basic facts.

The New
York Sun is different. It's a paper that places principle over
politics and people over party.

Its
in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President
Trump serve as a case in point.

When I
defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an
avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to
fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun's
deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky
and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the
Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be
first rate.

It will
be no secret to you that I don't agree with everything that can
be found in the Sun's pages, but I can say with confidence that
its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments
in American journalism.

I've been
impressed by the Sun's growth so far, but I know it faces an
uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

The Sun's
success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of
truth. But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage
you to join the Sun today.

Join the
Sun Now →

Every
person matters in this effort.

Don't
wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.

Alan
Dershowitz

Columnist, The New York Sun

Join the
Sun Now →

Paid for by the New York Sun.

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: The New York Times targets Chloe Cole
body:
The New York Times decided to publish an article directly attacking 18-year-old Chloe Cole for bravely telling her story

| |
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3gjbch5p1sf0g66fasqr6isuuggng5e6vg5obm0_rp22sh2s8i66o75chh6epr4sdh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8k7h5i6f35bcpeoqk21agm6t1oa3ge2ea3qs9sg_rp22sh2s8i66o75chh6epr4sdh2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot,The _New York Times_ decided to publish an article directly attacking 18-year-old Chloe Cole for bravely telling her story about de-transitioning and fighting to protect children from the lies and coercion that leftist medical professionals are peddling.That’s right. **The _New York Times_ published a hit piece on an 18-year-old girl who was lied to, coerced into surgically “transitioning” before she was old enough to buy tickets to an R-rated movie.**Physicians at Kaiser Permanente put Chloe on puberty blockers and testosterone when she was just 13 years old. Then they performed a radical double mastectomy on her when she was just 15 years old. And we’re suing Kaiser as well as the individual doctors that did this to her – but we won’t win without patriots like you.
---
| | |
---
**Will you consider making a generous, tax-deductible gift to set a precedent nationwide holding doctors responsible for experimenting on vulnerable kids?**
---
[**MAKE THEM PAY**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7anrnj1vikj2vkq248o75c948d1km3tfk6bbojo_rp22sh2s8i66o75chh6epr4sdh2bs)
---
|
---
| | Chloe dared to take on one of the most powerful and profitable institutions in our country, knowing what a steep, uphill battle was before her.Instead of offering a modicum of compassion—a scintilla of humanity—the _New York Times_ belittled and smeared this brave young woman dismissing her experience as rare or “few.” But Chloe’s story is becoming less rare by the day as more and more de-transitioners, inspired by her courage, are now speaking out too._I can’t tell you how many calls I get from de-transitioners like Chloe._ But because of relatively short statutes of limitations across the country, very few de-transitioners can file a lawsuit against the doctors and hospitals who “treated” them as minors—a nuance notably missing from the drivel published by the _New York Times_.The _New York Times_ would like you to believe that our clients Chloe Cole and Layla Jane are just two isolated incidents. **But this is pure gaslighting by the _New York Times_ because whether it is one child or one thousand, no child deserves to have their body permanently mutilated by medical professionals they should have been able to trust. **That’s why we’re suing Kaiser – and why we have to win. ...Because we believe in the dignity of every person, including those despised by the radical leftists in legacy media.**...And because we have the opportunity to put a stop to the performance of these barbaric medical procedures on children today.** We need to set an example and show doctors and hospitals in every state that there are consequences for misleading minors and their families.But as one of the largest providers in the country, Kaiser has millions of dollars to throw at this lawsuit, and we know this victory won’t be easily won.
---
| | |
---
**Will you consider making a generous, tax-deductible gift to set a precedent nationwide holding doctors responsible for experimenting on vulnerable kids?**
---
[**MAKE THEM PAY**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmbn6eupbkjoiopbh8edq02vtetcmjcrv80cjmsg_rp22sh2s8i66o75chh6epr4sdh2bs)
---
|
---
My name is Harmeet Dhillon and I founded the Center for American Liberty to protect our constitutional rights and to fight for people just like Chloe Cole and Layla Jane. You may think we don’t stand a chance against a big corporation like Kaiser, with more money on hand than we’ve raised in the history of our organization, but you couldn’t be more wrong.We’ve taken on case after case that no one thought we could win, and we did.In fact, in the last two years we’ve won THREE cases at the United States Supreme Court against California Governor Gavin Newsom.I know we can declare another crucial victory in Chloe Cole’s case too, but we don’t stand a chance without you.Every dollar helps!We don’t get a dime from the federal government, and we take on some of the most powerful and connected entities in the country. We depend on a grassroots movement of patriots giving what they can when they can, and rest assured every dollar makes a difference.
---
|
---
**Which is why I’m asking you to join the fight with a donation of $25, $50, or more right now.**
---
[**MAKE THEM PAY**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5n6u4snfsmsuu9fkkhu81nbi81jt4hkpejns570_rp22sh2s8i66o75chh6epr4sdh2bs)
---
|
---
We can’t change what happened to Chloe, but we can make sure it never happens to another child again.And with your help, we can make that victory a reality.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
Harmeet K. DhillonFounder & CEO
---
|
---
| | P.S. The New York Times published a hit piece aimed directly at Chloe Cole because she’s been brave enough to speak out and fight back. We cannot allow the radical Left and its allies in legacy media to silence women like Chloe and Layla Jane who are trying to sound the alarm about the dangers of “gender-affirming care” for minors. That’s why our lawsuits against Kaiser Permanente and the doctors who coerced Chloe and Layla are so important. **Please consider joining the fight with a generous, tax-deductible gift of $25 or more today.**
---
| | [**DONATE**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztbmiasi5ocnqlpa6enpoep4faprn8gl7v24ei6o_rp22sh2s8i66o75chh6epr4sdh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zo1hlf5cnevieaem09pm0ihil6j78jva6f0uqvkg_rp22sh2s8i66o75chh6epr4sdh2bs)
---
The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends.

name: Katie Porter
subject: I got an 'F'
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
I received an F-rating from the anti-choice group Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=23615%2E3422442%2E-cGz_G)
Derek,
I’m a former teacher who appreciates the value of an ‘A’—but there’s one failing grade I’m proud of:
**I received an F-rating from the anti-choice group Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America—I literally scored 0% in their eyes.**
I believe every American has the right to an abortion. But the truth is extremist politicians—funded by anti-choice groups—could ban abortion nationwide with just a few more Senate seats.
I’m running for Senate to be a fierce advocate for not just restoring the nationwide right to an abortion, but for expanding and protecting access to reproductive healthcare for every single American. [**Pitch in today to help power our grassroots campaign.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230526-1?refcode=EMAH26_1_GRA_20230526_V1_F&refcode2=23615_3422442_-cGz_G&akid=23615%2E3422442%2E-cGz_G)

Thank you for your support,
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAH26_1_GRA_20230526_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=23615_3422442_-cGz_G&akid=23615%2E3422442%2E-cGz_G)**

name: Tom Malinowski
subject: I want you to hear from me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Districts for Democracy
body:
| | Dear friends, As you may have heard, **this week I announced that I won’t be running for my New Jersey 7th district House seat in 2024.** I’m incredibly grateful to everyone who volunteered and donated to our campaigns these last few years. And I’m proud of what we accomplished together — creating jobs, rebuilding infrastructure, restoring American manufacturing, saving the Affordable Care Act, lowering drug prices, and winning victory after victory against the extremists and insurrectionists who threaten our democracy. **But we’re not out of the woods yet, and I’m not done fighting to defend our ideals.[That’s why I founded Districts for Democracy, _and why I still need your help._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63861924/408233451/-1360078147?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230526_ST_reelection_0_CST_Tom_na_na_na&refcode2=ff033223-d9fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjAzMzIyMy1kOWZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GhoiU5Jn5g8NPc0jUWZRXPxgFUV9Bdu_j4p0YJ6MM0s=)** As we approach the 2024 elections, it’s clear that the Trumps and wanna-be Trumps of the far right will not be offering plans to improve our economy or protect our national security. They’re banking everything on a culture war. And their number one targets are our public schools and libraries. You’ve read the stories about book bans across America — books about heroes of the civil rights movement, books about the Holocaust, books that acknowledge LGBT families or that touch on human sexuality, all taken out of classrooms and libraries. But did you know that seven states have passed laws that threaten librarians with years of imprisonment if they’re found to be providing any “harmful" or “explicit" content to children, without defining what is meant by “harmful” or “explicit?" Other states have passed laws letting anyone sue teachers and schools if they present difficult parts of American history in ways that make anyone feel “discomfort.” The intent and effect of these laws are to force teachers and librarians to censor themselves, to avoid any topics that could offend the far-right culture warriors, and to dumb down education for every child. **Those of us living in “blue states” aren’t immune to this nonsense.** In Bernards Township, New Jersey, MAGA activists took over the school board last year and recently banned a high school sociology textbook because of its accurate accounts of current events. In Roxbury, New Jersey, right-wing activists have publicly vilified a school librarian who refused to remove LGBT-themed books, calling her a “groomer” of young children. I get why people who spread election lies and anti-vaccine propaganda hate public schools that teach kids critical thinking, history, and science. But that’s precisely why those of us committed to defending our democracy have to protect the freedom to teach and to learn in our schools. After all, our schools are where we first learn the responsibilities of citizenship and the common foundation of facts on which our political debates should be based. **Preserving democracy in America doesn’t _just_ depend on electing the right president or members of Congress, as vital as that is. We also have to work from the bottom up.** That includes supporting school board candidates who care about the integrity of public education in America and who’ll work to keep the partisan culture wars out of our kids’ lives. **[Please support our work by making a donation to Districts for Democracy today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63861925/408233452/-1360078147?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230526_ST_reelection_0_CST_Tom_na_na_na&refcode2=ff033223-d9fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjAzMzIyMy1kOWZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GhoiU5Jn5g8NPc0jUWZRXPxgFUV9Bdu_j4p0YJ6MM0s=)** Gratefully yours, Tom

clean_body: | | Dear friends, As you may have heard, this week I announced that I won’t be running for my New Jersey 7th district House seat in 2024. I’m incredibly grateful to everyone who volunteered and donated to our campaigns these last few years. And I’m proud of what we accomplished together — creating jobs, rebuilding infrastructure, restoring American manufacturing, saving the Affordable Care Act, lowering drug prices, and winning victory after victory against the extremists and insurrectionists who threaten our democracy. But we’re not out of the woods yet, and I’m not done fighting to defend our ideals.= As we approach the 2024 elections, it’s clear that the Trumps and wanna-be Trumps of the far right will not be offering plans to improve our economy or protect our national security. They’re banking everything on a culture war. And their number one targets are our public schools and libraries. You’ve read the stories about book bans across America — books about heroes of the civil rights movement, books about the Holocaust, books that acknowledge LGBT families or that touch on human sexuality, all taken out of classrooms and libraries. But did you know that seven states have passed laws that threaten librarians with years of imprisonment if they’re found to be providing any “harmful" or “explicit" content to children, without defining what is meant by “harmful” or “explicit?" Other states have passed laws letting anyone sue teachers and schools if they present difficult parts of American history in ways that make anyone feel “discomfort.” The intent and effect of these laws are to force teachers and librarians to censor themselves, to avoid any topics that could offend the far-right culture warriors, and to dumb down education for every child. Those of us living in “blue states” aren’t immune to this nonsense. In Bernards Township, New Jersey, MAGA activists took over the school board last year and recently banned a high school sociology textbook because of its accurate accounts of current events. In Roxbury, New Jersey, right-wing activists have publicly vilified a school librarian who refused to remove LGBT-themed books, calling her a “groomer” of young children. I get why people who spread election lies and anti-vaccine propaganda hate public schools that teach kids critical thinking, history, and science. But that’s precisely why those of us committed to defending our democracy have to protect the freedom to teach and to learn in our schools. After all, our schools are where we first learn the responsibilities of citizenship and the common foundation of facts on which our political debates should be based. Preserving democracy in America doesn’t just depend on electing the right president or members of Congress, as vital as that is. We also have to work from the bottom up. That includes supporting school board candidates who care about the integrity of public education in America and who’ll work to keep the partisan culture wars out of our kids’ lives. = Gratefully yours, Tom * | Districts for Democracy will work one school board, legislative, and congressional district at a time to recruit and support candidates committed to freedom of inquiry, thought, and speech for everyone. We want to keep the culture wars out of our schools, return school board elections to their nonpartisan roots, and keep our schools and universities focused on their central mission: helping our kids become educated and engaged citizens of these United States. = = Paid for by Districts for Democracy Districts for Democracy P.O. name: Madeleine Dean
subject: this week marked one year since Uvalde
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mad4PA PAC
body:
**** Dear Peter – It’s hard to believe a year has passed since nineteen children and two teachers lost their lives to a mass shooter in Uvalde, Texas.

Our pain for the families is still visceral and deep. As a mother and grandmother, it takes my breath away; as an American, it infuriates me; as a legislator, it fuels me to action.

I know I’m not alone in my feelings – the vast majority of Americans agree that our gun violence problem must be confronted. Just look at this: _Since Uvalde, there have been more than 750 mass shootings in the United States._

**As a representative in Washington, I believe we are responsible for ending this uniquely American tragedy.**

With one vote House Republicans could pass common sense legislation to prevent gun violence – such as an assault weapons ban or red flag laws that our Democratic majority passed last year. **_But they haven’t done it. Despite the national consensus, my colleagues across the aisle refuse to take action on this ongoing public health epidemic._**

**We should be doing _everything we can_ to prevent more innocent lives from being lost to gun violence. [If you agree we need comprehensive gun violence prevention legislation, add your name here and stand with me.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63862241/408234813/-1588971081?refcode=05262023_md_gunviolence_en_1&refcode2=fc5fb932-dafb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzVmYjkzMi1kYWZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z0BwzycXqs1gx3gQo1DCqI38tcscsHJmfJiL3CLVr7A=&emci=a66eb231-50fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=fc5fb932-dafb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=36373569)** | | [ **ADD YOUR NAME** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63862242/408234814/-1588971081?refcode=05262023_md_gunviolence_en_1&refcode2=fc5fb932-dafb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzVmYjkzMi1kYWZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z0BwzycXqs1gx3gQo1DCqI38tcscsHJmfJiL3CLVr7A=&emci=a66eb231-50fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=fc5fb932-dafb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=36373569)
---
Students deserve to feel safe at school, and parents should not have to worry about sending their children to learn. _All Americans deserve to feel safe from gun violence._

The NRA and the gun lobby have made a living out of keeping children and families in harm’s way by pouring money to Republican candidates. Massacre after massacre — continued inaction is unacceptable.

_We are failing children and we are failing families._

But as long as I’m in Congress, Peter, I will continue to advocate for solutions to reduce gun violence. If you agree that it’s past time we curb such tragic, preventable loss of lives, **[add your name next to mine to support gun violence prevention legislation.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63862243/408234815/-1588971081?refcode=05262023_md_gunviolence_en_1&refcode2=fc5fb932-dafb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzVmYjkzMi1kYWZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z0BwzycXqs1gx3gQo1DCqI38tcscsHJmfJiL3CLVr7A=&emci=a66eb231-50fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=fc5fb932-dafb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=36373569)**

I am confident we can change tragic outcomes like the devastation in Uvalde, but we must work together to do so. We owe it to every single family who has lost a loved one to gun violence.

With determination,

_Madeleine_
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63862248/408234818/-1588971081?refcode=05262023_md_gunviolence_en_1&refcode2=fc5fb932-dafb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzVmYjkzMi1kYWZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z0BwzycXqs1gx3gQo1DCqI38tcscsHJmfJiL3CLVr7A=&emci=a66eb231-50fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=fc5fb932-dafb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=36373569)

* * *
_Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. She is an outspoken leader who champions progressive priorities such as education, universal access to healthcare, gun safety, and ethical government.**Madeleine Dean has built a reputation for getting things done, and we need her to continue to be our voice to serve us in Congress.**_
_We are excited to have you on Team Dean! Our campaign is funded by people who care about our democracy and want to see continued progress in our community and in our country. clean_body: ** Dear Peter – It’s hard to believe a year has passed since nineteen children and two teachers lost their lives to a mass shooter in Uvalde, Texas. Our pain for the families is still visceral and deep. As a mother and grandmother, it takes my breath away; as an American, it infuriates me; as a legislator, it fuels me to action. I know I’m not alone in my feelings – the vast majority of Americans agree that our gun violence problem must be confronted. Just look at this: Since Uvalde, there have been more than 750 mass shootings in the United States. As a representative in Washington, I believe we are responsible for ending this uniquely American tragedy. With one vote House Republicans could pass common sense legislation to prevent gun violence – such as an assault weapons ban or red flag laws that our Democratic majority passed last year. But they haven’t done it. Despite the national consensus, my colleagues across the aisle refuse to take action on this ongoing public health epidemic. We should be doing everything we can to prevent more innocent lives from being lost to gun violence. | | Students deserve to feel safe at school, and parents should not have to worry about sending their children to learn. All Americans deserve to feel safe from gun violence. The NRA and the gun lobby have made a living out of keeping children and families in harm’s way by pouring money to Republican candidates. Massacre after massacre — continued inaction is unacceptable. We are failing children and we are failing families. But as long as I’m in Congress, Peter, I will continue to advocate for solutions to reduce gun violence. If you agree that it’s past time we curb such tragic, preventable loss of lives, I am confident we can change tragic outcomes like the devastation in Uvalde, but we must work together to do so. We owe it to every single family who has lost a loved one to gun violence. With determination, Madeleine Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. She is an outspoken leader who champions progressive priorities such as education, universal access to healthcare, gun safety, and ethical government.Madeleine Dean has built a reputation for getting things done, and we need her to continue to be our voice to serve us in Congress. We are excited to have you on Team Dean! Our campaign is funded by people who care about our democracy and want to see continued progress in our community and in our country. name: Ilhan Omar
subject: The debt ceiling
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
What Republicans are doing right now is not negotiating — they're simply playing stupid games.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=201%2E791427%2EZosfp5)
Friends -
In just a moment, I'm going to ask you to add your name to my petition calling on President Biden to invoke the 14th Amendment and raise the debt ceiling. I'll explain more in just a moment, but if you're ready to sign on now, please use this link:
**[https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/Debt-Ceiling](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/io-em230526-debt-ceiling/?source=em230526-1-t2&refcode2=201.791427.Zosfp5&akid=201%2E791427%2EZosfp5)**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/io-em230526-debt-ceiling/?source=em230526-1-t2&refcode2=201.791427.Zosfp5&akid=201%2E791427%2EZosfp5)**
Here's the situation:
Right now, as the United States government is running out of time to avoid defaulting on its debts, Republicans are using the negotiations as a hostage to try and make massive cuts to health care, housing, education, Social Security, and more.
Let's be perfectly clear: What Republicans are doing is not negotiating — they're simply playing stupid games. They're holding the American people hostage while threatening to wipe out people's savings, take away millions of jobs, and plunge the world economy into depression.
These are the same Republicans who had no issues unconditionally raising the debt ceiling _three times_ under President Trump. That's because this crisis has never been about deficits or spending for the GOP — it has always been about wealth transfer.
They want to take away food stamps, kick millions off health insurance, make it easier for the rich and powerful to dodge taxes, block student loan forgiveness, kill green energy jobs and our efforts to fight the climate crisis, and cut Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security benefits, all so they can give $3 trillion more in tax cuts to their billionaire friends and large corporations.
Kevin McCarthy and the Republican Party are playing a dangerous game with the lives and well-being of millions of Americans at stake — and like every hostage situation, someone is likely going to get hurt.
It is absolutely critical that we raise the debt ceiling, prevent worldwide economic disaster, and protect the poor and working class from the right wing's cruelty — and the clock is ticking to get it done.
Fortunately, there is still an avenue that President Biden can take if Republicans continue to stall and sabotage — invoking the 14th Amendment, which states that the "validity of the public debt of the United States [...] shall not be questioned."
**The United States must pay its bills on time, and we cannot use the lives of working families as bargaining chips. Crises like these demand bold action, so please:**
**[Add your name to my petition calling on President Biden to invoke the 14th amendment and raise the debt ceiling — with or without Kevin McCarthy and his gang of MAGA Republicans.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/io-em230526-debt-ceiling/?source=em230526-1-t2&refcode2=201.791427.Zosfp5&akid=201%2E791427%2EZosfp5)**
These negotiations have only confirmed what we already know — the right wing will always side with the wealthy and powerful over the interests and well-being of the American people.
That's why it's so important that our movement stands together during this crisis, and never relents in fighting back.
Thank you in advance for adding your voice today.
In solidarity,
Ilhan
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/io-em230526-debt-ceiling/?source=em230526-1-t2&refcode2=201.791427.Zosfp5&akid=201%2E791427%2EZosfp5)**

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=201%2E791427%2EZosfp5)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=201%2E791427%2EZosfp5)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=4&akid=201%2E791427%2EZosfp5)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=201_791427_Zosfp5&akid=201%2E791427%2EZosfp5)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

name: The GIFFORDS Team
subject: Our work is not over
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
As Gabby always says, the fights worth having are rarely easy
#

Friends -
This week marked one year since the tragic shooting at Robb Elementary School in Uvalde.
Twenty-one precious lives were cut short on that horrific day. Too many families now have an empty seat at their dinner tables. Countless residents of Uvalde will be impacted by this trauma for the rest of their lives.
As Gabby always says, the fights worth having are rarely easy. At GIFFORDS, we’ve been part of the fight to end gun violence for a decade. It’s difficult, but we’re making progress step by step. Friends, this fight is far from over.
We need to pass more gun safety legislation at the federal level, such as universal background checks and extreme risk protection order laws (also called “red flag” laws), to keep guns out of the wrong hands.
It’s going to take all of us using our collective voice to keep making progress in the movement to end gun violence.
[**So please, if you’re able, we hope you’ll consider making a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today to help fuel our mission to reduce gun violence. Whether it’s $5, $10, or more, your contribution goes directly towards our lifesaving work.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may23.Jtluwk&refcode=em230526-1-15&t=1&akid=5784%2E3935704%2EPpYC5O)

name: Colin Allred
subject: Inside Elections just upgraded our chances
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
Have you heard?

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63862694/408236637/-1166863400?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230526-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUwODI3OGU3LWRiZmItZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZtsDqvKvuJn0gINss9c4VvgN7px7095e62pcr4YK5kA=)
---
Peter, a lot of folks told me not to run against Ted Cruz.

They said a Democrat couldn't win a statewide election in Texas and that I should stick with my "safe" seat in the House after winning with 66% of the vote last year. But I'm not one to play it safe when our rights and values are in danger.

**And listen, this team raised more in the first 24 hours of our campaign than Cruz did in the entire first quarter of 2023 – and the experts are taking notice.

Senator Cruz discussed why AM is such a crucial part of American politics, and gave listeners an inside look at how his unlikely partnership with Senator Ed Markey came to be. “Well, I got to say, number one, for Ed Markey and me to introduce a bill together in the world of Washington is a pretty shocking thing because, look, Markey and I agree on very, very little...” **[Cruz, Blackburn Probe Anheuser-Busch’s Partnership With Dylan Mulvaney:](http://trk.tedcruz.-9znCbtHkN51Q) **"Sens. Ted Cruz, R-Texas, and Marsha Blackburn, R-Tenn., are questioning the propriety of Anheuser-Busch’s partnership with transgender activist Dylan Mulvaney to promote the beer company’s Bud Light brand. The two Republican senators sent a letter Wednesday to Beer Institute chief Brendan Whitworth, who also is CEO of Anheuser-Busch Companies, demanding documents and requesting that the institute’s Code Compliance Review Board “open an investigation to review Anheuser-Busch’s recent and ongoing marketing..." **

The two Republican senators sent a letter Wednesday to Beer Institute chief Brendan Whitworth, who also is CEO of Anheuser-Busch Companies, demanding documents and requesting that the institute’s Code Compliance Review Board “open an investigation to review Anheuser-Busch’s recent and ongoing marketing..." | “VERDICT w/ Ted Cruz” Podcast... | Order Your Official Team Cruz Hat Now!** You may have seen our email earlier this week, but we wanted to reach out again. With summer just around the corner, it’s about to get HOT in Texas and most of the country. This is a great time to purchase your Team Cruz hat from our official merch store! Supplies are limited, so please don’t wait! -Team Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate** | | 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701 | | | To stop receiving emails from Ted Cruz for Senate, to unsubscribe. id:2023-05-24-13:53:03:809t | | |

Peter,

Last week Coach sat down for chat with Kevin Roberts of The Heritage Foundation, for Episode 64 of _The Kevin Roberts Show_ podcast.

It was a great discussion on Coach’s upbringing, his career coaching football, and the issues of the day. He breaks down the latest developments in his fight to reverse the DOD’s immoral and arguably illegal abortion policy, his leadership to get the Protect Women and Girls in Sports Act passed into law, the Biden Border Crisis, and more.
**[You can watch or listen to the full episode here >>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/30a556865d193282/c0bda69a27d3afe0c3d6b838967d376c/33013)**

name: Larry Hogan
subject: Take a moment this weekend...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by An America United](https://links
body:
| | |
---
My friend, I hope you enjoy the long weekend with friends and family, but I urge you to take some time to reflect on the servicemen and servicewomen who paid the ultimate sacrifice for our country. At every turn, America has beaten back tyranny. But it has cost hundreds of thousands of American lives to ensure our freedom. This Memorial Day, and every day following, it's up to us to honor their sacrifice and work together to heal our nation. Thank you for all you do. **Larry Hogan**

There are so many issues I’m focused on in Congress. I’m working hard to continue lowering costs for working families, pass a new Farm Bill, strengthen our economy, and safeguard our rights.

Meanwhile, many of my Republican colleagues are continuing their all-out, nationwide assault on reproductive rights, threatening our economy, and holding partisan political hearings that waste taxpayer money.

Overturning Roe was just the start of their attacks on our freedoms. There are still pending court cases that could lead to Mifepristone, the nation’s leading abortion medication, being banned across the country.

A group of some of the nation's most notorious election fraud deniers and election officials, including anti-Trump Secretaries of State, secretly gathered at CEIR's Soros-Tied and Zuckerberg Funded Election Summit in Washington DC on May 8-May 9 called "[Summit on American Democracy](https://substack.com/redirect/902d1603-99db-4c80-9f5d-4696899712de?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)".
Watch this video to see summit attendee and speaker Rey Velenzuela, who serves as the Director of Elections in Maricopa County, Arizona get confronted by Laura Loomer about why he's attending a radical leftist election summit and whether he condemns bias against Trump supporters by Arizona's Democrat Secretary of State Adrian Fontes, who calls Trump voters "MAGA FASCISTS".

> _" Newly-elected Secretary of State of Arizona, Adrian Fontes, [who has called Republicans who support Trump "MAGA Fascists,](https://substack.com/redirect/c1614551-4d29-48aa-9766-527df2f15603?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" was in attendance at the Soros-tied, Zuckerberg-funded election fortification summit in Washington D.C._
> _While I wasn't able to get to him before or after he walked into the conference, I did spot him at the bar inside the hotel chatting it up and flirting with beautiful red head, on taxpayer dime of course._
> _However, when he left the bar and headed toward the elevator, my videographer was able to chat with him and ask him about his recent claim that Trump voters, and people who believe our elections are rigged and illegitimate are "MAGA fascists." Not only did Fontes repeat and double down on his sentiments during the confrontation, but he also said that right-wingers are fascists as well."_

A group of some of the nation's most notorious election fraud deniers and election officials, including anti-Trump Secretaries of State, secretly gathered at CEIR's Soros-Tied and Zuckerberg Funded Election Summit in Washington DC on May 8-May 9 called "". Watch this video to see summit attendee and speaker Rey Velenzuela, who serves as the Director of Elections in Maricopa County, Arizona get confronted by Laura Loomer about why he's attending a radical leftist election summit and whether he condemns bias against Trump supporters by Arizona's Democrat Secretary of State Adrian Fontes, who calls Trump voters "MAGA FASCISTS". | | ---|---|--- President Trump has seen this video, and he shared it on Truth Social this week! WATCH: | | ---|---|--- In case you missed our report on Fontes smearing Trump voters, check it out here: | | | *| | May 19 ---|---|---|---|--- | " Newly-elected Secretary of State of Arizona, Adrian Fontes, " was in attendance at the Soros-tied, Zuckerberg-funded election fortification summit in Washington D.C. While I wasn't able to get to him before or after he walked into the conference, I did spot him at the bar inside the hotel chatting it up and flirting with beautiful red head, on taxpayer dime of course. However, when he left the bar and headed toward the elevator, my videographer was able to chat with him and ask him about his recent claim that Trump voters, and people who believe our elections are rigged and illegitimate are "MAGA fascists." Not only did Fontes repeat and double down on his sentiments during the confrontation, but he also said that right-wingers are fascists as well." Peter, if you know me, you know that asking for campaign donations is probably my _least favorite_ part of the job.
And that's not to say that grassroots donations like yours don't matter because they do _– so much_ more than I can ever articulate. In fact, it's thanks to grassroots donors like you that I'm even able to hold the most powerful and corrupt forces in the nation accountable –**because I know that, no matter how many millions of dollars they spend slandering me, I have an unwavering base of supporters behind me. **
I hate asking for money because I don't want to be distracted from my work – but with fights as large and vital as ours, I just can't afford to fall short of my fundraising goals. So I have to ask: [**Please, will you chip in right now to power my fight for progress in New York and beyond? I need to raise $10,000 before my fundraising deadline passes and I need _your help_ to do that.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63864615/408243767/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1087-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDI2NjcxMy1kZmZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X1LbtuH7gUy3PisjVQme_j4kJjF6dRGcj3MrZzmewn0=)

Friend,
A report just came across my desk: _**corrupt special interests are planning to spend $200 MILLION to stop me from winning the Republican primary.**_
Could you imagine if that money was spent on beating BIDEN instead? That money could easily be used to counter Soros’ millions.
But sadly, RINOs would rather let Biden get 4 more years in the White House so long as it means that I’m not the President in 2025.
_The reason they hate me so much is that I cannot be bought, bullied, or bribed._
At my 2017 Inauguration, I declared that _**“What truly matters is not which party controls our government, but whether our government is controlled by the people.”**_
My presidency is all about putting the American people first, which is why the corrupt special interests who’ve made a fortune off of putting you dead last are out to “stop” me.
I don’t have mega-donors giving $200 million. But I do have millions of MAGA patriots like YOU giving $1, $5, $10, $24.

After President Trump to repeal Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals (DACA), the most conservative members of Congress proposed H.R. 4760 to leverage the expiration of Barack Obama’s unlawful executive amnesty program to force Democrats to effectively repeal Ted Kennedy’s 1965 Immigration Act. The Goodlatte bill and chain migration...We need to defund sanctuary cities. We need E-Verify. We need to end chain migration, get rid of the diversity visa lottery...Make people go on record for that.” DeSantis Voted Against The Second, Near-Identical Version Only After President Trump Said Immigration Reform Would Not Clear The 60-Vote Threshold In The Senate. , President Trump tweeted, “You cannot pass legislation on immigration whether it be for safety and security or any other reason including “heart,” without getting Dem votes. They won’t vote for anything!” , President Trump tweeted, “I never pushed the Republicans in the House to vote for the Immigration Bill, either GOODLATTE 1 or 2, because it could never have gotten enough Democrats as long as there is the 60 vote threshold. I released many prior to the vote knowing we need more Republicans to win in Nov.” DeSantis Now Calls The DACA Bill That He Voted For A After Saying “It Did Everything We've Promised” On , DeSantis effusively praised the legislation: “We voted on a bill which is exactly what President Trump promised and what most of us who ran promised. It got 193 votes. No Democrat voted for it. We had 40 Republicans vote against it. It was the only bill I have seen since I had been in Congress that would actually solve the problem of illegal immigration. It authorized Trump's wall. It changed these asylum laws which are inviting a lot of the stuff we're seeing at the border now... It ended chain migration. It ended the diversity lottery. name: JD Vance
subject: Why I believe what I do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc
body:
I haven't told you this in a while

| [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=fb2d5c0b03f14ece8b45667cf6d39938&_e=yLuLhWJEt3bBLXxxqWi3jO3xypHKJG-i_DvcBMOLuk8YRhH-gA5rl-w9jqv3KagwKHy3Z32Sx21P8jZ9YsyiNzxra8tSQKcPfCdi5uJfh5EyDEAf18dZNRu99P_2tsRm4OGGL-vAhTXD4YtYhlI6KgPk6r2w8VEAHfNFRaYTglHjB6E1ZmUcaEMCfk0CMR1MZ6-AKefwFpY7iUK4eatxo6Ae7_6F2-3GyHyMRLJjyiyDsh9fTvyqzre-k1w3dTwcq3cuy_VuMzUAdACDsz2_BufjsoSJwclxrHrw10H49q9sF2zWAW-7m-0P-JMUGo33oKmM4XvaPVA0xYvTV5AKAa9uQkMxav4g9QYXOTRhQB_nBdh6o7dTMOMZP3mHsGoXWt1oluhMef25ERO4jcEQxEOrKHYKbbrVX-KNogtZrQ33MND_dV3_WlwnQFgNmyD6SOYzd9zbpSULVyPI-9bD4oVV_PJ3uwAnmVunaZPnzvGGXd0K0zqIe--olY39HV7dk2C8DHhLKlNz7bE2sM3fMq8TKnpL19YWBd_XA7eiEwy8nrXw_bCotdmeggzfjUcJ)
---
Hi Peter

**_I haven 't introduced myself in a while, and I want you to know why I believe what I do. _**

I spent my childhood in Middletown, Ohio, in a working-class family. I didn't have all the glamor that most people in politics have growing up; let me tell you, there were no silver spoons in our household.

I was raised by my Mamaw and Papaw, and they taught me the nobility of hard work.

In my hometown, I saw my friend's parents hard at work in the factories. These same manufacturing jobs are now in danger of being ripped from our grasp because of China and bad trade deals absolutely destroying the manufacturing sector.

Washington Elites have failed at protecting most Americans. Career politicians are focused on big dollar donors, focused on pleasing their friends, and pushing their own swampy agendas. **They 've never cared about taxing your small businesses, protecting your rights, or preventing the crises facing middle America. **

This is why I knew I had to run for office. I was determined to stand up to this record of failure and fight for working Americans. I'm looking out for the Americans like the ones I grew up with, the ones left behind by those who promised to look out for them.

It's the honor of a lifetime to serve this great country and the Buckeye State, but I can't keep doing it without your support.

**[If you have just a few bucks to spare, please consider chipping in so I can keep promoting conservative values in the U.S. Senate.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=fb2d5c0b03f14ece8b45667cf6d39938&_e=yLuLhWJEt3bBLXxxqWi3jO3xypHKJG-i_DvcBMOLuk8YRhH-gA5rl-w9jqv3KagwKHy3Z32Sx21P8jZ9YsyiNzxra8tSQKcPfCdi5uJfh5EyDEAf18dZNRu99P_2tsRm4OGGL-vAhTXD4YtYhlI6KgPk6r2w8VEAHfNFRaYTglHjB6E1ZmUcaEMCfk0CMR1MZ6-AKefwFpY7iUK4eatxo6Ae7_6F2-3GyHyMRLJjyiyDsh9fTvyqzre-k1w3dTwcq3cuy_VuMzUAdACDsz2_BufjsoSJwclxrHrw10H49q9sF2zWAW-7m-0P-JMUGo33oKmM4XvaPVA0xYvTV5AKAa9uQkMxav4g9QYXOTRhQB_nBdh6o7dTMOMZP3mHsGoXWt1oluhMef25ERO4jcEQxB_vR75qyCdkldj98xsSnUF5Y1B7_L9sLVDm3x0aSPs7YLZqvHP1b5UaWp0o1rjOKUfuLNaRPidy2u7RCtAzIAHy-qon-COCvUoK7vakxC-43Z2MhEhpdiptylKiOMEspGLg4eSu7Jm5sPd9BS1eIw7ue_aHuQA0gRGE6bDfI97F)** | [**CHIP IN**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=fb2d5c0b03f14ece8b45667cf6d39938&_e=yLuLhWJEt3bBLXxxqWi3jO3xypHKJG-i_DvcBMOLuk8YRhH-gA5rl-w9jqv3KagwKHy3Z32Sx21P8jZ9YsyiNzxra8tSQKcPfCdi5uJfh5EyDEAf18dZNRu99P_2tsRm4OGGL-vAhTXD4YtYhlI6KgPk6r2w8VEAHfNFRaYTglHjB6E1ZmUcaEMCfk0CMR1MZ6-AKefwFpY7iUK4eatxo6Ae7_6F2-3GyHyMRLJjyiyDsh9fTvyqzre-k1w3dTwcq3cuy_VuMzUAdACDsz2_BufjsoSJwclxrHrw10H49q9sF2zWAW-7m-0P-JMUGo33oKmM4XvaPVA0xYvTV5AKAa9uQkMxav4g9QYXOTRhQB_nBdh6o7dTMOMZP3mHsGoXWt1oluhMef25ERO4jcEQxB_vR75qyCdkldj98xsSnUE-oWKJU2sYX3cTjXbcVlqbTFfRVjQi4KAurzcHDwIe-cuL6GpSBMTiCwaB7EkTqHRvt54Su9anDeKKHCGZZvukXiImJ10qCo9dJDiJ2C3PbDTDj3Z3jP1CgdV4YwT8gKGjnhhkuior1eA7MUuL_8UE)
---
Thank you,

JD Vance

**Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author.**
Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our
economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans.

clean_body: I haven't told you this in a while | Hi Peter I haven 't introduced myself in a while, and I want you to know why I believe what I do. I spent my childhood in Middletown, Ohio, in a working-class family. I didn't have all the glamor that most people in politics have growing up; let me tell you, there were no silver spoons in our household. I was raised by my Mamaw and Papaw, and they taught me the nobility of hard work. In my hometown, I saw my friend's parents hard at work in the factories. These same manufacturing jobs are now in danger of being ripped from our grasp because of China and bad trade deals absolutely destroying the manufacturing sector. Washington Elites have failed at protecting most Americans. Career politicians are focused on big dollar donors, focused on pleasing their friends, and pushing their own swampy agendas. They 've never cared about taxing your small businesses, protecting your rights, or preventing the crises facing middle America. This is why I knew I had to run for office. I was determined to stand up to this record of failure and fight for working Americans. I'm looking out for the Americans like the ones I grew up with, the ones left behind by those who promised to look out for them. It's the honor of a lifetime to serve this great country and the Buckeye State, but I can't keep doing it without your support. | Thank you, JD Vance Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | | ---|---|--- Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc. Governor Ron DeSantis has never backed down from a tough fight. He's a native Floridian with blue-collar roots, played baseball at Yale, and graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. He served in the Navy as a JAG officer in Iraq, worked as a federal prosecutor, and worked in the halls of Congress. Thank you in advance for helping us crush this first goal, DeSantis Alerts | sms:94398?&body=RON Governor Ron DeSantis has never backed down from a tough fight. He's a native Floridian with blue-collar roots, played baseball at Yale, and graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. He served in the Navy as a JAG officer in Iraq, worked as a federal prosecutor, and worked in the halls of Congress. As governor, he has kept Florida free, taken on woke corporations, and stood up to the liberal media. He's the freedom fighter that America needs, and together, we can get him into the race. | PAID FOR BY NEVER BACK DOWN INC.

clean_body: Right now I have my eyes on Florida. | | Fellow Conservative, Rick Scott is a firebrand. He delivers on his promises, and he never backs down, no matter how many lies the Democrats and Joe Biden spin about him. Few people embody the conservative spirit in Washington like Rick Scott - and his pure passion INFURIATES the radical Left. We need Rick in Washington, but right now, his seat is in jeopardy. The last time this seat was up for election, he won by less than 1% of the vote , and this year, that race could be even closer. As NRSC chair, it’s my job to look at all the Senate races and figure out where we need to focus our efforts. And right now, I have my eyes on Florida. The Democrats are determined to ruin the Sunshine State, and they’re prepared to spend MILLIONS taking on Senator Scott. If we’re going to hold onto this critical seat, I’m going to need my most trusted patriots to step up. You’ve never let us down before, and I don’t want you to start now. Thank you, Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana Steve Daines for Montana

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63865443/408247323/-1747924743?refcode=em_eng_2023.05.26_b1_te_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGJkZDY3Ni1lMWZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_M4yJCczZIG5HoOWRXGKes-4nVl7IPLDtu9bK8YQmp0=)
Peter – Every day, an average of 117 Americans are shot and killed due to senseless gun violence across the country. _Yes, you read that right._

It couldn’t be more clear that it’s past time to address this epidemic of gun violence. Because even just one life lost to senseless gun violence is one life too many.

**Peter, Congressional inaction is not an option.** Here on Team Emilia, we believe Congress urgently needs to work to pass stricter background checks, close dangerous gun law loopholes, and keep these weapons of war out of the hands of dangerous individuals – _but we need to know if you’re with us._
|

name: A.G. Holder
subject: Team, our democracy is counting on you.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|
---

Team, the fate of our democracy hangs in the balance as we await the Supreme Court's decisions on significant redistricting cases. This is a critical moment for our fight for fair maps and for the nation, and the stakes couldn't be higher.
If our system of checks and balances is weakened as a result of the Court’s _Moore v. Harper_ decision, we can expect partisan and racial gerrymandering to reach new extremes. Our system of federal elections could be turned upside down, and state legislators could undermine election results they don't favor.
[**This is a direct assault on our democracy, and we cannot allow it to go unchallenged. Will you donate to All On The Line today to help us continue our fight for fair maps?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63865401/408247208/-773826618?refcode=20230526_AOTL_P_EHHA2_RedLiteXOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQyNzI5ZTNhLWUxZmItZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Fq8b0mwZzJjfLfVovSypRet7-WkCmykewrwHNeREkAs=)

And unity in the defense of democracy does not mean we need to agree on everything. Dissent is woven into our nation's fabric, and it has driven us forward. We owe it to the generations before us to continue protecting -- and renewing -- our democracy.
**And that is why I ask for your support in this crucial fight.** All On The Line is working tirelessly to confront the challenges ahead and ensure we are fully equipped to fight gerrymandering in and out of the courts.
[**We cannot do this alone. Your donation to All On The Line will enable us to face the obstacles ahead with strength and determination. clean_body: | Team, the fate of our democracy hangs in the balance as we await the Supreme Court's decisions on significant redistricting cases. This is a critical moment for our fight for fair maps and for the nation, and the stakes couldn't be higher. If our system of checks and balances is weakened as a result of the Court’s Moore v. Harper decision, we can expect partisan and racial gerrymandering to reach new extremes. Our system of federal elections could be turned upside down, and state legislators could undermine election results they don't favor. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = = And unity in the defense of democracy does not mean we need to agree on everything. Dissent is woven into our nation's fabric, and it has driven us forward. We owe it to the generations before us to continue protecting -- and renewing -- our democracy. And that is why I ask for your support in this crucial fight. All On The Line is working tirelessly to confront the challenges ahead and ensure we are fully equipped to fight gerrymandering in and out of the courts. = = Our democracy -- and our nation’s fate -- is counting on you. \-- Eric H. Holder, Jr. All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. subject: Shhh... We Have a Birthday Surprise for Stephen!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
Let's celebrate Stephen and support the Nebraska GOP! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e703cbc215b7/n41kepo7ku-12605678?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=4c673ac4f2&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | Peter,
---
| Psst! We've got a little secret, and you're now part of it. Our tireless Fundraising Director, Stephen Bader, is celebrating his birthday today!
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=208a68cb15&e=25844e23a8)
---
| _Young Stephen Bader 15 years ago volunteering for the GOP, Stephen is now turning 31!_
---
| And we have a special plan to surprise him - a plan that needs you.**[Ready to join in?](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=04384c93b7&e=25844e23a8)**

First off, we've put together a virtual birthday card. Just imagine his smile when he sees all of our names together! Will you add yours? **[ADD YOUR NAME HERE>>](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=4364a7c447&e=25844e23a8)**
But that's not all. Remember, Stephen dedicates his days to fundraising the support needed to elect Republicans across Nebraska. So, for his birthday, we thought: let's surprise him with a **[$5 donation](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=cca44c0dbb&e=25844e23a8) **each to the Nebraska Republican Party. This would truly make his day and boost our mission!

**[Are you in?](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=d0f9838a6a&e=25844e23a8) **Let's pull off this birthday surprise together and make it a day Stephen will never forget!

Thanks for joining in the fun,
---
| Sincerely,

**Dawn Liphardt**
Executive Director
Nebraska Republican Party
[NE.GOP](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=d81827a209&e=25844e23a8)
---
| P.S. Keep this secret surprise just between us, okay? Well, unless you know others who'd love to**[be part of the fun](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=798a68236b&e=25844e23a8) **\- feel free to bring them in on it too and forward this email to a fellow Republican!
---
| | | | | | | [](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=bc37348f1b&e=25844e23a8)

| | [](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=0285fd1167&e=25844e23a8)

name: Taking the Hill
subject: Peter You're Invited -- Join us at Nationals Park on June 16th for Taking the Hill: U.S. Army Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/9LzWsRKiJjtVn8VxiLLe-tsg3uLaxWj4ZAB8gUYokEk=/Z_NTUy_XRG_5Ap4bXbw1lufg5fv6juhQd797vPIzIOo=)
| Dear VVCVG1A6ZYC3, I hope this email finds you well. I'm reaching out because we're hosting our first event of the 2024 cycle in a box suite at the Washington Nationals U.S Army Day game and we would like to personally invite you to an exciting event happening next month. Taking the Hill, our organization dedicated to supporting veterans running for public office, is hosting a special gathering on [**June 16th at 7 pm at Nationals Park in**](https://act.myngp.com/el/9LzWsRKiJjtVn8VxiLLe-tsg3uLaxWj4ZAB8gUYokEk=/WQwLi4IHnsOQfOivLwA8oA3mbdSCl8vg5CDsUy19pGM=) [**Washington, D.C**.](https://act.myngp.com/el/9LzWsRKiJjtVn8VxiLLe-tsg3uLaxWj4ZAB8gUYokEk=/WQwLi4IHnsOQfOivLwA8oA3mbdSCl8vg5CDsUy19pGM=) It's an event you won't want to miss! Taking the Hill was founded in 2018 by the 32nd Undersecretary of the Army and former Pennsylvania Congressman Patrick Murphy. We are a veteran-run federal Political Action Committee with a simple purpose: helping veterans get elected to political public office. As we move into this next cycle, we're looking to grow every aspect of our organization dedicated to championing veterans' causes and providing them with the necessary tools, resources, and support to succeed in their political aspirations. Our event will feature inspiring guest speakers, including veterans who have already made strides in public office, who will share their experiences and wisdom with us. **To RSVP, please [click](https://act.myngp.com/el/9LzWsRKiJjtVn8VxiLLe-tsg3uLaxWj4ZAB8gUYokEk=/WQwLi4IHnsOQfOivLwA8oA3mbdSCl8vg5CDsUy19pGM=?refcode=05.23.23email)** **[here](https://act.myngp.com/el/9LzWsRKiJjtVn8VxiLLe-tsg3uLaxWj4ZAB8gUYokEk=/WQwLi4IHnsOQfOivLwA8oA3mbdSCl8vg5CDsUy19pGM=?refcode=05.23.23email): **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttharmyday](https://act.myngp.com/el/9LzWsRKiJjtVn8VxiLLe-tsg3uLaxWj4ZAB8gUYokEk=/WQwLi4IHnsOQfOivLwA8oA3mbdSCl8vg5CDsUy19pGM=). _To send a check: _ Taking the Hill c/o Patrick J. name: Dick Durbin
subject: Supreme Court ethics reform (update)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
If SCOTUS won’t act, Congress will.
#
Peter,
After recent revelations about Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas receiving lavish gifts and vacations from GOP mega-donor Harlan Crow, the Senate Judiciary Committee – which I’m proud to Chair – has been working to dig into these matters and highlight the urgent need for ethics reform at the Court.
**[I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again: if the Chief Justice won’t take action, the Senate Judiciary Committee will. The American people deserve to know that the highest court in the land is not for sale to the highest bidder. Will you add your name if you’re with me?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63865771/408248769/-1703921257?refcode=dd_em_230526_1_t1_b&ms=dd_em_230526_1_t1_b&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzA5YzI5MS1lMmZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xsq1cUVjaeAm1X6VsJwHAdt34R5MF-oWohXwm34CDIQ=&emci=b70e6b41-38fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a709c291-e2fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2727974)**
Just this week, Harlan Crow’s attorneys tried to justify the billionaire donor’s lack of response to our questions about his relationship with Justice Thomas. The lawyers also falsely claimed that Congress does not have the authority to enact legislation pertaining to Supreme Court Justices.
I have supported an enforceable code of ethics since I first wrote to the Chief Justice more than a decade ago. Since then, the public’s confidence in the Supreme Court has reached new lows.
This is plain common sense. Every other federal judge abides by a code of conduct. Our Supreme Court Justices should be expected to do the same.
**[I know I can always count on this team to join these efforts when it matters most. Sign on now and support an enforceable code of conduct for the Supreme Court.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63865772/408248770/-1703921257?refcode=dd_em_230526_1_t1_b&ms=dd_em_230526_1_t1_b&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzA5YzI5MS1lMmZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xsq1cUVjaeAm1X6VsJwHAdt34R5MF-oWohXwm34CDIQ=&emci=b70e6b41-38fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a709c291-e2fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2727974)**
My best,
Dick Durbin
**** ****
********[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63865773/408248771/-1703921257?refcode=dd_em_230526_1_t1_b&ms=dd_em_230526_1_t1_b&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzA5YzI5MS1lMmZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xsq1cUVjaeAm1X6VsJwHAdt34R5MF-oWohXwm34CDIQ=&emci=b70e6b41-38fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a709c291-e2fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2727974)********
