name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: A personal message
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| We’ve proved over and over again that the strength of our grassroots team is no match for right-wing special interests and dark money groups.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=333%2E35263%2EWMkhge)
Peter — I have a personal request: **[Can you extend a donation of any amount before our end-of-month deadline expires this upcoming Wednesday?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-may23.WiYufF&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230526_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=333%2E35263%2EWMkhge) **I’ll explain more in just a moment. _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-may23.gvrN3l&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230526_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=333%2E35263%2EWMkhge)
---
[CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-may23.oFPjTV&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230526_AM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=333%2E35263%2EWMkhge)
---
| [CHIP IN $25 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2152?c0=tbe-em-may23.TgCm-E&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230526_AM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=333%2E35263%2EWMkhge)
---
[CHIP IN $50 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2153?c0=tbe-em-may23.6U9y2I&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230526_AM1_V1_S1&t=8&akid=333%2E35263%2EWMkhge)
---
| [CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2154?c0=tbe-em-may23.N2RGls&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230526_AM1_V1_S1&t=9&akid=333%2E35263%2EWMkhge)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-may23.WiYufF&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230526_AM1_V1_S1&t=10&akid=333%2E35263%2EWMkhge)
---
I’ve been working hard in the Senate for the past few years to pass legislation that addresses the issues that matter most to Wisconsin’s working families. From lowering the cost of insulin and other life-saving prescriptions to protecting marriage equality, I’m proud of the positive change we’ve made in the Senate.
But while we work hard to deliver to your needs, Senate Republicans' agenda grows more and more extreme by the day. It’s clear that in order to make the progress our working families are counting on, we need to protect our Senate majority — and that all starts here in Wisconsin.
The upcoming elections will be difficult: Not only are Democrats on defense across the country, but given how narrow our Democratic majority is, Mitch McConnell will certainly spend whatever it takes to flip my seat and reclaim the Senate majority.
**But this team is no stranger to a tough fight.** We’ve proved over and over again that the strength of our grassroots team is no match for right-wing special interests and dark money groups.
Now, we all need to step up to be victorious once more. We’ve done it before, and I know we can do it again. That’s why I’m humbly asking:
**[Will you pitch in ahead of our end-of-month deadline to protect our Democratic majority and defend my Senate seat? We have a tough fight ahead of us, but together, I know this team will get through anything.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-may23.WiYufF&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230526_AM1_V1_S1&t=11&akid=333%2E35263%2EWMkhge) **
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-may23.gvrN3l&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230526_AM1_V1_S1&t=12&akid=333%2E35263%2EWMkhge)

---
| [CHIP IN $25 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2152?c0=tbe-em-may23.TgCm-E&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230526_AM1_V1_S1&t=14&akid=333%2E35263%2EWMkhge)
---
[CHIP IN $50 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2153?c0=tbe-em-may23.6U9y2I&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230526_AM1_V1_S1&t=15&akid=333%2E35263%2EWMkhge)

Tammy

clean_body: Eric needs your help before the summer starts. | Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. = Team, Glad we caught you before the long weekend! Memorial Day weekend marks the unofficial start of summer, when everyone gets to kick back and relax at a backyard barbecue. But this weekend also starts our last fundraising push to reach our May goals. And unfortunately, we’re trailing behind. That’s why we set an ambitious goal to raise $9,980 before May 31 so we can stay on track. Your steadfast support has always been the driving force behind our grassroots movement, and we need your help to reach our last benchmark before the summer. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = We get it, team, we’re ready to log off and take a break over the next three days, too. But with the MAGA right working overtime to destroy all the progress we’ve made, we cannot fall short a single month. [_**If you already know you’re with me, here’s a link to rush a contribution.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63865828/408248865/-649180716?refcode=AU_JC_FR_TAN_GEN_AC30_20230526_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjA5YzI5MS1lMmZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V78eeRz3KPfA19kkUYpI5Ff7RKVVF0s9x4s8UX_nmmE=) But if you need some more context about who I am and what this movement is about, then give me a moment to explain: I’m proud to be a fourth-generation Coloradan. I grew up in Jefferson County and became the first member of my family to graduate high school and the first to earn a college degree. To help get by, I started cleaning houses when I was just 12 years old, worked behind the counter at a bagel shop, pushed carts at a grocery store, and waited tables at restaurant after restaurant to put myself through college. Growing up, the odds were stacked against me, but thanks to the support of Jeffco public schools, I was given a chance. I ran for office to make sure future generations have the same chance I did. And now, I'm proud to be taking that fight to Congress. I know that the policies we're fighting for every day make or break it for regular people like me. [_**But listen, if we're going to make the kind of progress that our nation deserves — and stop the GOP attacks on basic civil rights like the right to choose — we can't let Republicans flip this seat or Jason’s red in the next election. That means we need to assemble the resources NOW to win a hard-fought race. The stakes here are high. I know the next election seems far away, but the truth is, we're in a tough fight to retake the House majority, and it's critical that we succeed. Everything from the right to choose to the right to a functioning democracy is on the line.
That’s why I’ve been fighting so hard for our community every single day in Congress — fighting to defend the right to choose, protect Social Security and Medicare, and stop the outrageous attacks on our democratic institutions.

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: big announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
I wanted you to be one of the first people to know about this.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zraoafeimckvoli2nbbvrobhepmt7q7334915ilg_rp22sh2s8i66o75chj64ob3cph2bs)
---
Friend,

It's official: I'M IN.

**I'm running for President of the United States. **
---
| | [JOIN ME](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3chha6mibdh55hsn74am9gh6266vukbi73tnd7g_rp22sh2s8i66o75chj64ob3cph2bs)
---
Have you ever noticed how often Joe Biden tries to take potshots at Florida?

It’s because he HATES what we’re doing in the Sunshine State.

While he pushes the woke agenda, we’re fighting back with freedom.

Joe Biden is taking the country in the wrong direction. But I know I can turn it around.

The American people know it, too. That’s why they are ALREADY voting with their feet. Our population is booming in the free state of Florida.

Now, I want to put that choice on the ballot--but I need your support. ** **
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn36bnsq66koup9nsvgvqgo7fm8dpi1gu9r7lrq8_rp22sh2s8i66o75chj64ob3cph2bs)
---
We sometimes take freedom for granted. You should not do that after the last few years. It is contested, and we have seen it wither on the vine in many places in our country.

But Florida was different. We chose facts over fear. We chose education over indoctrination. We chose law and order over rioting and disorder. Florida was a refuge of sanity when the world went mad.

We held the line when freedom hung in the balance.

We showed that we can -- and must -- revitalize America.

**I believe freedom is worth fighting for, and as your next President I promise I will never stop fighting for your freedom.** **[Will you fight alongside me?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z25k4geah55dnuv62ek1jn9v0q95bjo9rsevkvb8_rp22sh2s8i66o75chj64ob3cph2bs "Will you fight alongside me?")**
---
| | [YES, I’M READY TO WIN](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7olnho60fnc1sb25ut8iqjep7rkdd1v886f3230_rp22sh2s8i66o75chj64ob3cph2bs)
---
And we can win, Friend.

I'll make sure we have an economy that works for working families, a secure border that works for our nation, and so much more. The battle won’t be easy and will require a lot of toil and sweat to get it all done. I’m excited to share my agenda for America with you over the course of this campaign.

**But here’s why I’m writing you today, Friend:[I want to ask you to become a Launch Day Donor to my presidential campaign and join our first team tele-townhall.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z75lv7rfodrtir7gfe1mv92qf90mkslcoh8hjh60_rp22sh2s8i66o75chj64ob3cph2bs "I want to ask you to become a Launch Day Donor to my presidential campaign and join our first Team Teletownhall.")**

I promise you, unlike other campaigns, our grassroots fundraising program is built on the principle that our donors are a part of our team, not our personal piggybank.

**_[I vow to treat you with respect: No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z73rjoh6qv318tt4emsdvcfh2gr0j2mfotaum0sg_rp22sh2s8i66o75chj64ob3cph2bs "I vow to treat you with respect: No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.")_**

Can I count on you?
---
| | [DONATE NOW](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z294pbl7u5vn01sb2u1dk3gk15q7a201stmfrfu0_rp22sh2s8i66o75chj64ob3cph2bs)
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbtb2befn8j2pp5tao1aj2do8honrabdsliprkn8_rp22sh2s8i66o75chj64ob3cph2bs)
---
In Freedom,

Ron DeSantis
---
_P.S I want to show you my appreciation for standing with me from Day 1 of this campaign. It’s why my team prepared gifts to thank our Day 1 donors.

If you chip in $47 by midnight on 5/25, we’ll send you a limited-edition Day 1 membership card and an invite to our first-ever team tele-townhall.

Make sure you get yours now at this secure link: **[https://dsnts.com/aexHpu](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqk0unsonferfniftgj68ng9rdrgvk3vt7eegtq0_rp22sh2s8i66o75chj64ob3cph2bs)**_
---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1peqqefustaninn245lh5rhjd5vo33gq8rmrmqg_rp22sh2s8i66o75chj64ob3cph2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America’s veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules

* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.

name: Taking the Hill
subject: Peter You're Invited -- Join us at Nationals Park on June 16th for Taking the Hill: U.S. Army Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/l0elq6RyrDXQQv5u9TQG25xmX9DZgn0Ktcu3bUwzESI=/kCRN5g3Sec8F6sG1pZ55Yjf9hLg8lWxop232xQgbOBg=)
| Dear Peter, I hope this email finds you well. I'm reaching out because we're hosting our first event of the 2024 cycle in a box suite at the Washington Nationals U.S Army Day game and we would like to personally invite you to an exciting event happening next month. Taking the Hill, our organization dedicated to supporting veterans running for public office, is hosting a special gathering on [**June 16th at 7 pm at Nationals Park in**](https://act.myngp.com/el/l0elq6RyrDXQQv5u9TQG25xmX9DZgn0Ktcu3bUwzESI=/WQJsIV-nDd21BofrGQkcN4o5Et4u-vdRddvlDF7R57E=) [**Washington, D.C**.](https://act.myngp.com/el/l0elq6RyrDXQQv5u9TQG25xmX9DZgn0Ktcu3bUwzESI=/WQJsIV-nDd21BofrGQkcN4o5Et4u-vdRddvlDF7R57E=) It's an event you won't want to miss! Taking the Hill was founded in 2018 by the 32nd Undersecretary of the Army and former Pennsylvania Congressman Patrick Murphy. We are a veteran-run federal Political Action Committee with a simple purpose: helping veterans get elected to political public office. As we move into this next cycle, we're looking to grow every aspect of our organization dedicated to championing veterans' causes and providing them with the necessary tools, resources, and support to succeed in their political aspirations. Our event will feature inspiring guest speakers, including veterans who have already made strides in public office, who will share their experiences and wisdom with us. **To RSVP, please [click](https://act.myngp.com/el/l0elq6RyrDXQQv5u9TQG25xmX9DZgn0Ktcu3bUwzESI=/WQJsIV-nDd21BofrGQkcN4o5Et4u-vdRddvlDF7R57E=?refcode=05.23.23email)** **[here](https://act.myngp.com/el/l0elq6RyrDXQQv5u9TQG25xmX9DZgn0Ktcu3bUwzESI=/WQJsIV-nDd21BofrGQkcN4o5Et4u-vdRddvlDF7R57E=?refcode=05.23.23email): **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttharmyday](https://act.myngp.com/el/l0elq6RyrDXQQv5u9TQG25xmX9DZgn0Ktcu3bUwzESI=/WQJsIV-nDd21BofrGQkcN4o5Et4u-vdRddvlDF7R57E=). _To send a check: _ Taking the Hill c/o Patrick J. Murphy PO Box 2134, Bristol, PA 19007 Should you have any questions or require further information, please don't hesitate to reach out to us at max@patrickjmurphy.com. Thank you for considering our invitation, and we genuinely hope you can join us for Taking the Hill: U.S. Army Day. Together, let's create a better future for our veterans and our country. Taking the Hill
---
Copyright Taking the Hill PAC 2023 All Rights Reserved
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/l0elq6RyrDXQQv5u9TQG25xmX9DZgn0Ktcu3bUwzESI=/-6IQE0Gn70OCStAR_KLzHFFEZv4IQJjdafcdTiL2Yyo=)

Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC

PO Box 2134
Bristol PA 19007 United States

Friend,
**“Dragon slayers.”**
That’s what The New York Times dubbed Kirsten, me, and the other young women who defied the odds to defeat incumbent GOP congressmen in deep-red districts.
I first met Kirsten Gillibrand back in 2006, when we were freshman congresswomen — new to Washington, but more than ready to roll up our sleeves and get to work. We instantly connected over our shared values, our commitment to public service, and our fierce passion for electing more “dragon slayer” women to public office.
In Congress, we quickly became close partners, learning the ropes, building coalitions, and fighting for legislation to help our districts. And outside the halls of the Capitol, we became dear friends.
Kirsten has stood with me throughout it all — difficult reelection campaigns, the long recovery after I was shot, and my husband Mark’s successful run for Senate. **Trust me on this: Kirsten is someone you want on your team. And now, more than ever, we need her bold, fearless voice in the Senate. [That’s why today, I’m emailing you to ask you to join me in supporting Kirsten’s critical reelection campaign. You see, Kirsten is facing a tough reelection campaign this year. New York Republicans just had their best election cycle in decades — flipping enough seats to retake control of the House. **Now, those same extremists are targeting Kirsten’s seat.**
If we lose in New York, we’ll almost certainly lose our Senate majority. And just as importantly, we’ll lose one of our fiercest advocates for the issues that matter most — gun violence prevention, reproductive rights, supporting families, and more.
Kirsten refuses to accept money from corporate PACs, so she’s counting on grassroots supporters like you to have her back. **[Please, friend, will you make a donation to defend Kirsten’s must-win seat?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63866069/408249664/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4174-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjVjM2U0NS1lM2ZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iJr1iVH5uYt8TZsDEwYGqB10idUS4MXALYJAKugTvxY=)**

Gabby

_Doing my best Adele album cover impression!_ Hello, friend, it’s me, Susie Lee. What do Adele and I have in common? It’s _(unfortunately)_ not our singing voices. We’re both current Las Vegas residents...well, Adele’s only staying a year. I’ve been here for three wonderful decades! **I have some quick campaign updates for you – but I know those can be a little dull, so I threw in a few Adele references. Read on:** I’m not going to sit here and tell you we’re in the middle of a __Skyfall.__ But the honest truth is that NV-03 is the most competitive district in Nevada, and one of the most competitive in the nation. **__Rumor Has It_ _that the GOP is desperate to unseat me because I’m an unapologetic defender of public education, voting rights, and working families.** They came very close last November and spent millions to boost my right-wing opponent; in fact, I won with one of the narrowest margins of victory of any Democrat nationwide. That may be __Water Under the Bridge__ for now, but national Republicans want revenge – and I can be sure they’re not going to make any of this __Easy on Me__ : **The NRCC has already named me as a top target for 2024.** **We need to start __Turning Tables__ to prove that we’re ready for their underhanded tactics, but I can’t do it without __Someone Like You__.** [**So please,__All I Ask__ is that you pitch in $5, $10, or $15 to help us build up a winning campaign operation and keep NV-03 bright, bright blue. name: Replace Sinema
subject: RE: BREAKING: FEC complaint filed against Kyrsten Sinema
disclaimer_text: paid for by Wall Street, pharma, and special interests
body:
The complaint accuses Sinema of illegally using campaign funds for personal gain | | | Peter –

clean_body: The complaint accuses Sinema of illegally using campaign funds for personal gain | | | Peter – Just wanted to give you an update on our FEC complaint against Kyrsten Sinema. Yesterday we received an email confirming receipt of the complaint and that Sinema will be receiving it within five business days–we hope she’s ready! has used her office to do favors for wealthy donors and to live a lifestyle of luxury, while ignoring the Arizonans who are depending on her. That’s why we filed this complaint, why we’ve endorsed Ruben Gallego, and why we’re in this fight in the first place–because we know Arizona deserves better than a sellout, corporate shill. If you’re ready to replace Sinema and elect honest, trustworthy leadership like Ruben Gallego, If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thanks for all your help, we couldn’t do it without you, -Replace Sinema & Change for Arizona 2024 –PREVIOUS EMAIL– Peter – It's true—we've filed a complaint with the Federal Election Commission against Kyrsten Sinema. 27-page formal complaint against Sinema alleges she illegally diverted funds donated to her for campaigning for federal office by making expenditures for her personal use and benefit. Yes you read that right: Sinema used tens of thousands of campaign dollars on luxury hotels and resorts, car services, charter flights, high-end restaurants, wine, and her athletic hobbies. Our complaint proves what we already knew to be true: that Sinema is bought, sold, and paid for by Wall Street, pharma, and special interests. This is why we are in this fight: to let everyone in Arizona know that Sinema sold out and replace her with the honest, trustworthy leader we deserve. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Sinema’s team refuted the complaint as ‘a political attack,’ but an independent ethics expert says the complaint has merit:“When I read this FEC complaint, I was shocked – and I’ve seen a lot of political corruption in my life,” said prominent Arizona attorney Tom Ryan, who is a past president of the Arizona Association of Justice. “You don’t get to mislead donors. You don’t get to take money that’s intended for a public use and turn it into a private benefit, and she has clearly done that in spades.” Because Sinema’s spending isn’t sporadic or minimal–it’s not just a dinner here and a hotel stay there: our report outlines over $180,000 in campaign, PAC, and Senate funds spent on luxury hotels and resorts, car services, expensive charter flights, high-end restaurants, and wine. If this sounds out of the norm...that’s because it IS! Sinema is cashing big money checks from special interests to fund her luxury lifestyle, all while obstructing our most basic rights and dodging any accountability from constituents.We’ve had enough. Sinema is required to respond to a complaint filed against her with the FEC. She is constantly practicing the art of the dodge–but she sold out and we’re going to make sure she answers for putting Arizona second time and again. When you have no moral high ground you’ll take checks from anyone–which is why Sinema’s war chest is so big. Our campaign has been fueled by 17,000 small dollar donors. Your support grants us the tools necessary to do research like this on Sinema’s potentially illegal and unethical behavior and bring it to light. subject: Bad news… Good News for Joe Biden
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
Joe Biden needs our help.

Friends -
Joe Biden needs our help.
Ron DeSantis reported raising $8.2 million from big-money donors in the first twenty-four hours of his presidential campaign.
That’s a record — and it’s money he’ll spend pummeling Joe Biden in key states that could make the difference in this election.
That’s the bad news.
The good news is, DeSantis’ money is from a lot of rich folks who have given the limit and cannot give again.
That means if Joe Biden can get lots and lots of small-dollar donations, he can pass DeSantis. And when lots and lots of people give, it adds up quick.
So, given this news, we’re asking:
[**Can you please rush a $3 contribution directly to Joe Biden’s presidential campaign today? | | Dear Patriot, The Michigan Republican Party, founded in 1854, has been the champion of freedom, prosperity, and opportunity for the American people. From abolishing slavery to advancing civil rights, we have led the charge. Today, we stand against discrimination and civil rights violations imposed by CRT and DEI initiatives. Join us in celebrating our nation, protecting constitutional freedoms, advocating for strong families and education excellence, ensuring election integrity and national security. Together, we will stimulate economic growth and restore the American Dream. Make a difference. Kristina Karamo

In Montana, Michigan, Colorado, Vermont, California, Kentucky, Kansas, and Wisconsin — voters have resoundingly supported reproductive rights. Every. Single. Time. We’ve been saying it for a while now: There is a _major disconnect_ between voters and their elected officials when it comes to abortion access. _And headlines like these prove it:_ [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63867256/408254749/1379426826?refcode=E21557-20230526-MOVoters-graphic-AbortionReproductiveRights-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2NjOTdjMi1lNmZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ygB0wMCIhEZs7BoKCqr39q1w2mO9QHl33m1w9XObV9g=) Over the past year, voters have had numerous opportunities to protect abortion access – and no matter how “red” or “blue” the state, they’ve decisively demanded continued protections for their access to abortion and other reproductive health care. **10 states remain where ballot measures could be used to restore and permanently protect access to abortion — _including Missouri. _** [**We’re ready to fight alongside voters everywhere possible to protect their reproductive freedom. clean_body: | | Friend — Each and every time reproductive rights have come under attack by extremist legislatures and courts, voters have fought back. In Montana, Michigan, Colorado, Vermont, California, Kentucky, Kansas, and Wisconsin — voters have resoundingly supported reproductive rights. Every. Single. Time. We’ve been saying it for a while now: There is a major disconnect between voters and their elected officials when it comes to abortion access. And headlines like these prove it: = Over the past year, voters have had numerous opportunities to protect abortion access – and no matter how “red” or “blue” the state, they’ve decisively demanded continued protections for their access to abortion and other reproductive health care. 10 states remain where ballot measures could be used to restore and permanently protect access to abortion — including Missouri. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Fairness Project Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 31 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible.** = = Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions to the Fairness Project support its many efforts nationwide and any focus is at the Fairness Project’s sole discretion. name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark?=
subject: for the weekend
body:
Peter, the No Doubt About It Podcast is LIVE! | | | | | |
---
|
---
|
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=ba0dda9243&e=567664f14c)
# EPISODE 6: Ron DeSantis Makes it Official; Media Attacks the Wives; Target Gets the Bud Light Treatment
Hey!
We wanted to invite you to join us for a Memorial Day weekend of the No Doubt About It Podcast!
We have a [special episode](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=d3ac1950a2&e=567664f14c) lined up that will keep you entertained and engaged, whether you're on the road or catching up on home projects this weekend.
| [Subscribe to No Doubt About It](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=e1b3557d8d&e=567664f14c)
---
In our latest episode, we dive headfirst into the presidential race. We can't wait to share the inside scoop on when Ron DeSantis came to New Mexico and hit the campaign trail with me. It was an electrifying experience, and we're excited to provide you with all the behind-the-scenes stories and insights.
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=ba8ec949e7&e=567664f14c)
Let's talk about Politico and its recent hit piece on Casey DeSantis. We're fired up and ready to call out their biased reporting. Krysty exposes the flaws in their approach and highlights the significance of fair and balanced journalism in today's media landscape.
One topic that hits close to home for us is the treatment of conservative wives compared to their liberal counterparts. Witnessing the disparity is disheartening, and we delve into this issue with a personal anecdote of what we experienced firsthand.
Together, we shed light on the challenges conservative women face in the political realm, sparking a meaningful conversation on the need for alternative voices to the tired biased media.
| [Subscribe to No Doubt About It](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=6f1e395c90&e=567664f14c)
---
Our podcast episode also delves into an eye-opening article by Andrew Sullivan. We explore how the new trans movement impacts the gay movement, unpacking the complexities of identity politics. It's a thought-provoking discussion that encourages us to reevaluate where this might be heading.
But wait, there's more! You won't believe Michelle Lujan Grisham's latest misstep. We believe that humor has a place in politics, and the governor always keeps us laughing or crying, depending on the day.
We also talk about a heartwarming story that will leave a lasting impression. We recount the remarkable bond between Dick and Rick Hoyt, a father and son who defied all odds. Despite Rick's cerebral palsy, they participated in over 1,000 races together, exemplifying the power of unconditional love and determination.
| [OK! I HAVE to See This Episode](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=01f9f41854&e=567664f14c)
---
As we gear up for this Memorial Day weekend and a time to honor our fallen heroes, you might also enjoy listening to [Tuesday's Episode #5](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=cb5171a9ce&e=567664f14c) about Veteran Bryan Stern with Project Dynamo.
He is a true patriot who has made it his new mission to head into the most dangerous situations in the world to rescue Americans in areas the U.S. has no presence or reach.
|
---
[**STOP AND SUBSCRIBE**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=13a1d3f6fa&e=567664f14c)
To access the podcast, you can visit our website or follow us on major platforms like YouTube, Stitcher, and Apple Podcasts.
| | | | | | | | | | [Spotify Podcasts](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=a09d91a7cd&e=567664f14c)
---

---
| | [Stitcher Podcasts](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=96a1951126&e=567664f14c)
---
| | [iHeart Podcasts](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=971d0e2d42&e=567664f14c)
---
|
---
### [**HELP SUPPORT NO DOUBT ABOUT IT**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=adc3953191&e=567664f14c)**
**
Finally, we want to express our gratitude for your support. Running a podcast involves various expenses, and your donations significantly impact our ability to deliver high-quality content. Regardless of size, every contribution helps us keep the No Doubt About It Podcast thriving.
If you'd like to support us and donate, please visit: [nodoubtaboutitpodcast.com/support](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=d10d46dd1f&e=567664f14c)
Your generosity will help us continue delivering essential stories.

So, grab your favorite beverage, kick back, and tune in to the No Doubt About It Podcast this Memorial Day weekend. Let's engage and create memories together while honoring the brave men and women who sacrificed their lives for our freedom.
Thank you for being an incredible part of our podcast community!
Warm regards,Mark and Krysty
|

clean_body: Peter, the No Doubt About It Podcast is LIVE! | | | | | | | | EPISODE 6: Ron DeSantis Makes it Official; Media Attacks the Wives; Target Gets the Bud Light Treatment Hey! We wanted to invite you to join us for a Memorial Day weekend of the No Doubt About It Podcast! We have a lined up that will keep you entertained and engaged, whether you're on the road or catching up on home projects this weekend. | In our latest episode, we dive headfirst into the presidential race. We can't wait to share the inside scoop on when Ron DeSantis came to New Mexico and hit the campaign trail with me. It was an electrifying experience, and we're excited to provide you with all the behind-the-scenes stories and insights. Let's talk about Politico and its recent hit piece on Casey DeSantis. We're fired up and ready to call out their biased reporting. Krysty exposes the flaws in their approach and highlights the significance of fair and balanced journalism in today's media landscape. One topic that hits close to home for us is the treatment of conservative wives compared to their liberal counterparts. Witnessing the disparity is disheartening, and we delve into this issue with a personal anecdote of what we experienced firsthand. Together, we shed light on the challenges conservative women face in the political realm, sparking a meaningful conversation on the need for alternative voices to the tired biased media. | Our podcast episode also delves into an eye-opening article by Andrew Sullivan. We explore how the new trans movement impacts the gay movement, unpacking the complexities of identity politics. It's a thought-provoking discussion that encourages us to reevaluate where this might be heading. But wait, there's more! You won't believe Michelle Lujan Grisham's latest misstep. We believe that humor has a place in politics, and the governor always keeps us laughing or crying, depending on the day. We also talk about a heartwarming story that will leave a lasting impression. We recount the remarkable bond between Dick and Rick Hoyt, a father and son who defied all odds. Despite Rick's cerebral palsy, they participated in over 1,000 races together, exemplifying the power of unconditional love and determination. | As we gear up for this Memorial Day weekend and a time to honor our fallen heroes, you might also enjoy listening to about Veteran Bryan Stern with Project Dynamo. He is a true patriot who has made it his new mission to head into the most dangerous situations in the world to rescue Americans in areas the U.S. has no presence or reach. | To access the podcast, you can visit our website or follow us on major platforms like YouTube, Stitcher, and Apple Podcasts. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Finally, we want to express our gratitude for your support. Running a podcast involves various expenses, and your donations significantly impact our ability to deliver high-quality content. Regardless of size, every contribution helps us keep the No Doubt About It Podcast thriving. If you'd like to support us and donate, please visit: Your generosity will help us continue delivering essential stories. So, grab your favorite beverage, kick back, and tune in to the No Doubt About It Podcast this Memorial Day weekend. Let's engage and create memories together while honoring the brave men and women who sacrificed their lives for our freedom. Thank you for being an incredible part of our podcast community! Warm regards,Mark and Krysty | Follow Us on Facebook, Instagram, and Twitter! | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | © 2023 Choose Adventure Media. All rights reserved.

Nikki just joined forces with her colleagues to ensure Illinoisans have food on their tables

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63867564/408255252/-345890914?refcode=EM_FR_2305261In4_TN_8_TESTA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTRlY2RmMS1lNmZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hVC-Ypa9PIkFTuG2_gDgvbFc7w0YVDP2W6fketAcdeU=)
Team,

Right now, one in four Illinoisans lives in a food desert.

Food deserts occur when residents in a community don’t have access to healthy, affordable fresh food. And here in Illinois, these food deserts are occurring across the state, in both our urban and rural communities. Leaders in Illinois know our communities deserve better, and they’re not only raising awareness in our government, but they’re actively pursuing solutions to eliminate food deserts no matter your zip code.

Just last week, Nikki and fellow Illinois Congressman Jonathan Jackson penned a letter to the U.S. Department of Agriculture to ask for increased funding for our healthy food security programs to ensure every family has access to quality food choices.

Nikki continues to be on the frontlines, fighting for each Illinoisan every day that she’s in office. It’s so important to her that Illinoisans don’t just have a voice in Congress, but have someone who will _always_ fight to improve the quality of life of those she represents. [It’s so vital we keep Nikki in Congress, fighting on our behalf – but we need your support to do that. Nikki didn’t just stop at alerting our government officials of this growing problem – she’s also leading the charge for change in the halls of Congress. She stands as co-sponsor for the Food Deserts Act, a bill that would provide USDA funding to states to ensure affordable, healthy food is available for every family. She’s also fighting to ensure our nation’s budget includes full funding for programs like the Healthy Food Financing Initiative, which not only improves healthy food options but helps create and preserve jobs in underserved communities.

Once again, Nikki is proving that no task is too daunting – and when it comes to standing up for Illinoisans, she’s always all-in. But she’s in one of the most competitive seats in the entire country, and Republicans are already working to ensure they flip this seat red in 2024. If we want to ensure Nikki can continue her incredible work, we have to build the resources now to fight back.

The Democrats are laser-focused on Missouri, and they’re not taking their eyes off of us anytime soon. But you and I know that Missouri values will NEVER stand for their socialist agenda. Thank you, Josh Hawley | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: How our campaign is doing things differently
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWE_-MJDN7

A lot of campaigns are urging you to donate before their
self-constructed fundraising deadlines....

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWE_-MJDN7

Good morning friend,

A
lot of campaigns are urging you to donate before their
self-constructed fundraising deadlines. They're probably making
you feel terrible if you don't contribute too, aren't they?

At
Team DeSantis we're taking a different approach.

Our
entire fundraising & digital program's foundation is built on
this principle: Our donors are a part of our team; they are NOT
our personal piggy bank.

Look, I get it. Times are tough thanks to Joe Biden's Economy and
our team doesn't want to pressure you towards donating if you
can't afford it.

You
will never receive a solicitation from this campaign that
promises a fake match or degrades you for not donating.

No
smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.

That's what this campaign is all about, and I promise you, that's
the kind of President you will have when I am in the White House.

If
that sounds like the kind of campaign, you want to be a part of
today then please join Team DeSantis today by chipping in any
amount you can afford.

Chip in
$15

Chip in
$25

Chip in
$47

Chip in
$75

Chip in
$100

Chip in
$250

Chip in ANY AMOUNT to join Team DeSantis

Let's show the country we love that we're willing to fight for
it.

Chip in today to join Team DeSantis.

Yours in freedom,

Ron
DeSantis

Meet Ron DeSantis

A native Floridian with
blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked
his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors
and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also
graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard,
he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During
his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a
U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in
Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military
decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service
and the Iraq Campaign Medal.

Ron
also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and
convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and
advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget
amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose
malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their
authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion
conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading
champion for America's veterans and helped enact reforms to the
VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron
is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television
host. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters,
Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as
charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.
Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without
"green cards"), federal government contractors, and national
banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best
efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address,
occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose
aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The
maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600
($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple
using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary &
$6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute
$10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident
(i.e., green card holder).

This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not
being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose
of making this contribution.

I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card
and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued
to another person.

I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this
contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization,
national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal
contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

Tallahassee, FL 32315

name: John Fetterman
subject: I’m thinking about this a *lot*
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
All eyes are on us as we fight to re-elect Bob.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=85%2E552475%2EzzIbHc)
Peter,
I want to share something I’m thinking about a *lot*.
Bob Casey’s Senate seat is gonna be a real toss-up, and the Democratic majority we fought so hard to keep could hinge on what happens in PA in 2024. All eyes are on us as we fight to re-elect Bob.
Don’t just take my word for it — CNN has rated Pennsylvania one of the top 10 competitive Senate seats in the country. That’s why helping Bob and his team reach their upcoming end-of-month fundraising goal is so critical _right now._
**[Peter, if we’re going to defend our control of the Senate, we need your help. Please, can you chip in anything today to help win another term for Bob Casey?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230526-1?refcode=em20230526-1&refcode2=85_552475_zzIbHc&akid=85%2E552475%2EzzIbHc)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230526-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230526-1&refcode2=85_552475_zzIbHc&akid=85%2E552475%2EzzIbHc)**
Republicans have made it clear that Social Security, Medicare, Medicaid, reproductive freedoms, and protections for working families are all on the chopping block if they retake control of the Senate.
We can’t let that happen — there is simply too much on the line. But in order to defend our freedoms and keep the government working for working people, we need momentum on the side of Bob Casey aaaaaall the way to Election Day.
**[So if you can, please, make a donation to reach Bob Casey’s end-of-month goal and send him to another term with me in the Senate.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230526-1?refcode=em20230526-1&refcode2=85_552475_zzIbHc&akid=85%2E552475%2EzzIbHc)**
Online supporters were how we flipped PA blue last year, and I know yinz + youse will come through for Bob this time too! 🙏
Thank you,
💛 John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator, Pennsylvania

* * *

name: Team Andy Kim
subject: A Congress that will do right by the American people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
Like you, we are frustrated as we watch Speaker McCarthy bring Congress and our country to a halt.

We've seen this lack of leadership before. In 2018, we saw Andy step up and win in a district that Washington Republicans thought was safe.

Since then, Andy's leadership has inspired this movement that is focused on working for the American people and staying out of partisan bickering.

Here at Team Andy, we believe in the power of good government.

When leaders like Andy are committed to respect and service, the partisan divide begins to close, and the temperatures come down.

We are approaching our end-of-month fundraising deadline. It's important we have a strong showing of support to send a message that we want leaders who will serve the American people above all else. Can you donate $12 today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-05-26-eom-hope&recurring=&amount=12&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=5a811237-e9fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73]

Andy says all the time that he got into politics for his boys. He truly wants future generations to inherit a thriving democracy and grow up in a country where they can follow their dreams.

body:
Peter Willis, did you see
our message about how Bernie Sanders predicted last November that
Republicans would hold our economy hostage by refusing to raise the debt
ceiling.

The establishment failed to listen, and now we are only days away from the
potential collapse of the American economy – as soon as June 1!

establishment insists on burying their heads in the sand, it’s up to us to
fight Republican fascism and defend our freedom. Please chip in here as a
founding donor!

—Begin Forwarded Message—

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8681?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230526_FR_FightFascismFund_1.2_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_FightFascismFund&t=1010&akid=4320%2E5885482%2Exd3Sd8 ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

As soon as June 1, America could default
for the first time in history and trigger an economic catastrophe – all
because fascist Republicans are refusing to do their duty and pay for
spending they already authorized unless Joe Biden agrees to horrific
budget cuts.

Bernie Sanders warned of this exact scenario before the midterm elections
and urged Congress to take action to ensure our bills were paid before
Republicans took over.

Because corporate Democrats failed to listen, we are now just days away
from a default that could end social security payments for tens of
millions of vulnerable seniors and disabled folks, spike unemployment to
great depression levels, decimate retirement accounts, and much more.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8681?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230526_FR_FightFascismFund_1.2_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_FightFascismFund&t=1011&akid=4320%2E5885482%2Exd3Sd8 ]Bernie Sanders and Our Revolution knew Republicans would hold our
economy hostage because, unlike the establishment, we have a clear-eyed
view of exactly who they are – fascists who will do literally anything for
power. That’s why we’re launching our Fight Fascism Fund to stand up to
Republican terrorist tactics and defend our neighbors before it’s too
late. Can we count on you to chip in as a founding donor?

Our Revolution will process immediately.

Giving in to the Republican terrorist tactics on the debt ceiling would
have disastrous consequences – but that hasn’t stopped corporate puppets
like Joe Manchin, Kyrsten Sinema and the No Labels funded “Problem Solvers
Caucus” from calling on President Biden to cave to their evil demands.

They’re fighting to slash support for education, law enforcement, public
safety, meals on Wheels, and more.

No Labels is funded by some of the worst fascist Republican donors and is
currently working on getting a third party ticket on the ballot headed by
Joe Manchin that would all but guarantee a Trump or DeSantis victory.

As the noose of fascism continues to tighten around the neck of Americans,
the corporate establishment continues to be asleep at the wheel. That’s
why we’re launching the Fight Fascism Fund, and the stakes are total for

body:

Right now, my Democrat opponent is SMASHING fundraising records, and we’re falling behind.

I know 2024 seems a long way off, but the road to victory has already begun.

This is going to be one of the closest races in America, and I can’t trust just anyone on such an important mission.

_That’s why I’m trusting you, Fellow American._

**[I only want the most dedicated patriots on my team, and YOU made the cut. I know we can win, but I need to make sure you’re on board. Will you join Team Hawley today to WIN in 2024?>>>>](http://links.gopwin.org/u/click?_t=880bb7f57f984ec39ea5a13773012007&_m=027f138891914b3aa6e7873193604184&_e=cs72dG5Orp4XNN00xGxfpIXnufK6J_CZlH5d_fZeanlHHaNKNK9gEvKV22BqSMU6IMCFaO24gssdfbAKte-YV5XQRreKCdQ-QhwnoqL3tL1izTVhNgpqZs1unUg6S9BAjlRPc7TWxdax_OJRLkmbFQzLPtS75mBzK8I1hSZv0OpTeiArp8Y88P4kyDh9_1ApesaB1rA-4Yb_hYheobV7Cx2QBUYnxyoKECco4UGFfzVkYtTByr6xwzk1o3CcaBhTTIndXWwfpNPMz0cgFQlFhZVocpSzrz3zSLUVFxuZUrvGSjLdhQXURAbZKz3BuKhFaQ5xi3yKkJmEgYYb-wECpUXY8F06eb9su8rEV7GWy7VU-ehZw08vePIxA0WC5xLDlisks8yms5khlkobnMT3nw%3D%3D)**

The Democrats are laser-focused on Missouri, and they’re not taking their eyes off of us anytime soon.

They know that we can’t count on big tech or Silicon Valley to support us, so they’re bussing the big dollars into our state.

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Let me tell you about the Missouri I grew up in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
And why Josh Hawley doesn’t know a thing about it.
#
Hey Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce.
I know you've probably heard a lot from me and my team about Josh Hawley's new book lately, but I wanted to take just a little more of your time today to tell you about the Missouri I grew up in — and why, just like his take on manhood, Hawley doesn’t know a thing about it.
So before I ask you to **[chip in $10 or anything at all to my grassroots campaign,](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33501?refcode=em20230526-3177&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3177%2E614464%2Enl0eg5) will you please give me a moment to explain more?**
**[CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33501?refcode=em20230526-3177&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3177%2E614464%2Enl0eg5)**
On the right is Joshua Hawley. While his banker daddy was sending him to a fancy prep school miles from his hometown, my family and I were relying on our neighbors to survive bankruptcy and medical bills in mid-Missouri — in a community where people took care of each other. That’s us on the left.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33501?refcode=em20230526-3177&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3177%2E614464%2Enl0eg5)
When Hawley graduated from law school, he joined one of the world’s most elite corporate law firms. I joined the Marine Corps to pay back the community in Missouri that took care of me and my family. And when he was climbing the ladder to become another corrupt politician, I was serving my country — and then working to prevent the pointless overseas wars that make us less safe.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33501?refcode=em20230526-3177&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3177%2E614464%2Enl0eg5)
While Josh Hawley aligned himself with the same giant corporations who’ve spent decades attacking Missouri workers and shipping away our jobs, I’ve been fighting to take back power for American workers and small businesses.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33501?refcode=em20230526-3177&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=3177%2E614464%2Enl0eg5)
And when Hawley voted against relief for veterans like me who were exposed to toxic burn pits, I stood up alongside thousands of veterans to hold him accountable.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33501?refcode=em20230526-3177&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=3177%2E614464%2Enl0eg5)
**The Missouri I grew up in taught us to take care of one another.** To do your duty. To serve and sacrifice for your fellow Missourians.
**Josh Hawley doesn’t know that Missouri — and on January 6th, 2021, he showed us the only thing he’s learned is how to be a fraud and a coward.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33501?refcode=em20230526-3177&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=7&akid=3177%2E614464%2Enl0eg5)
Josh Hawley hasn't just abandoned our state and our values. He's embarrassed himself and all of Missouri. And embarrassing Missouri... That’s something I can't let go.
**Missourians deserve a U.S. Senator who will stand up and fight for them — and unlike Josh, I'm ready to serve.** If you’re on board to help us make sure every Missouri voter knows it before they vote on Election Day, I need your help:
**[Will you chip in any amount you can afford to our campaign right now so we can start off strong and keep getting our message in front of voters? The only way we’ll be able to flip this Senate seat is if we keep up our record-breaking grassroots momentum, and support from real people like you is the best way we can do it.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33501?refcode=em20230526-3177&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=3177%2E614464%2Enl0eg5)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33502?refcode=em20230526-3177&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=9&akid=3177%2E614464%2Enl0eg5) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33502?refcode=em20230526-3177&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=10&akid=3177%2E614464%2Enl0eg5) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33502?refcode=em20230526-3177&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=11&akid=3177%2E614464%2Enl0eg5) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33502?refcode=em20230526-3177&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=12&akid=3177%2E614464%2Enl0eg5) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33502?refcode=em20230526-3177&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=13&akid=3177%2E614464%2Enl0eg5) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33502?refcode=em20230526-3177&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=14&akid=3177%2E614464%2Enl0eg5) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33501?refcode=em20230526-3177&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=15&akid=3177%2E614464%2Enl0eg5)

Thank you,
— Lucas

clean_body: Each month, our team sets fundraising goals designed to establish a strong campaign foundation. | Peter, It’s Whitney, Abigail’s Finance Director. I wanted to touch base before the end of the month and re-share an important message from Abigail about building momentum for our campaign. Each month, our team sets fundraising goals designed to establish a strong campaign foundation = | = Read more from Abigail about why goals like these matter here: = Peter, I know you hear a lot from other campaigns about their emergency fundraising deadlines and how vital it is that they reach the goals they set. Well, I’d like to give that sentiment some much-needed context. Our campaign is always looking to the horizon, and our monthly fundraising goals are the roadmap to another powerful campaign victory. We don’t set our goals arbitrarily; we shape our path to winning with intent. So when you hear from me or my team about how critical reaching our fundraising goal is, know that we mean it genuinely. With that in mind, we’re nearing the end of May, = | = Thank you for your faith in our campaign, Abigail | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress P.O. subject: Let's remember
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/maherforcongress/what-is-biden-afraid-of-12606012?e=1722d05e10)
---
| |
---
| |
May 26, 2023

Friend,

Today begins our commemoration of Memorial Day weekend—a weekend where we remember those who have died in service to our nation. As a military veteran, this weekend has special meaning for me, as I remember those brothers and sisters who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedom.

This weekend I will not be asking for any contributions or focusing on my campaign. My only request is that you take time over the weekend to fly your American flag, and remember those service members who died in defense of the United States of America.

Thank you for your time, and may God bless America and the families of all those fallen soldiers, sailors, airmen, and Marines.

Sincerely,
---
|
---
| **Michael Maher**
Businessman | Veteran | Republican for Congress
---
|
---
| _**Background** : Michael Maher is a former FBI Special Agent and US Navy Veteran who was raised in the Central Valley. Michael and his wife, Ann, are raising their young family in Fresno County, and he owns and operates an aviation business. Michael was the 2022 nominee for California's 21st Congressional District._

name: Sara (personal)
subject: An honest email about campaign fundraising
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Team - before you sign off for the weekend:
I’ve said this before and I know I’m going to keep saying it throughout my career - I’m not a huge fan of asking people for money. There are so many causes, organizations, and great candidates out there, and look - I’m self-aware enough to know that you just can’t give money every single time you get an email asking you to!
But after two successful campaigns, I’ve learned a lot about why we need to make these asks. Winning an election, no matter how you slice it, takes a lot of resources.
And the things we do to win elections - knocking on doors, running ads online and on TV, building up websites, making phone calls, talking to people out in the community - are meaningful. Bringing people into the electoral process - empowering folks to feel connected to their leaders, to know that they have a real stake in their leaders and our government... it’s a big deal.
So before this email gets too long and you hit that delete button - to help fund that critical voter outreach, will you pitch in $5, $10, or whatever you can to my re-election campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Like they do every month, my team has set a goal that I’m working to reach. For the last five days of May, as we get ready to head into the final month of the quarter (and inch closer to that big FEC filing deadline at the end of June!), we’re aiming to raise another $2,500 through emails like this one.
So if you can, I’m asking you to be a part of this work.
Please, chip in any amount towards our $2,500 end-of-May email fundraising goal, and help build up a strong and inclusive re-election campaign that will bring new voters into the process. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Thank you so much for anything you can give. I really appreciate it.
-Sara

Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

name: Team Bennet
subject: One of Michael’s top priorities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63870715/408265341/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjgwMDkwZC1lZGZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=37y-4aB0IWbTJ-QlDWNv-SEwGxns2o6XkovbbIZxbOk=)
Friend, Colorado is home to more than 400,000 veterans. Michael’s goal is to make sure they have access, here in Colorado, to the care and services they need to thrive during and after their service. This is the least we can do for the servicemembers and families who have given so much for this country. Here’s a quick overview of issues he’s taken on: **_Veterans and Healthcare_** Michael has pushed hard to ensure that veterans in Colorado receive quality care — for their physical and mental health. He supported legislation to improve Veterans Affairs facilities, co-sponsored and passed a bill to combat the suicide crisis, and made sure that our veterans in rural areas don’t get left behind. In 2022, he helped pass the PACT Act, which expanded health coverage to 3.5 million toxic-exposed veterans. This was the largest expansion of veterans' healthcare in decades.
* * *
_**Supporting Veterans at Home**_ Veterans missing out on payments for education and housing because of wait times, IT glitches, or COVID-19 is unacceptable. Michael made sure that the Office of Veterans Affairs addressed these issues, and passed legislation to support them in the process. He’s also championed a bipartisan bill to create support networks for veterans upon returning home. These hubs make it easier for veterans and their families to find employment, financial services, and behavioral health services.
* * *
**_Veterans in the Workforce_** Michael worked to pass a bipartisan bill that helps train veterans and transition military personnel to work in clean energy, cybersecurity, and artificial intelligence. He’s also ensured that veterans have access to job recruitment and entrepreneurship training when they return home.
* * *
On Monday, when we celebrate Memorial Day, we’ll honor those who made the ultimate sacrifice while serving in the armed forces. But we must also commit ourselves to doing everything we can for the brave men and women who came home. Michael will never stop working for our veterans, in Colorado and across the country. Thanks for your support in this fight. Onwards, — _Team Bennet_ | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63870718/408265344/1557969388?refcode=x_052623_veterans_act_SL2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjgwMDkwZC1lZGZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=37y-4aB0IWbTJ-QlDWNv-SEwGxns2o6XkovbbIZxbOk=)**

clean_body: | = Friend, Colorado is home to more than 400,000 veterans. Michael’s goal is to make sure they have access, here in Colorado, to the care and services they need to thrive during and after their service. This is the least we can do for the servicemembers and families who have given so much for this country. Here’s a quick overview of issues he’s taken on: Veterans and Healthcare Michael has pushed hard to ensure that veterans in Colorado receive quality care — for their physical and mental health. He supported legislation to improve Veterans Affairs facilities, co-sponsored and passed a bill to combat the suicide crisis, and made sure that our veterans in rural areas don’t get left behind. In 2022, he helped pass the PACT Act, which expanded health coverage to 3.5 million toxic-exposed veterans. This was the largest expansion of veterans' healthcare in decades. Supporting Veterans at Home Veterans missing out on payments for education and housing because of wait times, IT glitches, or COVID-19 is unacceptable. Michael made sure that the Office of Veterans Affairs addressed these issues, and passed legislation to support them in the process. He’s also championed a bipartisan bill to create support networks for veterans upon returning home. These hubs make it easier for veterans and their families to find employment, financial services, and behavioral health services. Veterans in the Workforce Michael worked to pass a bipartisan bill that helps train veterans and transition military personnel to work in clean energy, cybersecurity, and artificial intelligence. He’s also ensured that veterans have access to job recruitment and entrepreneurship training when they return home. On Monday, when we celebrate Memorial Day, we’ll honor those who made the ultimate sacrifice while serving in the armed forces. But we must also commit ourselves to doing everything we can for the brave men and women who came home. Michael will never stop working for our veterans, in Colorado and across the country. Thanks for your support in this fight. Onwards, — Team Bennet | = Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: How our campaign is doing things differently
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
This campaign is around the principle that our donors are a part of this team.
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1e59b22c31e840b6bf5aa91ceb611df0&_e=kkhZfDxWgfQgADal-exvscj2-Lx8MTbWeoEboVPdAKVHofA6bECw0hvmF5SX97r39TvM2QZoDmWWRILLwTVU9GkGpcCTtgKGl-HXczQxgeARWJzz0d74bmqaR-lQD_OhAPY__yhMmcDI5Ukq8ejnuZj8L8WWPxbDsjc4RztFo26shehhi_t72YaxZ7xCoWyBSKFN-Xut-2Im_CY7W8hf3l5xnUvQzfgZ_EmCwksm7vLYxv5szS2gsNRBxzLLl6KyneUN11cn1RlN_iXP6ma8qjzHmop4lH02tNh9kXiTKx8GUFfczfnnYDuyzu3zEkA7oqHhMt_HXy2ePV8v33dON1FNAsXPS8qlQOsMSWjQWQG_H1mcU4HfDmf9xVvBlmtgnAWSZoOZnpUDoY8QBX0eofdKBtk83yk7-PZC1qAzIwDcUQ0fRoX2fzNqh4MSmM6t)
---

Good afternoon Peter,

A lot of campaigns are urging you to donate before their self-constructed fundraising deadlines. They're probably making you feel terrible if you don't contribute too, aren't they?

At Team DeSantis we're taking a different approach.

Our entire fundraising & digital program's foundation is built on this principle: Our donors are a part of our team; they are NOT our personal piggy bank.

Look, I get it. Times are tough thanks to Joe Biden's Economy and our team doesn't want to pressure you towards donating if you can't afford it.

You will never receive a solicitation from this campaign that promises a fake match or degrades you for not donating.

No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.

That's what this campaign is all about, and I promise you, that's the kind of President you will have when I am in the White House.

If that sounds like the kind of campaign, you want to be a part of today then **_[please join Team DeSantis today by chipping in any amount you can afford.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1e59b22c31e840b6bf5aa91ceb611df0&_e=kkhZfDxWgfQgADal-exvscj2-Lx8MTbWeoEboVPdAKVHofA6bECw0hvmF5SX97r39TvM2QZoDmWWRILLwTVU9IoLRbCLGdpZZ6CVPKBiCVfpxSbUUi6Q9WRLZtKAY2Ecpssa9Y9ERNSvtczmffgB4Ai7izRjxIRPThBJl7s6LBzq-In669ypRVEydrJkTXp_Si3ycG9JcGGl9xtiH6LYCmr5S6TP6bKaiTq3zkzCchLNP4bwHofzt7gFORwzS8tVt7KuTclLEXNhlP3Z25r0NFbnB5hwx_0lqlSYwTUM2cdiaiwPsiPwz8SSVeA7xn7eC5O5RhYRi-jswxjek8wCgx1mMmQZAVdOsNkruKXv-msG9WsM4RRTbu8TFyZaA43Jl4K8NITOjsIxT3QUQ8ZdBYb-YsQ8JSCs0rHo9PB1bgI%3D "please join Team DeSantis today by chipping in any amount you can afford. | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America's veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|

Peter,

We thought the government was pressuring Big Tech to censor stories about Hunter Biden’s foreign business dealings and his laptop days before the 2020 presidential election...**then brave journalists exposed the Twitter Files.**

We thought that it was likely that COVID came from a lab. Then FBI Director Christopher Wray confirmed this spring that coronavirus likely stemmed from a lab leak in Wuhan.

We thought the Steele Dossier was fake. Then we found out the **Democrats knew the dossier was false but used it to spy on President Trump’s campaign in 2016.**

**With every new bit of infomation we find that the truth is always worse than we thought.**

Whether it is the CDC or the DOJ, the FBI and social media companies taking down posts and limiting speech, **federal agencies are targeting the American people who they are supposed to serve**. And the Democrats? **They always seem to turn a blind eye and move on.**

**I am in Washington to fight for YOU**. I don’t think the government should be targeting people on the Right OR the Left. clean_body: We thought the Steele Dossier was fake. Then we found out the Democrats knew the dossier was false but used it to spy on President Trump’s campaign in 2016. | | Peter, We thought the government was pressuring Big Tech to censor stories about Hunter Biden’s foreign business dealings and his laptop days before the 2020 presidential election...then brave journalists exposed the Twitter Files. We thought that it was likely that COVID came from a lab. Then FBI Director Christopher Wray confirmed this spring that coronavirus likely stemmed from a lab leak in Wuhan. We thought the Steele Dossier was fake. Then we found out the Democrats knew the dossier was false but used it to spy on President Trump’s campaign in 2016. With every new bit of infomation we find that the truth is always worse than we thought. Whether it is the CDC or the DOJ, the FBI and social media companies taking down posts and limiting speech, federal agencies are targeting the American people who they are supposed to serve. And the Democrats? They always seem to turn a blind eye and move on. I am in Washington to fight for YOU. I don’t think the government should be targeting people on the Right OR the Left. But I must admit, this fight has put a HUGE target on my back , one that will no doubt grow larger as the election approaches, . I’ll never stop standing on the frontlines in defense of our constitutionally enshrined liberties. That said, I need my supporters at the ready – because the Democrats will do whatever they can to take me out of Washington. As a personal favor to me, Make no mistake, Peter - our way of life is under attack from the Left, and I need my team of top supporters willing to stand by my side to help push back against the assaults on limited government and individual liberty.I need your help to fight back against those who want to transform our great Republic into a socialist utopia. name: Charles Harper, Evergreen Action
subject: Add Your Name: Cut Climate Pollution from Power Plants
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN COLLABORATIVE
body:
Every voice counts
| | | | |
---
|
---
| | **The time to cut climate pollution from power plants is now. ** **Tell EPA to rapidly finalize the strongest possible limits.**
---
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-clean-up-climate-pollution/?source=ema_2023_05_26_111rules_comments&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=100clean&utm_source=email2023_05_26&t=3&akid=13327%2E53494%2E469Afv)
---
| | Friend, The climate crisis is here, impacting our families and communities, and the U.S. is not on track to cut climate pollution fast enough. But President Biden's long-awaited proposed rules for power plants are out—and if they’re strengthened, they could make a huge difference (think **90 percent reductions** in emissions from certain power plants). Unfortunately, the rules don't cover the majority of fossil fuel power plants, and don’t require the plants that are covered to act fast enough. Science demands these rules go further, faster. [**Call on EPA to strengthen the rules.**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-clean-up-climate-pollution/?source=ema_2023_05_26_111rules_comments&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=100clean&utm_source=email2023_05_26&t=4&akid=13327%2E53494%2E469Afv)
---
[**SEND YOUR COMMENT**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-clean-up-climate-pollution/?source=ema_2023_05_26_111rules_comments&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=100clean&utm_source=email2023_05_26&t=6&akid=13327%2E53494%2E469Afv)
---
We'll deliver your comments directly to the decision makers at EPA. These new climate pollution standards for power plants can be the most effective tool the Biden Administration has to fight the climate crisis, but the rules don’t go far enough—and Big Polluters are going to do all they can to keep spewing carbon pollution into our atmosphere and our communities. No matter where we come from, we all want healthy communities and a climate-safe future for our families, and **these rules are our best chance to tackle climate pollution from power plants before Biden’s first term is over. This is your opportunity to ensure they use it.**
---
[ADD YOUR VOICE NOW](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-clean-up-climate-pollution/?source=ema_2023_05_26_111rules_comments&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=100clean&utm_source=email2023_05_26&t=8&akid=13327%2E53494%2E469Afv)
---
Sincerely, Charles Harper Senior Policy Lead, Power SectorEvergreen Collaborative
---
|
---
**P.S.** We have just a short window of time to speak up and tell EPA to rapidly pass the strongest possible power plant rules, [**so add your name now.**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-clean-up-climate-pollution/?source=ema_2023_05_26_111rules_comments&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=100clean&utm_source=email2023_05_26&t=9&akid=13327%2E53494%2E469Afv)

The debt ceiling has been making headlines – so I wanted to take some time to explain what's going on.
Back in 2017, Republicans blew a $2 trillion hole in the deficit to give a tax handout to billionaires and corporations. I warned back then that Republicans would turn on working people and the middle class to pay for their tax giveaways, and unfortunately, now I'm being proved right.
**To pay for their tax cuts, instead of making billionaires and corporations pay their fair share, Republicans in Congress want working families to foot the bill.** They're gunning for everything from food assistance programs to public education, veterans' benefits, and everything else in between.
**Republicans are showing the American people their true colors** – working overtime to slash taxes for their billionaire donors and taking food away from kids to pay for it, and threatening to force our country into default if Democrats don't support their scam to help the rich get richer.
Let me be clear: Republicans' plan is a nonstarter in the Senate. I will not support any legislation that makes it harder for vulnerable families to get the help they need.
**Nothing unites Republicans like cutting taxes for the rich and forcing kids into poverty, but I know our movement is stronger.**
I will not stop fighting with all my heart to protect American families from Republicans' schemes.
More soon,
_Ron_
