clean_body: | | | I'll say it again: Nothing unites Republicans in Congress like cutting taxes for the rich and forcing kids into poverty, but I know our movement is stronger. = = Last week, I told you what's really happening with the debt ceiling debate. Today, Republicans in Congress are still playing the same games.= Ron Forwarded Message | The debt ceiling has been making headlines – so I wanted to take some time to explain what's going on. Back in 2017, Republicans blew a $2 trillion hole in the deficit to give a tax handout to billionaires and corporations. I warned back then that Republicans would turn on working people and the middle class to pay for their tax giveaways, and unfortunately, now I'm being proved right. To pay for their tax cuts, instead of making billionaires and corporations pay their fair share, Republicans in Congress want working families to foot the bill. They're gunning for everything from food assistance programs to public education, veterans' benefits, and everything else in between. Republicans are showing the American people their true colors – working overtime to slash taxes for their billionaire donors and taking food away from kids to pay for it, and threatening to force our country into default if Democrats don't support their scam to help the rich get richer. Let me be clear: Republicans' plan is a nonstarter in the Senate. I will not support any legislation that makes it harder for vulnerable families to get the help they need. Nothing unites Republicans like cutting taxes for the rich and forcing kids into poverty, but I know our movement is stronger. I will not stop fighting with all my heart to protect American families from Republicans' schemes. More soon, Ron Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. Box 3498 Portland, OR 97208 United States Email is an important way for Ron Wyden to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Add your signature and pledge to vote for President Biden! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/pledge-to-vote-2024/source=VPP_20230526_EMPET_E2_T0_AC?t=7&akid=7967%2E878179%2E6Rgxoh) | **YOUR 2024 VOTER PLEDGE DUE BY MIDNIGHT**

President Biden has made INCREDIBLE progress for our country — from creating thousands of jobs to confirming a progressive Supreme Court Justice and so much more.

But now, the MAGA mob is launching all-out ATTACKS to destroy Biden’s reelection chances...** _and polls show it’s working!_**

[So we need YOU to take the pledge TODAY to show massive grassroots support for President Biden! Add your name before midnight and pledge to vote in 2024 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/pledge-to-vote-2024/source=VPP_20230526_EMPET_E2_T0_AC?t=9&akid=7967%2E878179%2E6Rgxoh)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=7967%2E878179%2E6Rgxoh). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=7967%2E878179%2E6Rgxoh).**

name: Ron DeSantis for President
subject: How our campaign is doing things differently
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
This campaign is around the principle that our donors are a part of this team.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=53e4bc48d29c4d93be8771a749879936&_e=Sd91udysEFB8ifpKclneTKNeQ-zC-spMwfm9Ss1T7KvzYev04mjVG0513o4-qnY7w2qDUBSGxfg6FBinxNLJfBu67n6dR-a04dVvdCt1JsPvAMuKHioBBnZEN8xhIXYtV-f21mmFcF9kDE4s7jNKl-6uBmqb5d9pDUYjW-vfbdMjz8CloeYqa6JXOZCDhdgg_AXtxdi_IVM724fTL8jg8S6WeYtivWKpqwVQIpGZ29nNOECKnB_ldOWSFbsgahOSDOLeNgLSeKPlJhr8oshv5l51T4ODSQUQr4hk8Wdv_XIaSlVIkkzEqXM0fTr_u1OAMduT4mWubz3Qbuja9c_UysB8Itky0riweDn73bdGp5wRI3YiXPdo2IE_8XnAG90_sbM19KhC2-vL5rZ1PDZer1OSSwP_NjEhfrlBlNTgSB3i5VercMceCWT7Fvo2bLyvBQoxRJQ4C7APKd0MX1Cevw%3D%3D)
---

Hello Friend,

A lot of campaigns are urging you to donate before their self-constructed fundraising deadlines. They're probably making you feel terrible if you don't contribute too, aren't they?

At Team DeSantis we're taking a different approach.

Our entire fundraising & digital program's foundation is built on this principle: Our donors are a part of our team; they are NOT our personal piggy bank.

Look, I get it. Times are tough thanks to Joe Biden's Economy and our team doesn't want to pressure you towards donating if you can't afford it.

You will never receive a solicitation from this campaign that promises a fake match or degrades you for not donating.

No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.

That's what this campaign is all about, and I promise you, that's the kind of President you will have when I am in the White House.

If that sounds like the kind of campaign, you want to be a part of today then **_[please join Team DeSantis today by chipping in any amount you can afford.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=53e4bc48d29c4d93be8771a749879936&_e=Sd91udysEFB8ifpKclneTKNeQ-zC-spMwfm9Ss1T7KvzYev04mjVG0513o4-qnY7w2qDUBSGxfg6FBinxNLJfBu67n6dR-a04dVvdCt1JsPvAMuKHioBBnZEN8xhIXYtV-f21mmFcF9kDE4s7jNKl-6uBmqb5d9pDUYjW-vfbdMjz8CloeYqa6JXOZCDhdgg_AXtxdi_IVM724fTL8jg8S6WeYtivWKpqwVQIpGZ29nNOECKnB_ldOWSFbsgahOSDOLeNgLSeKPlJhr8oshv5l51T4ODSQUQr4hk8Wdv_XIaSlVIkkzEqXM0fTr_u1OAEMcP39Tcv2CHhkVjA2W_3RnFA2XGwCItG-YDXgaJ0tGZk6Z6s8kmQXiA_ZN8OU0ztnPN67iSygdy8Whp-Syx8T1b7Hc3lRkanqe6NrUcbhDGFZsHSQcBLYbXJqpjRBWSyM7gkkHCbgDj0peZapZPJA%3D%3D "please join Team DeSantis today by chipping in any amount you can afford. | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America's veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

But to reelect Biden-Harris and take back the majority in the House, we must unite our urban and rural communities on cross-cutting issues.

As a member of the Agricultural Committee, Shontel has seen firsthand how our issues boil down to the same core message. **From health care disparities to access to broadband and high-speed internet,_the people want investment in our communities._**

With the strongest infrastructure investment in decades and our largest investment in clean energy in history, our 2022 Democratic majority delivered, putting more money in everyday Americans' pockets. **But to continue building on that progress, we must take back the House in 2024.**

As a member of the Agricultural Committee, Shontel has seen firsthand how our issues boil down to the same core message. From health care disparities to access to broadband and high-speed internet,the people want investment in our communities. With the strongest infrastructure investment in decades and our largest investment in clean energy in history, our 2022 Democratic majority delivered, putting more money in everyday Americans' pockets. |

| | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63872825/408272889/1695689683?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_230526_FR_LongestEmail_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWNmNGMzZS1mMWZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iWUawuar_aCuGCrhPaKGVV53hmuTOqO_tPkKU2CRC04=) Folks, this is the longest email I’ll ever send you, but it’s important, so I hope you’ll spare a few minutes to read it through. Since the launch of Defend Democracy PAC, I’ve been truly blown away by the support and enthusiasm from this grassroots team. **[(If you haven’t yet had a chance to donate this month, you can pitch in here.)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63872826/408272890/1695689683?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_230526_FR_LongestEmail_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWNmNGMzZS1mMWZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iWUawuar_aCuGCrhPaKGVV53hmuTOqO_tPkKU2CRC04=)** Together, we’re going to create real change for Virginia. Now that election season is really starting to heat up, I want to outline our strategy to elect Democrats across the Commonwealth. _**Level the Playing Field**_ Virginia has some of the most laid-back campaign finance laws in the country, which Republicans have taken enormous advantage of in recent years. We need to prepare for the incoming flood of right-wing cash instead of getting swept away by it. **Organizations like ours have a responsibility to help level the playing field against the GOP political machine.** That's why I launched Defend Democracy PAC as a state-level PAC, which gives us significant leeway to fundraise and invest resources here in Virginia. _**Defend Democracy**_ Virginia’s democratic tradition dates back over four hundred years, but the GOP’s authoritarian tactics are putting our institutions under enormous pressure. **Defend Democracy PAC’s core mission is to ensure that democracy endures in the Commonwealth.** We're working to debunk dangerous election conspiracies, protect and expand voting rights, and guarantee that elections are free, fair, and secure. And most importantly, we're supporting candidates who share our unwavering committment to democracy, equality, freedom, and truth at every step of the way. _**Support Democrats in Key Races**_ Republicans are aggressively targeting the vast majority of elections taking place in Virginia this year. If we’re going to keep up, we need to stretch our resources as far as they can go. Defend Democracy PAC’s ethos is simple: Let the evidence guide us, invest efficiently, and don’t hesitate to innovate. That’s how we can effectively support Democratic candidates in key races and make critical inroads with voters across the Commonwealth. **But with all that said, we need your help to reach our May fundraising goal so we can stay competitive in what’s sure to be a historically expensive election cycle.** **[So, I’m humbly asking: Will you chip in $25 or more to help Defend Democracy PAC build a safe, secure, and democratic Virginia for all?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63872827/408272891/1695689683?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_230526_FR_LongestEmail_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWNmNGMzZS1mMWZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iWUawuar_aCuGCrhPaKGVV53hmuTOqO_tPkKU2CRC04=)** | | | [Donate $25 ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63872828/408272892/1695689683?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_230526_FR_LongestEmail_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWNmNGMzZS1mMWZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iWUawuar_aCuGCrhPaKGVV53hmuTOqO_tPkKU2CRC04=)

Since the launch of Defend Democracy PAC, I’ve been truly blown away by the support and enthusiasm from this grassroots team. = Together, we’re going to create real change for Virginia. Now that election season is really starting to heat up, I want to outline our strategy to elect Democrats across the Commonwealth. Level the Playing Field Virginia has some of the most laid-back campaign finance laws in the country, which Republicans have taken enormous advantage of in recent years. We need to prepare for the incoming flood of right-wing cash instead of getting swept away by it. Organizations like ours have a responsibility to help level the playing field against the GOP political machine. That's why I launched Defend Democracy PAC as a state-level PAC, which gives us significant leeway to fundraise and invest resources here in Virginia. Defend Democracy Virginia’s democratic tradition dates back over four hundred years, but the GOP’s authoritarian tactics are putting our institutions under enormous pressure. Defend Democracy PAC’s core mission is to ensure that democracy endures in the Commonwealth. We're working to debunk dangerous election conspiracies, protect and expand voting rights, and guarantee that elections are free, fair, and secure. And most importantly, we're supporting candidates who share our unwavering committment to democracy, equality, freedom, and truth at every step of the way. Support Democrats in Key Races Republicans are aggressively targeting the vast majority of elections taking place in Virginia this year. If we’re going to keep up, we need to stretch our resources as far as they can go. Defend Democracy PAC’s ethos is simple: Let the evidence guide us, invest efficiently, and don’t hesitate to innovate. That’s how we can effectively support Democratic candidates in key races and make critical inroads with voters across the Commonwealth. But with all that said, we need your help to reach our May fundraising goal so we can stay competitive in what’s sure to be a historically expensive election cycle. = | | | = | | = Yours, Elaine Luria | | = | | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, | | = | | = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please click | Paid for by Defend Democracy PAC Defend Democracy PAC PO Box 66191 Virginia Beach, VA 23466

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: The Warrior Class
body:
* * *
Friend,

Exciting news to share - this Saturday we're launching 'The Warrior Class' docuseries nationally on local Fox television stations - in Philly, it'll be on Fox29. Please tune in and pass the word!

It's especially important because this Memorial Day weekend, we'll take you behind the scenes with the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, General Mark Milley. The backdrop of our interview is the National Constitution Center in Philadelphia, where we talk about the blueprint of our country, and what it means to support and defend the US Constitution against all enemies. We also talk about the longest wars in American history, and how we can never forget the losses of those who gave the ultimate sacrifice.
In this five-episode series, The Warrior Class uncovers the military's distinct American story at a time when the civilian-military divide is bigger than ever before.

As you may know, my unit in Iraq lost 19 paratroopers during the Iraq invasion, and I'm named after Army Specialist Patrick Ward, who gave the ultimate sacrifice and earned the Silver Star while saving his brothers in Vietnam. Memorial Day is very, very personal. This docuseries touches on what it means to sacrifice and serve. If you could tune in this Saturday 8am to watch 'The Warrior Class' on your local Fox television station, I'd really appreciate it. Until then, please remember to honor those who gave it all this Memorial Day on behalf of us - our Constitution - and our great country.

Yours in service,
Patrick J. Murphy
32nd Undersecretary of the Army
Former Congressman

**Socials**

clean_body: Friend, Exciting news to share - this Saturday we're launching 'The Warrior Class' docuseries nationally on local Fox television stations - in Philly, it'll be on Fox29. Please tune in and pass the word! It's especially important because this Memorial Day weekend, we'll take you behind the scenes with the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, General Mark Milley. The backdrop of our interview is the National Constitution Center in Philadelphia, where we talk about the blueprint of our country, and what it means to support and defend the US Constitution against all enemies. We also talk about the longest wars in American history, and how we can never forget the losses of those who gave the ultimate sacrifice. In this five-episode series, The Warrior Class uncovers the military's distinct American story at a time when the civilian-military divide is bigger than ever before. As you may know, my unit in Iraq lost 19 paratroopers during the Iraq invasion, and I'm named after Army Specialist Patrick Ward, who gave the ultimate sacrifice and earned the Silver Star while saving his brothers in Vietnam. Memorial Day is very, very personal. This docuseries touches on what it means to sacrifice and serve. If you could tune in this Saturday 8am to watch 'The Warrior Class' on your local Fox television station, I'd really appreciate it. Until then, please remember to honor those who gave it all this Memorial Day on behalf of us - our Constitution - and our great country. Yours in service, Patrick J. Murphy 32nd Undersecretary of the Army Former Congressman Socials** \- = \- = \- = \- If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

name: Team Trone
subject: Need your support to raise the debt ceiling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Trone for Maryland
body:
Hi friends,

In case you haven’t heard, MAGA Republicans are still refusing to raise the debt ceiling.

They’re literally willing to crash the entire economy for the sake of petty political games.

We’re calling on House Republicans to raise the debt ceiling immediately . This is important enough that we’re opening this up to citizen co-signers, and we need 350 people reading this email to add their names by midnight. Can we count on you to be one of them? >> https://secure.ngpvan.com/jtCqbsf1uUyC6ZOhcIVt-A2

Earlier this week, David called on Republicans to stop their antics and RAISE the debt ceiling immediately. He knows that American families are on the hook for paying their bills on time each month – Congress should absolutely do the same.

But instead of taking action to prevent our country from falling headfirst into an economic tailspin, Republicans are playing politics.

Now, we need you to make your voice heard too. Will you add your name to join David in calling on Republicans to raise the debt ceiling? >> https://secure.ngpvan.com/jtCqbsf1uUyC6ZOhcIVt-A2
Thank you for making your voice heard.

– Team Trone

name: Ron DeSantis for President
subject: Trust me when I say that you are not our piggybank
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-SZmOJ73o_d8vhIgKJAFg)
---

Friend,

A lot of campaigns are urging you to donate before their self-constructed fundraising deadlines. They’re probably making you feel terrible if you don’t contribute too, aren’t they?

At Team DeSantis we’re taking a different approach.

Our entire fundraising & digital program’s foundation is built on this principle: Our donors are a part of our team; they are NOT our personal piggy bank.

Look, I get it. Times are tough thanks to Joe Biden's Economy and our team doesn't want to pressure you towards donating if you can’t afford it.

You will never receive a solicitation from this campaign that promises a fake match or degrades you for not donating.

No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.

That’s what this campaign is all about, and I promise you, that's the kind of President you will have when I am in the White House.

If that sounds like the kind of campaign, you want to be a part of today then **_[please join Team DeSantis today by chipping in any amount you can afford.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject. "please join Team DeSantis today by chipping in any amount you can afford. ")_**

Chip in today to join Team DeSantis.

Yours in freedom,
---
|

Ron DeSantis

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTQ2LTQ1OTE0ZWQ4YTljNzRhNWJiZTkxZTdiNWViYzlkNzRkIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjkiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS53aW5yZWQuY29tLzIzOHlkMzJobzgxMi9zdXBwb3J0ZGVzYW50aXNsYXVuY2g_ZXhpdGludGVudD10cnVlIn0/DNzP6OrynhvAZNnNWVur5A)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America’s veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America’s veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President | This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315 Freedom First Project P.O. Box 523692 Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us to unsubscribe.

Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party’s weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. **** _2023 Hoosier Hospitality Dinner Just Three Weeks Away_ Save the date and make your plans to join the Indiana Democratic Party at the [2023 Hoosier Hospitality Dinner](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63873538/408274787/-1922907284?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjc1NmVjMy1mM2ZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=USBv33rGe-yVq7wvJNnVaKs22rqjLRbv30ACTJgOIsA=&emci=28905301-dafb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c2756ec3-f3fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)! This year’s dinner will take place on Friday, June 16th at the Indiana Convention Center. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63873539/408274788/-480930862?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjc1NmVjMy1mM2ZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=USBv33rGe-yVq7wvJNnVaKs22rqjLRbv30ACTJgOIsA=&emci=28905301-dafb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c2756ec3-f3fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) [Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63873540/408274789/-480930862?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjc1NmVjMy1mM2ZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=USBv33rGe-yVq7wvJNnVaKs22rqjLRbv30ACTJgOIsA=&emci=28905301-dafb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c2756ec3-f3fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) With the dinner just three weeks away, there is important news on the horizon regarding our keynote guest speaker. Make sure to [grab your tickets today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63873541/408274790/132778211?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjc1NmVjMy1mM2ZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=USBv33rGe-yVq7wvJNnVaKs22rqjLRbv30ACTJgOIsA=) to make sure you’re the first to know. We’re looking forward to seeing you and having a night of food and fellowship with Democrats from all across Indiana. [Buy your tickets here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63873542/408274791/132778211?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjc1NmVjMy1mM2ZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=USBv33rGe-yVq7wvJNnVaKs22rqjLRbv30ACTJgOIsA=). **** _Republicans are Playing Political Games and Bringing the Country Close to Default_ Republicans in Congress are threatening catastrophic cuts or devastating default for Hoosier families. As the country inches closer to a default, Republicans continue to play partisan politics with Indiana’s future and America’s economy. [__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63873543/408274792/622928814?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjc1NmVjMy1mM2ZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=USBv33rGe-yVq7wvJNnVaKs22rqjLRbv30ACTJgOIsA=&emci=28905301-dafb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c2756ec3-f3fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)[ Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63873544/408274793/622928814?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjc1NmVjMy1mM2ZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=USBv33rGe-yVq7wvJNnVaKs22rqjLRbv30ACTJgOIsA=&emci=28905301-dafb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c2756ec3-f3fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) All seven Indiana Republicans in the [U.S. House voted](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63873545/408274794/-938153999?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjc1NmVjMy1mM2ZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=USBv33rGe-yVq7wvJNnVaKs22rqjLRbv30ACTJgOIsA=&emci=28905301-dafb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c2756ec3-f3fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) for the Default on America Act that would cut veterans’ healthcare services for [100,000 Hoosier veterans](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63873546/408274795/-625757422?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjc1NmVjMy1mM2ZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=USBv33rGe-yVq7wvJNnVaKs22rqjLRbv30ACTJgOIsA=&emci=28905301-dafb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c2756ec3-f3fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) and increase Medicare and Social Security service wait times for [1.5 million seniors in Indiana](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63873547/408274796/-625757422?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjc1NmVjMy1mM2ZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=USBv33rGe-yVq7wvJNnVaKs22rqjLRbv30ACTJgOIsA=&emci=28905301-dafb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c2756ec3-f3fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535). Republicans need to stop their games and work with the President to make sure America pays its bills. [Read INDems release.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63873548/408274824/-613926796?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjc1NmVjMy1mM2ZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=USBv33rGe-yVq7wvJNnVaKs22rqjLRbv30ACTJgOIsA=&emci=28905301-dafb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c2756ec3-f3fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) ****_Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks._ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63873549/408274825/129740654?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjc1NmVjMy1mM2ZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=USBv33rGe-yVq7wvJNnVaKs22rqjLRbv30ACTJgOIsA=&emci=28905301-dafb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c2756ec3-f3fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) [Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63873550/408274826/129740654?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjc1NmVjMy1mM2ZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=USBv33rGe-yVq7wvJNnVaKs22rqjLRbv30ACTJgOIsA=&emci=28905301-dafb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c2756ec3-f3fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) [Legislation from Rep. Mike Andrade (Munster)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63873551/408274827/117596949?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjc1NmVjMy1mM2ZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=USBv33rGe-yVq7wvJNnVaKs22rqjLRbv30ACTJgOIsA=&emci=28905301-dafb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c2756ec3-f3fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) establishing the Stop the Bleed program passed both chambers during the legislative session and was recently signed into law by the Governor. This program provides local police departments with bleed kits to treat someone who is bleeding out. Often, police officers are the first to arrive on the scene and do not have these vital tools. Rep. Andrade [commented earlier this year on the bill](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63873552/408274828/1749667288?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjc1NmVjMy1mM2ZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=USBv33rGe-yVq7wvJNnVaKs22rqjLRbv30ACTJgOIsA=&emci=28905301-dafb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c2756ec3-f3fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535): “Law enforcement up in our area, and throughout the state, don't have the resources, don't have the funding to be able to get the bleeding control kit. I think, when it comes down to saving someone's life, there's no price to it." **__** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63873553/408274829/1392793104?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjc1NmVjMy1mM2ZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=USBv33rGe-yVq7wvJNnVaKs22rqjLRbv30ACTJgOIsA=&emci=28905301-dafb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c2756ec3-f3fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) [Share State Representative Victoria Garcia Wilburn ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63873559/408274830/1392793104?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjc1NmVjMy1mM2ZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=USBv33rGe-yVq7wvJNnVaKs22rqjLRbv30ACTJgOIsA=&emci=28905301-dafb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c2756ec3-f3fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63873567/408274842/-1799832157?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjc1NmVjMy1mM2ZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=USBv33rGe-yVq7wvJNnVaKs22rqjLRbv30ACTJgOIsA=&emci=28905301-dafb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c2756ec3-f3fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) [Share Rep. [Share Senator Shelli **_Upcoming Candidate Trainings_** **__** Thursday, June 1, 1-2 p.m. ET: “So You Want to Run for Office: Pride Edition for LGBTQIA+ Candidates”: This training is for LGBTQ+ candidates running for office, or thinking about becoming a candidate. This is a great opportunity to learn more about campaign basics and learn about the successes of LGBTQ candidates across the country. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. ** 2023 Hoosier Hospitality Dinner Just Three Weeks Away Save the date and make your plans to join the Indiana Democratic Party at the ! This year’s dinner will take place on Friday, June 16th at the Indiana Convention Center. With the dinner just three weeks away, there is important news on the horizon regarding our keynote guest speaker. Make sure to = to make sure you’re the first to know. We’re looking forward to seeing you and having a night of food and fellowship with Democrats from all across Indiana. =. Republicans are Playing Political Games and Bringing the Country Close to Default Republicans in Congress are threatening catastrophic cuts or devastating default for Hoosier families. As the country inches closer to a default, Republicans continue to play partisan politics with Indiana’s future and America’s economy. All seven Indiana Republicans in the for the Default on America Act that would cut veterans’ healthcare services for and increase Medicare and Social Security service wait times for . Republicans need to stop their games and work with the President to make sure America pays its bills. Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. establishing the Stop the Bleed program passed both chambers during the legislative session and was recently signed into law by the Governor. This program provides local police departments with bleed kits to treat someone who is bleeding out. Often, police officers are the first to arrive on the scene and do not have these vital tools. Rep. Andrade : “Law enforcement up in our area, and throughout the state, don't have the resources, don't have the funding to be able to get the bleeding control kit. I think, when it comes down to saving someone's life, there's no price to it." name: Tennessee Voter Project
subject: The GOP IS Playing With Our Kids' Futures
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TN Voter Project; Isaac Kimes, Esq
body:
https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject [https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject]
May 26, 2023
Dear friend,
Democrats stand ready to make sure the future for our youth is bright. We can't say the same about the GOP.
We're sure you've heard the news that 60% of 3rd graders in Tennessee face the possibility of retention. Despite our students faring better in their reading performance, the GOP has set our kids up to fall behind. Our republican-led legislature put into affect a third grade retention law in 2021 that allows a single test score to determine whether 3rd graders could pass their grade.
This isn't an accident. This is an attempt to undermine public education as we know it.
Now, more than ever, we need all hands on deck to challenge the republican supermajority and put an end to policies that hinder our kids' potential.
SUPPORT TVP'S WORK TO BUST THE SUPERMAJORITY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1]
Our youth are more than a test store. Kids in Tennessee deserve a quality education, more comprehensive support, and a safe place to learn. Instead of holding them back, we should be investing in them. Retention should be a last resort.
Together, we can bring about the change we want to see. Together, we can secure a brighter future for our children.
Tennessee Voter Project will be supporting candidates who vow to support and invest in our kids in the local election and into 2024. Can you support this work by donating to TVP today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1]
Thanks for your support,
Tennessee Voter Project Staff

clean_body: [] May 26, 2023 Dear friend, Democrats stand ready to make sure the future for our youth is bright. We can't say the same about the GOP. We're sure you've heard the news that 60% of 3rd graders in Tennessee face the possibility of retention. Despite our students faring better in their reading performance, the GOP has set our kids up to fall behind. Our republican-led legislature put into affect a third grade retention law in 2021 that allows a single test score to determine whether 3rd graders could pass their grade. This isn't an accident. This is an attempt to undermine public education as we know it. Now, more than ever, we need all hands on deck to challenge the republican supermajority and put an end to policies that hinder our kids' potential. SUPPORT TVP'S WORK TO BUST THE SUPERMAJORITY [] Our youth are more than a test store. Kids in Tennessee deserve a quality education, more comprehensive support, and a safe place to learn. Instead of holding them back, we should be investing in them. Retention should be a last resort. Together, we can bring about the change we want to see. Together, we can secure a brighter future for our children. Tennessee Voter Project will be supporting candidates who vow to support and invest in our kids in the local election and into 2024. Can you support this work by donating to TVP today? [] Thanks for your support, Tennessee Voter Project Staff If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Express Donate: $25 [] Express Donate: $50 [] Express Donate: $100 [] Express Donate: $250 [] Express Donate: $500 [] Express Donate: $1000 [] Or, donate another amount [] Visit Our Website [] Check Your Voter Registration Status [] Register to Vote [] [] [] Paid for by TN Voter Project; Isaac Kimes, Esq. Treasurer. The Tennessee Voter Project (TVP) is a political action committee formed by Shelby County Mayor Lee Harris and Tennessee Democrats. It is dedicated to growing the number of registered Democrats and supporting Democratic candidates. The time is now to register more Democrats and prepare for the 2023 elections. Checks, made payable to TN Voter Project, can be mailed to us at TN Voter Project , POB 40551, Memphis, TN, 38174. Tennessee Voter Project P.O. clean_body: But really, it's against YOU. | | | Friend, A report just came across my desk: corrupt special interests are planning to spend $200 MILLION to stop me from winning the Republican primary. Could you imagine if that money was spent on beating BIDEN instead? That money could easily be used to counter Soros' millions. But sadly, RINOs would rather let Biden get 4 more years in the White House so long as it means that I'm not the President in 2025. The reason they hate me so much is that I cannot be bought, bullied, or bribed. At my 2017 Inauguration, I declared that " What truly matters is not which party controls our government, but whether our government is controlled by the people." My presidency is all about putting the American people first, which is why the corrupt special interests who've made a fortune off of putting you dead last are out to "stop" me. I don't have mega-donors giving $200 million. But I do have millions of MAGA patriots like YOU giving $1, $5, $10, $24. Even $1 from you today can mean the difference between saving America or letting special interests buy the White House yet again. Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Team, I want you to take a look at what U.S. Congresswoman Lauren Boebert just said: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63874165/408276494/1039254621?refcode=JMFC_20230526_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDRmYWYyZS1mN2ZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kRz0NPImj183mkUfRIop3KXexYZwN-vpjFWbK-kfUxo=&emci=25924738-e3fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a04faf2e-f7fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=6576167) Wow. She went from saying the quiet part out loud to just straight up being publicly antisemitic.

To Lauren, I’d say: **We are not "coming after conservatives". That's ridiculous. We are after Nazis.**

**But if the fact is that the majority of Nazis vote for conservatives, then perhaps the better question is _why_?** And if Nazis are voting for you, _you're damn right we are coming for them._

The rise in anti-semitism in America is undeniable and it’s MAGA leaders that are fanning the flames.

[**The only way to fight antisemitism is by standing together. I’m opening a petition for you to sign and take a stand against antisemitism in all forms. name: Josh Hawley
subject: I need you (here’s why)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Fellow American, It’s Josh Hawley. I’ve been looking over the numbers, and I’m not going to lie - I’m worried.

Right now, my Democrat opponent is SMASHING fundraising records, and we’re falling behind.

I know 2024 seems a long way off, but the road to victory has already begun.

This is going to be one of the closest races in America, and I can’t trust just anyone on such an important mission.

_That’s why I’m trusting you, Fellow American._

**[I only want the most dedicated patriots on my team, and YOU made the cut. I know we can win, but I need to make sure you’re on board. Will you join Team Hawley today to WIN in 2024?>>>>](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=4dad10226df34c76bbc662315c999a9c&_e=hXJwegytGl_Xm6VKmUWJK2w-jL0sR9nslfQA1UzMXTRK53maHQl9pK_m-puesCJem2_fm5_KcfbBMKAoI8oNoHSuFlhYOQQWRpiacPJ2V8h5dllQRH2SnJBQMuEMGU5AGCWGHy0wJGF69KcNtOTkhsLWG5tLvUYLjkHoEUWfG1vEkDTg4c6VRnnPop7VpcU1hLb2GYA-WA12ricaEdkaxA6bL7IlU0JO73jeGLIrd9X1me4-mYuX-Pa5GXdY0XYhEPYdEyMmth58Z2pjyCYCZQLZJ7lZNJeOScq3jQsJVFC1QHtFPknQR4zVQgTejqG0FjdZz_Q_iggz5fqH8zCwPCxJlN1H_7O9v2tFq8oFr0-VjZQjR-pmnefiTyMTCdClCLMvm3n3gkE0g_clzwhP8Q%3D%3D)**
---
| | [**Join The Team**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=4dad10226df34c76bbc662315c999a9c&_e=hXJwegytGl_Xm6VKmUWJK2w-jL0sR9nslfQA1UzMXTRK53maHQl9pK_m-puesCJem2_fm5_KcfbBMKAoI8oNoHSuFlhYOQQWRpiacPJ2V8h5dllQRH2SnJBQMuEMGU5AGCWGHy0wJGF69KcNtOTkhsLWG5tLvUYLjkHoEUWfG1vEkDTg4c6VRnnPop7VpcU1hLb2GYA-WA12ricaEdkaxA6bL7IlU0JO73jeGLIrd9X1me4-mYuX-Pa5GXdY0XYhA8pCl7wo5r9fDZiTk74OCoi15HJpZMuNbjpymTbjG_vzJyaw5pCQd39gDd9fwbVRZOgMHiPg3lf4_Tm1l4tvBaHMPOy23gVlZrXnloOKbnhqTvFxNzsv4ZPSkv0SFhYsRaRDq16kTFhps38O10uvkw%3D%3D)
---
Let me be clear: **control of the Senate could come down to this seat.**

The Democrats are laser-focused on Missouri, and they’re not taking their eyes off of us anytime soon.

They know that we can’t count on big tech or Silicon Valley to support us, so they’re bussing the big dollars into our state.

clean_body: | | | Fellow American, It’s Josh Hawley. I’ve been looking over the numbers, and I’m not going to lie - I’m worried. Right now, my Democrat opponent is SMASHING fundraising records, and we’re falling behind. I know 2024 seems a long way off, but the road to victory has already begun. This is going to be one of the closest races in America, and I can’t trust just anyone on such an important mission. That’s why I’m trusting you, Fellow American. | | Let me be clear: control of the Senate could come down to this seat. The Democrats are laser-focused on Missouri, and they’re not taking their eyes off of us anytime soon. They know that we can’t count on big tech or Silicon Valley to support us, so they’re bussing the big dollars into our state. But you and I know that Missouri values will NEVER stand for their socialist agenda. Thank you, Josh Hawley | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

name: Team Padilla
subject: Stand with Alex Padilla to protect more than 1 million acres of public land in California!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
#

Friend,
Yesterday, Alex re-introduced the _Protecting Unique and Beautiful Landscapes by Investing in California (PUBLIC) Lands Act_ in the U.S. Senate.
This is sweeping legislation that would expand protections for over one million acres of California’s public lands.
Specifically, it would designate nearly 600,000 acres of new wilderness, more than 583 miles of new wild and scenic rivers, and expand an existing national monument by over 100,000 acres.
Our public lands are one of California’s greatest gifts. And it is incumbent upon us to be thoughtful stewards of these special places so that our communities can enjoy them and benefit from America’s natural resources for generations to come.
**So we’re asking for your help to show Congress that there’s undeniable support for this bill and the protections it proposes for our public lands.**
[**Add your name and stand with Alex if you agree that Congress must pass the _PUBLIC Lands Act >>_**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/em230526_survey/?source=em230526-1-SP&refcode2=1315.159979.7QPcyC&akid=1315%2E159979%2E7QPcyC)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/em230526_survey/?source=em230526-1-SP&refcode2=1315.159979.7QPcyC&akid=1315%2E159979%2E7QPcyC)**
These public lands are not just precious for their stunning scenery, but also for their important biodiversity and the role that they play in keeping our environment resilient.
Thank you in advance for adding your name and speaking up in favor of protecting our public lands.
Team Padilla
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/em230526_survey/?source=em230526-1-SP&refcode2=1315.159979.7QPcyC&akid=1315%2E159979%2E7QPcyC)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=1315%2E159979%2E7QPcyC)

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: New Message from Courier Newsroom
subject: Trump and CNN show exactly why Americans don’t trust the news
body:
Americans are tired of all the lies and division in our news.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1030%2E120351%2ELBcJsD)
Peter, 185 million Americans don’t trust the news... and CNN’s recent town hall for Donald Trump did nothing to help change that.
[**We will explain where this distrust comes from, how the mainstream media fails to address it, and how Courier Newsroom works hard to restore that trust by delivering no-nonsense, relevant local news. But before we get into that, will you chip in $5? Our work is driven by grassroots donations from folks like you.**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3718?refcode=em-20230526&t=2&akid=1030%2E120351%2ELBcJsD)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3718?refcode=em-20230526&t=3&akid=1030%2E120351%2ELBcJsD)**
A few weeks back, CNN held a televised town hall for Trump where Republican and undecided voters got to ask questions.
While the town hall had over 3.3 million viewers tune in to watch Trump peddle lies and misinformation about the 2020 election and the January 6th insurrection, CNN’s decision to give the former President a platform may have permanently injured the cable news giant’s brand.
**_The week following the town hall, CNN saw its lowest ratings in over seven years._** While we don’t know precisely why CNN’s ratings dropped so drastically, it’s not hard to imagine audiences losing trust and tuning out.
Courier Newsroom was founded on the belief that voters are tired of mainstream media outlets giving a platform to bad actors like Trump just so they can pop a big rating.
**That’s why we do things differently.** Our reporters don’t spread bad information — instead, they call it out. They provide honest, accessible local news stories that are focused on the facts that viewers (and voters) need to know.
As the presidential race picks up, our reporters are ready to pick up the mainstream media’s slack and call misinformation out, so voters can make informed decisions when they head to the polls.
[**But for us to do that, we need the resources to spread our news stories far and wide. Will you chip in $5 now to power our work?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3718?refcode=em-20230526&t=4&akid=1030%2E120351%2ELBcJsD)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3718?refcode=em-20230526&t=5&akid=1030%2E120351%2ELBcJsD)**
Thanks for being in this fight with us,
Everyone at Courier Newsroom
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=1030_120351_LBcJsD&akid=1030%2E120351%2ELBcJsD)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=1030%2E120351%2ELBcJsD)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
This campaign is around the principle that our donors are a part of this team.

---

Hello Friend,

A lot of campaigns are urging you to donate before their self-constructed fundraising deadlines. They're probably making you feel terrible if you don't contribute too, aren't they?

At Team DeSantis we're taking a different approach.

Our entire fundraising & digital program's foundation is built on this principle: Our donors are a part of our team; they are NOT our personal piggy bank.

Look, I get it. Times are tough thanks to Joe Biden's Economy and our team doesn't want to pressure you towards donating if you can't afford it.

You will never receive a solicitation from this campaign that promises a fake match or degrades you for not donating.

No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.

That's what this campaign is all about, and I promise you, that's the kind of President you will have when I am in the White House.

If that sounds like the kind of campaign, you want to be a part of today then **_[please join Team DeSantis today by chipping in any amount you can afford.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8154175db21446ada12484b95a1d4dd8&_e=s-M9hPDPrFEpzZpwhWeyeE5Z3-_Fb3UWyjauBktOqgpqluAQ0wSVAwfMzn7zpBkpnZatSBfQxaHxboqxcuIqjUiCmrAhgHxiG4pqQd13VehzHZe1XWtgc90JyCbXpnitkzu2tDWm7pk7Qjifr9rGne8rNkBczQfAnxrJekUBYz4se-NYjiZG83hkyJ_tdSfS3Z0MbL66MWRDFRcsKYjo8SSzl57Bu3naAhszJ90LaqbcrBWOuake6R9IPiUXQdJKbUr12GpJcso-p8qtOJd2p-_zOzpsldvlaZxK8dTFtkTAGxcZE66AgfucxzDgrAqWwXZHaUCKVKxI0mpEeTOxGz9J7laIIQfu4BuNpcRoSWPmjB8R9xu0gxm06xNFfTvUFeZdkqOKEdO-N2Dzf_bRDpGA5WYUWHHjpdIjGh5tqV1h4vqFpP1sRsnmb3T6NLaaUL1EDRKwwFKtdslZPgR2pQ%3D%3D "please join Team DeSantis today by chipping in any amount you can afford. | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America's veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

clean_body: This campaign is around the principle that our donors are a part of this team. | | | | | | | | | | Hello Friend, A lot of campaigns are urging you to donate before their self-constructed fundraising deadlines. They're probably making you feel terrible if you don't contribute too, aren't they? At Team DeSantis we're taking a different approach. Our entire fundraising & digital program's foundation is built on this principle: Our donors are a part of our team; they are NOT our personal piggy bank. Look, I get it. Times are tough thanks to Joe Biden's Economy and our team doesn't want to pressure you towards donating if you can't afford it. You will never receive a solicitation from this campaign that promises a fake match or degrades you for not donating. No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies. That's what this campaign is all about, and I promise you, that's the kind of President you will have when I am in the White House. If that sounds like the kind of campaign, you want to be a part of today then "please join Team DeSantis today by chipping in any amount you can afford. name: Sheriff Mark Lamb
subject: We lost our son eight days before Christmas ...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate
body:
Despite losing a child to a drunk driving accident, Mothers Against Drunk Driving rescinded an invitation for my wife and I to speak at one of their events.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_s=e72845d5c6364d4488d83062bb77c391&_t=FDerRSw92RRwu6TCaPFxV5wSGCTSBjkVu1uEkA5iR_qwkfKvFgu_aAaudvmEkI2KnL-4SBsHE5gMTs0iB4otXQJbTLylex4yz9r72H5w6x8%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_s=e72845d5c6364d4488d83062bb77c391&_t=FDerRSw92RRwu6TCaPFxV5wSGCTSBjkVu1uEkA5iR_qwkfKvFgu_aAaudvmEkI2KnL-4SBsHE5gMTs0iB4otXQJbTLylex4yz9r72H5w6x8%3D)

[](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=e72845d5c6364d4488d83062bb77c391&_e=aOsDLGKcAb6aFoZ2gv1Bv_ntgYvrdgsj3xotbtdGKjytXkm_jV-hE40_1Big0y5Ce7B0VKqMl-UBKS8bhWXOMrcC7KUyZjSn4rmEEUKuJ7tD2P5M55MS4kBZE9zs49v8zdT3TxVX2KUSZFldojuKeNK0fDICWRn4qHmrb0qaFdA6Bt1TJkHYnQYDOEX0a1YRCSo69Wf-6sRl_mkt7XFHHokI6YTjYUbjvrHOxbC7zUnXTQOS6uCRBzv32uyYUQ7vgQK22iHqzzAUwIVQng93KjLTDsEfOQB2DiS2RJUdK07yqhAfatjpMjFD9RJQ5MBpke3BcCgHB0rC1wJTa0pFTDMzYbu8ADkvDb51FeKvytpE26SKshEZXHb0cp-n-KhkTDEvNBVXlY940lngVbRrlg%3D%3D)
|
Peter,

In December, my wife Janel and I lost our son, our granddaughter, and our soon-to-be daughter-in-law at the hands of a drunk driver. **I would have never let their tragic story become a part of my campaign were it not for the insane, woke policies of a select few executives at Mothers Against Drunk Driving.**

First, corporate America succumbed to the pressure of the woke left and disavowed conservatives. Now, it seems that nonprofit organizations, like Mothers Against Drunk Driving, are following suit.

**Let me read you in on what happened and why I’m reaching out with this story today.**
Recently, my wife and I accepted an invitation to be keynote speakers at a **Mothers Against Drunk Driving** event this July in Phoenix.

**We would have been the perfect fit.** Not only are we a law enforcement family, but we lost our kids to a drunk driving accident eight days before Christmas 2022.

Both Janel and I were looking forward to sharing our story. In my capacity as Pinal County Sheriff and as a father, the invitation meant so much. So, **you can imagine our disappointment and utter shock over the weekend when we got a call uninviting us as the keynote speakers**.

**The decision to revoke our invitation was purely political.**

**[I need your help to send a message to organizations, like MADD, who are bending to pressure from WOKE, far-left activities and canceling anyone who disagrees with their looney-tune out of left-field rhetoric.](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=e72845d5c6364d4488d83062bb77c391&_e=aOsDLGKcAb6aFoZ2gv1Bv_ntgYvrdgsj3xotbtdGKjytXkm_jV-hE40_1Big0y5Ce7B0VKqMl-UBKS8bhWXOMrcC7KUyZjSn4rmEEUKuJ7tD2P5M55MS4kBZE9zs49v8zdT3TxVX2KUSZFldojuKeNK0fDICWRn4qHmrb0qaFdA6Bt1TJkHYnQYDOEX0a1YRCSo69Wf-6sRl_mkt7XFHHokI6YTjYUbjvrHOxbC7zUnXTQOS6uCRBzv32uyYUQ7v1FMA_WXyD2cpgroNjy6ndnfcQhqaDgphidr3neiUdaGpoyy6fd7lSqkIbuCzhptdOuyxfPqwLPRbSLJ1MOmQXt4R72hl_w59ztexK6uNfRgXSNGrZUKo8DHJlZ2XiigcA4HENBxupmuYfWMi_pGLTw%3D%3D)**

[**ADD YOUR NAME TODAY**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=e72845d5c6364d4488d83062bb77c391&_e=aOsDLGKcAb6aFoZ2gv1Bv_ntgYvrdgsj3xotbtdGKjytXkm_jV-hE40_1Big0y5Ce7B0VKqMl-UBKS8bhWXOMrcC7KUyZjSn4rmEEUKuJ7tD2P5M55MS4kBZE9zs49v8zdT3TxVX2KUSZFldojuKeNK0fDICWRn4qHmrb0qaFdA6Bt1TJkHYnQYDOEX0a1YRCSo69Wf-6sRl_mkt7XFHHokI6YTjYUbjvrHOxbC7zUnXTQOS6uCRBzv32uyYUQ7vrsLia4sPDQWWaY9Fc6p7Zivfig1boSQPCX6Yhg5LYmI7X1e-tBF1KhtF-5DCzySZvx6_HI6I1Qm4rbSkQr7Dri4fPdmbO3mCJJzlbDk2lvsXz8fDwHdBvnduiimUGALewtki36gixNFpjCtudt6hkA%3D%3D)

It appears that MADD executives bowed to the pressure of a few far-left activists and decided they would cancel me rather than offend a few of their progressive supporters. **Let me be crystal clear:** the people who aired their grievances against me with MADD don’t know me or my wife; **they succeeded in getting me cancelled by simply saying they were offended by some of the political positions I hold.**

**This would _never_ happen to a Democrat candidate for the United States Senate.**

Please accept my invitation today to **[sign my petition telling Mothers Against Drunk Driving that politicizing the deaths of drunk driving victims is just plain wrong.](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=e72845d5c6364d4488d83062bb77c391&_e=aOsDLGKcAb6aFoZ2gv1Bv_ntgYvrdgsj3xotbtdGKjytXkm_jV-hE40_1Big0y5Ce7B0VKqMl-UBKS8bhWXOMrcC7KUyZjSn4rmEEUKuJ7tD2P5M55MS4kBZE9zs49v8zdT3TxVX2KUSZFldojuKeNK0fDICWRn4qHmrb0qaFdA6Bt1TJkHYnQYDOEX0a1YRCSo69Wf-6sRl_mkt7XFHHokI6YTjYUbjvrHOxbC7zUnXTQOS6uCRBzv32uyYUQ7v4Z_deff8IHWRuKkTwx96pzaAaZGGPygTRQeEAVoTeHJJuJGRHPhZtKyo59KDHTj9B9bQJM96RZFd3p1WYasU3jQT-JCMD2E9nfWZ-fxlPL35wvQgt19ER-DpKwJ-TCSnaz6kUl8dCQe_af35gBx6tw%3D%3D)**

[**ADD YOUR NAME TODAY**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=e72845d5c6364d4488d83062bb77c391&_e=aOsDLGKcAb6aFoZ2gv1Bv_ntgYvrdgsj3xotbtdGKjytXkm_jV-hE40_1Big0y5Ce7B0VKqMl-UBKS8bhWXOMrcC7KUyZjSn4rmEEUKuJ7tD2P5M55MS4kBZE9zs49v8zdT3TxVX2KUSZFldojuKeNK0fDICWRn4qHmrb0qaFdA6Bt1TJkHYnQYDOEX0a1YRCSo69Wf-6sRl_mkt7XFHHokI6YTjYUbjvrHOxbC7zUnXTQOS6uCRBzv32uyYUQ7vMmqX3pDAJpW_RsiiLsDxBPOR-BiqBJQN1D7twsHtpSVrKJH_1EfBA9tfFhj5BKIMBpLvkwK8BS1owRAYcYOgpBE_BY3IH95gqs8rPYu_-ih47nHnT3Q7vWUVhIToopukzUnaLPQFlZGVm_oHrR_Wkw%3D%3D)

**We must send a message that we won’t tolerate this anymore**.

Organizations like **Mothers Against Drunk Driving shouldn’t be political.** Period, end of story. But since they decided to get political, you need people like me who are going to set them back on the path of straight and narrow.

**Losing a child is one of the hardest things me and my wife have ever experienced. By uninviting us to speak at one of their events, executives at MADD may as well have just poured salt in our wounds.**

This cancel culture is DISGRACEFUL. clean_body: Despite losing a child to a drunk driving accident, Mothers Against Drunk Driving rescinded an invitation for my wife and I to speak at one of their events. | | Peter, In December, my wife Janel and I lost our son, our granddaughter, and our soon-to-be daughter-in-law at the hands of a drunk driver. I would have never let their tragic story become a part of my campaign were it not for the insane, woke policies of a select few executives at Mothers Against Drunk Driving. First, corporate America succumbed to the pressure of the woke left and disavowed conservatives. Now, it seems that nonprofit organizations, like Mothers Against Drunk Driving, are following suit. Let me read you in on what happened and why I’m reaching out with this story today. Recently, my wife and I accepted an invitation to be keynote speakers at a Mothers Against Drunk Driving event this July in Phoenix. We would have been the perfect fit. Not only are we a law enforcement family, but we lost our kids to a drunk driving accident eight days before Christmas 2022. Both Janel and I were looking forward to sharing our story. In my capacity as Pinal County Sheriff and as a father, the invitation meant so much. So, you can imagine our disappointment and utter shock over the weekend when we got a call uninviting us as the keynote speakers. The decision to revoke our invitation was purely political. It appears that MADD executives bowed to the pressure of a few far-left activists and decided they would cancel me rather than offend a few of their progressive supporters. Let me be crystal clear: the people who aired their grievances against me with MADD don’t know me or my wife; they succeeded in getting me cancelled by simply saying they were offended by some of the political positions I hold. This would never happen to a Democrat candidate for the United States Senate. Please accept my invitation today to We must send a message that we won’t tolerate this anymore. Organizations like Mothers Against Drunk Driving shouldn’t be political. Period, end of story. But since they decided to get political, you need people like me who are going to set them back on the path of straight and narrow. Losing a child is one of the hardest things me and my wife have ever experienced. By uninviting us to speak at one of their events, executives at MADD may as well have just poured salt in our wounds. This cancel culture is DISGRACEFUL. If you agree, . Sincerely, Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media Meet Sheriff Lamb: | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM. Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year. | Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate

body:
Our team pulled together a quiz for our top supporters about the state of our race.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=23618%2E3422442%2E7IgKwa)
As a former Professor, Katie loves a good pop quiz—so our team pulled together a quiz for our top supporters about the state of our race.
**
Are you ready, Derek? Start here 👇
** [California has a “jungle primary” system. This means:](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/kp4s-em-sen-quiz/?source=EMAH26_2_QUI_20230526_V1_F&akid=23618%2E3422442%2E7IgKwa) A - Nothing, it’s just a nickname. B - Only party delegates can vote in the primary. C - You can only vote for the candidates from your party. D - The top two vote winners move onto the general election, no matter their party—so two Democrats could be on the ballot in November. **[Continue the quiz →](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/kp4s-em-sen-quiz/?source=EMAH26_2_QUI_20230526_V1_F&akid=23618%2E3422442%2E7IgKwa)**
---
Good luck!
—Katie Porter for California
P.S. Don’t have time to take the quiz? The tl;dr is that we need support from grassroots donors like you, Derek. **[Can you chip in today?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/17667?refcode=EMAH26_2_QUI_20230526_V1_F&t=2&akid=23618%2E3422442%2E7IgKwa)**

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAH26_2_QUI_20230526_V1_F&t=3&refcode2=23618_3422442_7IgKwa&akid=23618%2E3422442%2E7IgKwa)**

---
| CRP Newletter / March 26, 2023
---
A Memorial Day Message from the Party Chair
Hello All,

As we approach the Memorial Day weekend, I would like to tell you about a Soldier who never made it home, CPL Ciara Durkin. I never knew CPL Durkin but as a National Guard Finance Soldier, I still consider her one of mine. She died September 29, 2007, in the middle of Bagram Air Force Base, one of the biggest military bases in Afghanistan. She was in a secure area of the base when she was shot once in the head.

Ciara had recently mentioned having some issues in her unit, and noted that it was making enemies. A short while later, she was found dead near a church, in the middle of the post, in the middle of the night–dead from a 9mm round to the head. In the months following, the Army ruled it a suicide, something her family strongly disagrees with. Ciara was buried with full military honors in Arlington National Cemetery. Every Memorial Day, for the past 16 years, I have thought about CPL Durkin, I hope this year you will join me in keeping her, and her loved ones, in your prayers.

I encourage you to remember the reason for this holiday. I'd like you to also consider and think about the families of those killed while in service to their country. Survivors may not see their benefits this month due to the political battle over the debt ceiling. Should those who have given up so much need to worry about whether they will receive the money they count on every month?

America needs to keep its word to its citizens, its veterans, and its elderly. Anyone attempting to break that word has no concept of honor or personal sacrifice, and they are certainly not a patriot.

Thanks for your time,
Travis “Bull” Johnson

body:
TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=0cc1f5b6e7a945f6ba0e8c534b0a5979&_e=HgQ20Sg_IKDq5x4KlxlwUqLCsQsS_kxqmLPVfZ7TPMEdsyHVD32KDRK548PChFQZzxJglWrE1RsffoZMn3yIRNEAK-bC_Lfb6p777PR9TjHJ1QLAs9zSyM3t3ErI8Y6rACxWsmKH7sIXpR08-8H1lVerc6HmX6TZi8c-zWtIlGBXMta10-W7vXboXbLg49qiRz-xcJIZAhyNYRl4_1oXkjPjHA32hs30NKSNrBc0nPvlZXoHfiP9CT2Dorvi1U8zTU6lyNqyNnlk8_57tRU2sDdkJRWk-JNiuyrj8JFqMkGmqUn0TwTBaDr0C0BW_UZ050DfPZbbixRWO9LiopBDPA%3D%3D)
---
| | |
---
| | **Productivity Or Pajamas? 💻**
---
---
| | The pandemic has come and gone, but I guess the federal government missed the memo. They’re still handing out a free pass to anyone who wants to work in their pajamas from the comfort of home. Hard-working Americans started reporting back to the office a long time ago, but government employees are still enjoying the perks of telework with [little to no oversight](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=0cc1f5b6e7a945f6ba0e8c534b0a5979&_e=HgQ20Sg_IKDq5x4KlxlwUuDkKeQ3VfzLLjFhZjnOKCgdX_C9KoZ3DmRiOPGZtaYt0KI-Z3_QWBFaTbBhgAm6vGYWfIGb3ozswP3RE1u-VY2Ki4axvsFbo1Qs3aervqn98qijbR_d9E16upvn9Os0e7hy_iVHMJS2juFFYq1Szzugx5wOwWFtx_A5s9JD0MUOp7qUN_2jStmLgXcMwCauWvv-3a_5ewpQtKy_PEF-sdKgyqz8wFDRMzdeGMc3s4tE0pKSSlyfuvzzxgJqG6TjzE5xQnOfuPytkX81fMFd_tTBej-C3-9QGqfRxOqld3JB1MBkBiAsCceV12Cod8pAR3bM_P0yiOG6sxLD5zcFp98%3D). We wouldn’t want to track productivity when it comes to important tasks like issuing benefits or processing passport requests, would we? Heck, we still have people in the [FAA](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=0cc1f5b6e7a945f6ba0e8c534b0a5979&_e=HgQ20Sg_IKDq5x4KlxlwUs_Sd46mKMD_qRO1rodrAUT5zRTgKz8lDoytjfRNdsO5k5U9arRC228xbedwiVbUQXwJomUNoEOTXvmh1Kj5H4Vd8Vka_5iEJ1r8i6kObcbyoAz1yNdRGrK3GrQIgOQnVAfDOpLAccEW18Rm2VXspVBsXoz7baaXkP0PkxiHNCcfVfENUMiIzYJkcXQCGd18IKrDy-8g7PGVcMn5wnZPZfQoinUZ5XaKauXcPzL-vOtVNv98ysSfNcDroOQ8UU05oockV-WQ3lkO5PiCzaihRS0%3D) “working” from home. That ought to make you feel safe. This administration thinks they can keep telework going at levels far beyond pre-pandemic times, but what’s the cost? The Director of the Office of Personnel Management couldn’t even give us [a straight answer](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=0cc1f5b6e7a945f6ba0e8c534b0a5979&_e=HgQ20Sg_IKDq5x4KlxlwUj--S0yRitne1GbsVxWFNdX5wMUSu2YPcF94L7V3Lpux743Ntu9tRLsH5Sz9Fd5PhPW8G1i9qGDF6j2g3WABABUvjd6enuTCMYQMbZaq_bquJ5m5sh__xWHz2QLevBd68LPg4hOt9tNF7HFdYurmNPeUST7mLtjPR22zeXDFtZHgpFBNu3EfLfzfwfRNQfsA3r7VLC8AA_1oURS0pGuT5c-OzvJyn0kqjPwbE7nJyhhEIJDh0yz773uUJ29SrLALeGGG9LnDp83Fb5y59KGSntNofpVM_6lCK_wt8Uo1Ys4p) about how many federal employees are teleworking when we spoke with her back in March. We need more efficiency and less bureaucracy. This is why I joined some of my House Republican colleagues to[ send letters](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=0cc1f5b6e7a945f6ba0e8c534b0a5979&_e=HgQ20Sg_IKDq5x4KlxlwUgCVxRL-g_MhDIEKPVBkUZAuYtHqX8oVJe-HpCiGYpldGMk_nIWRhWsh90FfcQqDrMD5Adroid3KjUYFNlFASa6IM4jRFPOAWVE11ISdFDZ7LRY_eUUUUDwaQNbhkUzOuCv5Ex5GmIJFUX1P2WxFQDWjqN0mWJj_PiaArXaxafrzISCb5eDCJV4fedagMowe8Qq_rz2og2Gdz0bfeUsnVKKaPYkq2O5VQ2SYhSpt5arTu0JAN3PqEOkcLYEjrLnQ_lQfx-J1pUiKR4vIN8Nh9Eg%3D) to 25 Biden administration agencies to get to the bottom of this madness. There must be solid productivity tracking before this goes any further. Citizens deserve real value from their federal workers—not the runaround.
---
| | |
---
| | **Blast Off 🚀**
---
[](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=0cc1f5b6e7a945f6ba0e8c534b0a5979&_e=HgQ20Sg_IKDq5x4KlxlwUityR5icHIxMz-zmDDwcYZbxCPWDP6eiKRIwgVirtUsWTv71XxLis7XU9C-5Ya6fGnD-PIrRDsyYrNLeiwiJD_fTRbrc6PuC798a96b2JdPTphhGofTRDH0AS3UEznUbfkIsqjFVF34fHHALF2485nvN_Lgq1yiXVOl6kVahV3DGNShWGCpL9tc3hq8XgrlMI32LP4htt-tD-NVlJIUBg8slEkDJL3RZwvfmSieQjJk58NqRef4BjyVtARSIWGujeafbXGTtj4dmNdjcnCbx_fsc31TxDWSsxBrP1VlbGZ-k4wgm3eeCfxmXRCyM-081YoPY6nyH8cyRs9MZWNx2q9A%3D)
---
# Photo Credit: Axiom Space

---
| | From Knoxville to the International Space Station, John Shoffner is making TN-02 proud. John recently took off for the International Space Station in [Axiom’s latest space mission](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=0cc1f5b6e7a945f6ba0e8c534b0a5979&_e=HgQ20Sg_IKDq5x4KlxlwUityR5icHIxMz-zmDDwcYZbxCPWDP6eiKRIwgVirtUsWTv71XxLis7XU9C-5Ya6fGnD-PIrRDsyYrNLeiwiJD_fTRbrc6PuC798a96b2JdPTphhGofTRDH0AS3UEznUbfkIsqjFVF34fHHALF2485nvN_Lgq1yiXVOl6kVahV3DGNShWGCpL9tc3hq8XgrlMI1_v_eygm5XqBxWEbX1ba8Y060-fmxeQg5gmBSZME0jZrSun92vmoXy-Weu8VIZxihAnO5hqREA8SxxinwzZR3BbUuOkiqYOxbolk_koI4tB_MIkBcLvRBMWjF1K5J4urzFzXrLN3viAd2Ri1Ue5ZS4%3D). His team is the second privately funded mission to the ISS since the company conducted its first mission back in 2022. During their time in the orbiting laboratory, the crew will conduct more than 20 experiments that explore topics like human physiology and physical sciences. This is John’s first time going to space, but he says it’s fulfilling a dream he’s had since he was eight years old when he formed a space club with his friends. With a dedication to STEM education, John says he’s going to record videos to show children what it’s like to live in space vs. living on earth. Just another example of Tennessee folks doing big things!
---
