clean_body: TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | | | | | | Productivity Or Pajamas? 💻 | | The pandemic has come and gone, but I guess the federal government missed the memo. They’re still handing out a free pass to anyone who wants to work in their pajamas from the comfort of home. Hard-working Americans started reporting back to the office a long time ago, but government employees are still enjoying the perks of telework with . We wouldn’t want to track productivity when it comes to important tasks like issuing benefits or processing passport requests, would we? Heck, we still have people in the “working” from home. That ought to make you feel safe. This administration thinks they can keep telework going at levels far beyond pre-pandemic times, but what’s the cost? The Director of the Office of Personnel Management couldn’t even give us about how many federal employees are teleworking when we spoke with her back in March. We need more efficiency and less bureaucracy. This is why I joined some of my House Republican colleagues to to 25 Biden administration agencies to get to the bottom of this madness. There must be solid productivity tracking before this goes any further. Citizens deserve real value from their federal workers—not the runaround. | | | | | Blast Off 🚀 Photo Credit: Axiom Space | | From Knoxville to the International Space Station, John Shoffner is making TN-02 proud. John recently took off for the International Space Station in . His team is the second privately funded mission to the ISS since the company conducted its first mission back in 2022. During their time in the orbiting laboratory, the crew will conduct more than 20 experiments that explore topics like human physiology and physical sciences. This is John’s first time going to space, but he says it’s fulfilling a dream he’s had since he was eight years old when he formed a space club with his friends. With a dedication to STEM education, John says he’s going to record videos to show children what it’s like to live in space vs. living on earth. Just another example of Tennessee folks doing big things! | | | | | Just For Fun 🎉 | | → Grandma’s epic road trip 🚗 ()→ On thin ice 🧊 ()→ An unlikely hotel guest 🦭 () | | | | | Product Of The Month 🛍 | | | | | | | Please chip in today to help us oust radical Democrats and put a check on the Biden-Harris agenda. | | Stay in Touch 👇 | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress

We’re letting our top supporters in on our campaign strategy.

body:
I wanted to reach out directly: I need your help now if I’m going to defeat Lauren Boebert, and I have nowhere else to turn.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63877184/408285840/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjA3NzkzYi1mZmZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9RT-gXiaaUlAkR_SLg42YayjoEC3Kn2njApWNPR1tCQ=&emci=a8d7b0cf-f9fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=3b07793b-fffb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63877185/408285841/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjA3NzkzYi1mZmZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9RT-gXiaaUlAkR_SLg42YayjoEC3Kn2njApWNPR1tCQ=&emci=a8d7b0cf-f9fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=3b07793b-fffb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
Hello,
I wanted to reach out directly: I need your help now if I’m going to defeat Lauren Boebert. Right now, we’re facing our most important end-of-month fundraising deadline yet, and I have nowhere else to turn.
My race against Boebert last year was the closest in the entire country. After a recount, we lost by just 546 votes. In order to make sure we have the resources to start strong, we’ve set a goal to raise another $250,000 before our end-of-May deadline – and missing this goal isn't an option.
This is going to be one of the most expensive House races in the country. Lauren Boebert’s far-right allies have already started attacking me. With just 0.17% being the difference in 2022, every dollar is going to matter.
All of the political pundits are calling this one of the races to watch, but grassroots donors like you are going to be what allows us to correct the lies and hold Boebert accountable.
I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money, so I am asking if you can chip in to my campaign now and help finally send Boebert packing.
Anything you can spare before our critical end-of-May fundraising deadline would mean the world and go a long way.
Here's the best link to give now: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/frisch_email**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63877187/408285842/1610638071?refcode=em20230526pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=3b07793b-fffb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjA3NzkzYi1mZmZiLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9RT-gXiaaUlAkR_SLg42YayjoEC3Kn2njApWNPR1tCQ=)
Thank you so much for your support.
With gratitude -
Adam

Hello, I wanted to reach out directly: I need your help now if I’m going to defeat Lauren Boebert. Right now, we’re facing our most important end-of-month fundraising deadline yet, and I have nowhere else to turn. My race against Boebert last year was the closest in the entire country. After a recount, we lost by just 546 votes. In order to make sure we have the resources to start strong, we’ve set a goal to raise another $250,000 before our end-of-May deadline – and missing this goal isn't an option. This is going to be one of the most expensive House races in the country. Lauren Boebert’s far-right allies have already started attacking me. With just 0.17% being the difference in 2022, every dollar is going to matter. All of the political pundits are calling this one of the races to watch, but grassroots donors like you are going to be what allows us to correct the lies and hold Boebert accountable. I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money, so I am asking if you can chip in to my campaign now and help finally send Boebert packing. Anything you can spare before our critical end-of-May fundraising deadline would mean the world and go a long way. Here's the best link to give now: = Thank you so much for your support. With gratitude - Adam ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ron=20DeSantis?=
subject: Trust me when I say that you are not our piggybank
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
I hate how some politicians are treating their supporters. That’s why I’m changing the narrative with this campaign.

https://secure.winred.com/desantis/great-american-comeback-av?utm_source=_&utm_medium=em_p&utm_campaign=2023-05-26__AdVict_ha_rd_AdVictorium_HowWereDifferent_HowWereDifferent_greatamericancomebackav_fr_

Hello Peter,

A lot of campaigns are urging you to donate before their self-constructed fundraising deadlines. They’re probably making you feel terrible if you don’t contribute too, aren’t they?

At Team DeSantis we’re taking a different approach.

Our entire fundraising & digital program’s foundation is built on this principle: Our donors are a part of our team; they are NOT our personal piggy bank.

Look, I get it. Times are tough thanks to Joe Biden's Economy and our team doesn't want to pressure you towards donating if you can’t afford it.

You will never receive a solicitation from this campaign that promises a fake match or degrades you for not donating.

No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.

That’s what this campaign is all about, and I promise you, that's the kind of President you will have when I am in the White House.

If that sounds like the kind of campaign, you want to be a part of today then please join Team DeSantis today by chipping in any amount you can afford. Ron DeSantis

Meet Ron DeSantis
https://secure.winred.com/desantis/great-american-comeback-av?utm_source=_&utm_medium=em_p&utm_campaign=2023-05-26__AdVict_ha_rd_AdVictorium_HowWereDifferent_HowWereDifferent_greatamericancomebackav_fr_
A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America’s veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

name: =?utf-8?Q?Nathaniel=20Moran?=
subject: Don't forget! 🇺🇸 Chairman Jim Jordan joins us in Tyler on June 2!
body:
You're invited to join special guest, Chairman Jim Jordan, for a Taste of East Texas reception honoring Congressman Nathaniel Moran. |
---
| | Just a friendly reminder to join us for the **Taste of East Texas** reception next **Friday, June 2, at 6 p.m**. The event will be held at the W.T. Brookshire Conference Center, located at 2000 W. Front St., Tyler, TX 75702. We are honored to have Chairman Jim Jordan, the Chairman of the House Judiciary Committee and a strong advocate for conservative principles, as our special guest for the evening. This is a fantastic opportunity to enjoy great food from East Texas restaurants, engage in conversations, and hear from Chairman Jordan himself.
---
| |
---

subject: President Obama's tweet
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-may23?refcode=052623 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-may23?refcode=052623]
Friend,
It’s no secret that the Minnesota legislature did some amazing things this year. Even President Barack Obama is talking about it!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/99254/images/Screenshot%202023-05-26%20at%202.29.17%20PM.png]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/99254/images/Screenshot%202023-05-26%20at%202.29.34%20PM.png]
State elections matter. With our DFL trifecta we were able to pass legislation that makes a real impact on Minnesotans lives, but we can’t sit back and relax. Minnesota is picking up national attention, and MAGA Republicans will be fighting hard to take the Minnesota House. As President Obama pointed out, elections have consequences. Friend, can we count on you to make a contribution today and help us protect our House DFL majority?

name: Team Fetterman
subject: [1 new message from JF]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We wanted to get you this message from John ASAP:
#
Hey Derek,
We wanted to get you this message from John ASAP:
| | | | | | | | | | |
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---
| Hey Derek, it's John. Here's the deal: i’m hard at work in the Senate fighting for you, your family, and families across PA + the country. 😁

But the same right-wing, dark money PACs who spent million$ to try to beat us are ready to see us fail. They're going to spend my *entire* term raising dark $$$ to win this seat back.

I know we can beat them again -- [**but we have to be ready to fight back. So what do you think? Can you make a contribution before our upcoming May 31 deadline?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230526-1?refcode=em20230526-1-8387&refcode2=8387_434096_eCRefD&akid=8387%2E434096%2EeCRefD) John
We know you get a lot of asks for donations from us, Derek. That's because the strength of the right-wing money machine means we can't afford to take our foot off the fundraising pedal.
**It was with thousands and thousands of normal people chipping in a few bucks at a time that we were able to FLIP PA 🔵 and send John to the U.S. Senate** -- to fight for abortion rights, raise the minimum wage, and make the government work for working people again. Grassroots donations from emails like this one make sure that John can continue that important work.
**[We’re just DAYS away from our May end-of-month fundraising deadline-- so please, chip in any amount to our campaign so we can support John Fetterman’s work down in DC.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230526-1?refcode=em20230526-1-8387&refcode2=8387_434096_eCRefD&akid=8387%2E434096%2EeCRefD)**
**[Donate Now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230526-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230526-8387&refcode2=8387_434096_eCRefD&akid=8387%2E434096%2EeCRefD)**
We really mean it when we say it: **_THANK YOU!!_**
Together,
Team Fetterman 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230526-8387-footer&t=1&refcode2=8387_434096_eCRefD&akid=8387%2E434096%2EeCRefD)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

name: Chrissy
subject: What I’ve been up to:
body:
A NOTE FROM CHRISSY

Happy May! As I write this, I’m looking at the blooming flowers in my yard and watching my dog Libby bask in the sun. Thanks for being on this journey with us - I’m excited to share with you some of what I and my team have been working on recently in Congress!

Promoting Peace at the G-7 Summit in Hiroshima
Earlier this year, I was part of a Congressional delegation to Japan during which we visited the Hiroshima Peace Memorial Museum. I came home and asked our community to join me in making Origami cranes - a symbol of the desire for peace and a world free of nuclear war - to send to Hiroshima in time for the G-7 Summit this month. Newsweek published my op-ed on this project and I was pleased to see our community send 4,000 cranes to Hiroshima (4,000!).

Improving Mental Health Support for Veterans
As a veteran myself, I know the toll service can put on those in uniform and on those who love them. That’s why I helped introduce a bipartisan bill to create a mental health task force in the Department of Defense: This bill is a step toward ensuring a cohesive, coordinated effort to increase access to mental health programs for the troops.

Chairing the Task force on Economic Growth
Alongside Vice-Chair Rep. Nikema Williams (D-GA), I launched the New Democrat Coalition’s Economic Growth and Fiscal Responsibility Task Force earlier this month. We will be identifying, developing, and promoting policies that promote equitable growth and a sustainable federal balance sheet. It’s imperative that we raise our nation’s debt ceiling to honor our debts, yes. It’s also imperative that we make smart choices about spending and revenues to ensure the longer-term financial health and stability of our country. Stay tuned.

Moving, Hosting a Mental Health Fair, Holding Another Town Hall
After four years in Reading City Hall, we moved our office to a larger space at 201 Penn Street which will better enable us to serve the community. Our West Chester office is still at 709 Gay Street. Come visit! May is Mental Health Awareness Month and I am so proud of my team for hosting a Mental Health Awareness Fair and Forum to connect community resources with those who need them. Thanks to all who participated! Lastly, our 73rd town hall is happening on May 31 at 5PM and is focused on foreign policy and national security.

Supporting Small Businesses
From our pies to our people, Berks and Chester Counties have an abundance of exceptional small businesses. As an entrepreneur and former small business owner myself, I know how hard it can be to build and scale a business. That’s why I’m excited to reintroduce the Research Advancing to Market Production (RAMP) for Innovators Act! This bill would provide resources for small businesses to implement and commercialize new ideas to increase profitability.

As we approach the halfway point of 2023 (crazy, right?!), I couldn’t be more proud of the work our team has accomplished in the past five months – and I can’t wait to see what more we get to do for Pennyslvanians like you the rest of the year!

There’s work to be done.

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/houlahan-digital?refcode=jtk817-fr-nd

– Chrissy

clean_body: A NOTE FROM CHRISSY Happy May! As I write this, I’m looking at the blooming flowers in my yard and watching my dog Libby bask in the sun. Thanks for being on this journey with us - I’m excited to share with you some of what I and my team have been working on recently in Congress! Promoting Peace at the G-7 Summit in Hiroshima Earlier this year, I was part of a Congressional delegation to Japan during which we visited the Hiroshima Peace Memorial Museum. I came home and asked our community to join me in making Origami cranes - a symbol of the desire for peace and a world free of nuclear war - to send to Hiroshima in time for the G-7 Summit this month. Newsweek published my op-ed on this project and I was pleased to see our community send 4,000 cranes to Hiroshima (4,000!). Improving Mental Health Support for Veterans As a veteran myself, I know the toll service can put on those in uniform and on those who love them. That’s why I helped introduce a bipartisan bill to create a mental health task force in the Department of Defense: This bill is a step toward ensuring a cohesive, coordinated effort to increase access to mental health programs for the troops. Chairing the Task force on Economic Growth Alongside Vice-Chair Rep. Nikema Williams (D-GA), I launched the New Democrat Coalition’s Economic Growth and Fiscal Responsibility Task Force earlier this month. **Through Movement Lab’s Contest Every Race program, we’re raising $10,000,000 to truly contest *every* race — and build Democratic strength everywhere we do it.**
**[Before I continue: The fundraising deadline for the first phase of this plan is in one week. Would you consider chipping in $10 or more to help us launch the first tier of this campaign in the key battleground states of 2024?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63881021/408294022/580016960?refcode=EM_FR_230526AxiosCER_N_ML_90do_7_G_A_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGI4Y2U0Yy0wNWZjLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I0JfXoB0NQIfQxEIZMazkGuu_vPe-7yYTLSHLUNv67Q=)**
[DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63881022/408294023/580016960?refcode=EM_FR_230526AxiosCER_N_ML_90do_7_G_A_B1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGI4Y2U0Yy0wNWZjLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I0JfXoB0NQIfQxEIZMazkGuu_vPe-7yYTLSHLUNv67Q=)
Over the past two decades, the Democratic Party has lost significant support among voters in rural areas because we just stopped trying. We’ve been paying the price ever since.
From winning about **_1,100_** rural counties in the 1996 presidential election to **_just 455_** in 2008 and **_under 200_** rural counties in the 2020 presidential election, the scale of this problem just keeps growing.
**It’s time for our political strategy and dollars to match that scale.**
With this $10,000,000 investment, we plan to make major strides towards contesting every otherwise uncontested Republican incumbent. Whether it’s how cities tackle climate change, what books our kids read in school, or local laws preventing gun violence, local lawmakers have a massive impact on our everyday lives.
By finally challenging the GOP in these races, we’ll meaningfully improve the lives of millions of Americans as we start to win back everything from school boards and city councils to governors’ mansions and Congress. **[Donate $10 or more right now to help us pull it off and transform the nation. →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63881023/408294024/580016960?refcode=EM_FR_230526AxiosCER_N_ML_90do_7_G_A_L2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGI4Y2U0Yy0wNWZjLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I0JfXoB0NQIfQxEIZMazkGuu_vPe-7yYTLSHLUNv67Q=)**

Friends, We're months away from the 2024 election but the Establishment is already gearing up to come after Freedom Caucus members nationwide. In South Carolina, Freedom Caucus member Rep. April Cromer, who upset a 10-term swampy incumbent in the 2022 Republican Primary, has been attacked in her district with a barrage of special interest money. Her crime? She fought the out-of-control spending in the Palmetto State's budget. In Wyoming, Freedom Caucus Chairman Rep. John Bear got into a war of words over the future of the Cowboy State with their RINO Speaker of the House Albert Sommers, who wrote that the WYFC "incites fear and stokes anger" and "panders to a national agenda" by demanding that the legislature actually keep the promises they make to their conservative voters. We need your help to defend the seats of our Freedom Caucus members so they can continue standing up to the Swamp in both parties and deliver victories for conservatives. clean_body: We’re months away from the 2024 election but the Establishment is already gearing up to come after Freedom Caucus members nationwide. | | | | Friends, We're months away from the 2024 election but the Establishment is already gearing up to come after Freedom Caucus members nationwide. In South Carolina, Freedom Caucus member Rep. April Cromer, who upset a 10-term swampy incumbent in the 2022 Republican Primary, has been attacked in her district with a barrage of special interest money. Her crime? She fought the out-of-control spending in the Palmetto State's budget. In Wyoming, Freedom Caucus Chairman Rep. John Bear got into a war of words over the future of the Cowboy State with their RINO Speaker of the House Albert Sommers, who wrote that the WYFC "incites fear and stokes anger" and "panders to a national agenda" by demanding that the legislature actually keep the promises they make to their conservative voters. We need your help to defend the seats of our Freedom Caucus members so they can continue standing up to the Swamp in both parties and deliver victories for conservatives. Donate to so we can keep electing true, principled conservative fighters in 2024. If you truly want to help, please consider making . No donation is too small. Your contribution will ensure that the Uniparty fails and conservatives win. name: Team WFP
subject: Abortion rights are under attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
For more than half a century, abortion foes have dreamed of the day that abortion would be banned in America. Our goal is to never let that day become a reality. | | | Peter — Since the fall of _Roe v. Wade_ last year, we have seen state after state roll back our reproductive rights. **In just the last two weeks, Nebraska and North Carolina have banned abortion after 12 weeks, and South Carolina banned abortion after only 6 weeks, before many people even know they are pregnant!** Earlier today a judge in South Carolina issued an injunction on South Carolina's abortion ban until the state Supreme Court can weigh in, but we know this reprieve is just temporary, and those seeking abortions in South Carolina, along with Nebraska and North Carolina, will continue to need our support. If someone seeks an abortion before the cutoff date, Republican legislators in these states are doing everything they can to make it as difficult, expensive, and cumbersome to get an abortion — from requiring multiple unnecessary in-person visits before an abortion can be administered, to requiring doctors lie to their patients about the risks of getting an abortion, to placing so many restrictions on clinics that no Planned Parenthood clinic can legally operate (as in the state of North Carolina).1 **Even when Republican lawmakers don’t outright ban abortion, they are making it as difficult as possible to obtain one. And it’s low income and people of color who suffer the most.** That’s why we’re asking Working Families Party members and supporters to show up for our friends in Nebraska, North Carolina, and South Carolina who now must contend with these new abortion restrictions. **[Will you split a donation between abortion funds and pro-choice groups in Nebraska, North Carolina, and South Carolina who are doing everything they can to help those seeking an abortion to receive the care they need? Your support is especially critical to groups fighting on the front lines of these attacks.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wqCcMBxnEvD9MYCZ2EC1fjBuMvg6fc_qjaWplu54v0Bwj0VR3z6ww-4aGDuhlAaZ9g4hSPdvF7PEpikcet_wcAGWWwnFgYQLsv3KO_kCwd5IHOnTIbmBT4hHf9tfi_MG717yVlMpC9NjAJ502iR2sK7U2Onm3KX9KFDtDuFYVMyXFx0ads-X_giVkFBkeYUWSSNBjpcAVvXdZlxb2_9y5L1XncxBN2xsebqXqyLHVeFYm0uLOShIdr29o0rEH9AlvumOZF7al1fZ7VnZqsJPwom1220iLsfXjymUjcc7XTNmj1QzJLVN36JbLT4CWj6KazZlgxu6Vfkl4YP3ymGKLSQbskE9FHohuBvoM-jFREVg/3wi/pW_0jvbuTDitEURKSXEOZQ/h0/U1jer6fIOY0M53dJ9HtzXACC6do6y7oprjtrKU0szRQ)** **[Contribute $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wqCcMBxnEvD9MYCZ2EC1fjBuMvg6fc_qjaWplu54v0Bwj0VR3z6ww-4aGDuhlAaZ9g4hSPdvF7PEpikcet_wcASnAP7v9SnTdfxAIqc2dKv0woILMiC1MYXdwMhrVktDf_Yz5BuDckhQrxZFP80e7jCq2BMXLqr7LKDYWS6wJZE61jfg4_ex6Xg-gdEyrVxucxKkAUrlX6aDBP8OWerM1GgeWt3iZ1FsjT6UsIlOFetf8NpYEh_BW51pwZGLWuHERpEwMXq-YpJpx4F4XchhLYelY7v0RLF1-DwaqOIOJqxCIKbV4HBMAQ8CcdxoHkJQDM6ZDhPQoTQn52sgoh5mVeeQmsXC8NejDEIU8csyvPWQ/3wi/pW_0jvbuTDitEURKSXEOZQ/h1/PHOPCvS_snMfRXQBOG_B8ah4boZ9mFJP4x1T-yb2YDk)** Republicans know that abortion bans are extremely unpopular — even in red states. According to recent polls, 65% of Americans believe that abortion should be legal in all or some cases. Only 7% believe it should be banned in all cases.2
For more than half a century, abortion foes have dreamed of the day that abortion would be banned in America. Our goal is to never let that day become a reality. In the weeks and months ahead, we’ll have more ways to fight back against these attacks on our reproductive rights. Text ROE to 30403 to stay updated on ways to get involved. **[Then split a donation between abortion funds in Nebraska, North Carolina, and South Carolina who urgently need your support today.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wqCcMBxnEvD9MYCZ2EC1fjBuMvg6fc_qjaWplu54v0Bwj0VR3z6ww-4aGDuhlAaZ9g4hSPdvF7PEpikcet_wcAKbDc3VnLbtSxgL23K37JSJD5atgstj45ZFoSHVw85IqYLMBnDqeOpJWDC2SVXvxQiFEYwjGh8KAhXEt36jmlOUxej81Daedk8WAMi8uhxK5oFhfe2B8IBa33IhQssnk0rF-rezLp--kuyzfWl06NkPvfcjft0eM4QwTs7zXbftlZkOygicbl4g1bIvBaQRSPLbrmnhpe7N-Dl_6wp_UXIwdS96aE209uFeHQIt8UG4-gwwzfDr4-79oy5hH_CxoEhvFWDJfVEAK2A5CSzqnGPw/3wi/pW_0jvbuTDitEURKSXEOZQ/h2/Mpa3tLk3j5U-r-0h0AZIBJ95p-GdtVwqqJtTsylFscE)** In love and solidarity, Team WFP Source:

clean_body: For more than half a century, abortion foes have dreamed of the day that abortion would be banned in America. Our goal is to never let that day become a reality. | | | Peter — Since the fall of Roe v. Wade last year, we have seen state after state roll back our reproductive rights. In just the last two weeks, Nebraska and North Carolina have banned abortion after 12 weeks, and South Carolina banned abortion after only 6 weeks, before many people even know they are pregnant! Earlier today a judge in South Carolina issued an injunction on South Carolina's abortion ban until the state Supreme Court can weigh in, but we know this reprieve is just temporary, and those seeking abortions in South Carolina, along with Nebraska and North Carolina, will continue to need our support. If someone seeks an abortion before the cutoff date, Republican legislators in these states are doing everything they can to make it as difficult, expensive, and cumbersome to get an abortion — from requiring multiple unnecessary in-person visits before an abortion can be administered, to requiring doctors lie to their patients about the risks of getting an abortion, to placing so many restrictions on clinics that no Planned Parenthood clinic can legally operate (as in the state of North Carolina).1 Even when Republican lawmakers don’t outright ban abortion, they are making it as difficult as possible to obtain one. And it’s low income and people of color who suffer the most. That’s why we’re asking Working Families Party members and supporters to show up for our friends in Nebraska, North Carolina, and South Carolina who now must contend with these new abortion restrictions. Republicans know that abortion bans are extremely unpopular — even in red states. According to recent polls, 65% of Americans believe that abortion should be legal in all or some cases. Only 7% believe it should be banned in all cases.2 For more than half a century, abortion foes have dreamed of the day that abortion would be banned in America. Our goal is to never let that day become a reality. In the weeks and months ahead, we’ll have more ways to fight back against these attacks on our reproductive rights. Text ROE to 30403 to stay updated on ways to get involved. In love and solidarity, Team WFP Source: 1\. , Abortion, Every Day, May 7, 2023 2\. , The Washington Post, February 23, 2023 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Working Families, please .

clean_body: Abortion is on the ballot this November, no matter what they erase. = | We cannot say we are too surprised, fellow activist: = The GOP KNOWS voters are firmly against abortion bans. Everywhere it has been put on the ballot since Dobbs , voters sided with bodily autonomy. So, having made it through the primary, the official Republican nominee for Pennsylvania Supreme Court now wants to hide her campaign website’s previous anti-abortion language. = = The justice elected to fill the empty seat in the PA Supreme Court will take the power to sway our political landscape for a decade or more. With reproductive rights under continuous attacks, it is more important than ever that we elect a Supreme Court justice adamant about using that power to safeguard our constitutional right to choose. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. Hi team, Earlier this week we passed a devastating milestone: It’s been a year since the mass shooting at Robb Elementary School in Uvalde that claimed the lives of 19 children and two adults. Our hearts are particularly heavy because 365 days later, we have lost hundreds of more Americans to mass shootings. According to _The Washington Post_ , in the year since the Uvalde shooting there have been 25 incidents of gun violence on school campuses, with more school children losing their lives. **Andrea is committed to ending the cycle of violence, and that starts with fighting for commonsense gun safety laws. body:
| | | **Peter,****It is Rick Scott.**

**We have _five days_ until our end-of-month deadline, and here's my plan to meet our goal:**
* **Reach out to our team’s TOP patriots.**
* **Connect grassroots conservatives to our mission on the ground in Florida.**
* **Put in the work - and _DON’T GIVE UP_ until we meet our goal.**

**As one of my trusted team members, you hold an important place in our mission, and that’s why I’m reaching out to you today.**

Hi friend,
I’ll cut to the chase. We have just five days left to hit our fundraising goal for this month.
I mean it when I say that giving any amount, no matter how small, truly makes an impact. Can you donate $5 before our May fundraising deadline? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_052623_FiveDays&amount=5]
CHIP IN $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_052623_FiveDays&amount=5]
CHIP IN MORE! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_052623_FiveDays]
Our grassroots campaign doesn’t take any money from corporate PACs and we plan to keep it that way. But that means we need your support!
We’ve got a long primary ahead of us, and we know as a progressive grassroots campaign, it will take all of us together – as a family – to win this. I know we can do this because that’s how we’ve done this before. Our community built the coalitions that beat Russell Pearce, Joe Arpaio, Donald Trump, and Kari Lake. Beating MAGA Republicans is not easy, but together we can do it and win.
So, with just five days until the end of the month, can you help power our campaign today by pitching in $5 today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_052623_FiveDays&amount=5]
Muchas Gracias,
Raquel

[**May 26, 1907:** Born Marion Robert Morrison in Winterset, Iowa, iconic American actor and real-life cowboy didn’t take on his new name, John Wayne, until 1930 during his first big movie role. John Wayne, “The Duke,” was a beloved American actor known for his Western roles and patriotism.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=7de01465a96142a9b26cab13335b2f75&_e=3RKKSDuCIwF0--P9KJuqZgD5Kd2x47nqlRC4UWIsgtJDrvMyHQls265TUgfgHjfN9GQ48hwm3IzrYb05A1vUiwSmEyEYWGGCcA44JVrv_zkw07udX9J9ZDDV44MYS_E3zgCg3eKkjW6eB4oRmk--W2Dif-Zi6VzvxZTfqxWF1dTt0NYas046LkaMosP0HDWC9YR2-j5lDDFvr9m40vlvqoyp81ExBVV9FDYXiKP03rA%3D) **Source -[johnwayne.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=7de01465a96142a9b26cab13335b2f75&_e=3RKKSDuCIwF0--P9KJuqZgD5Kd2x47nqlRC4UWIsgtJDrvMyHQls265TUgfgHjfN9GQ48hwm3IzrYb05A1vUi9-HFDhNIzPeeRc2gtaWZklg9fOPriNRyopN8Ifq7LQw-qK21l_B8Qucz2czTRZbsDA2_z0zqFAsrH1zCTA_r7uuN1t2lCQky9fZ8zstLU4PlNjFk4r5C47fJ7cAmQqJwDYrD_f30i9puL830o_C4PE%3D)[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=7de01465a96142a9b26cab13335b2f75&_e=3RKKSDuCIwF0--P9KJuqZhuHQ0Ce_txliYAXq8yvOhQYgQiwz6ijkWNjp-1PvsdzavlKuq5VzpVrL7RydeMEn-9sYesDZfB8COeIfKB7pHt7eYkqu11GDh4YouTXo1vpXzzfvsuzbIx0eK9EqsSz9zBVLrmjv3SWbEcay5EdqArgTI3fsfaec5FO-cz-OOWjIB4fbtVKwf8IU8mdtdr5fy8RndqMhYEwxsSYKgWN1GZmfPBshRbsfWtDz-5l25nF)**

[**May 26, 1924:** President Calvin Coolidge signed the Immigration Act of 1924, which codified immigration laws in the United States at the time. The law included quota limits on immigration from countries and certain regions, set up the visa requirements from U.S. consulates, and authorized the creation of a border control service. ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=7de01465a96142a9b26cab13335b2f75&_e=3RKKSDuCIwF0--P9KJuqZg188ybJA7b9NbDxsMPMCdLYgKIBsQDINhqYwtVonvuem3i_-OlbRA02zn2zGMyTnawY83JDcNfAKRjc8gAATV7aLGsGZHIdbX7P5C7K47hgURK6h5CMrV2-5D_5IOBBpjyKQlBp1YL5VxU35SNqaX1dfRd8XAlKxgv1RG5zgTzMbifKzRjA3ni62mUeJRC4HJErCrC7VyZosl9Bm_qWcPVWB7sHiIZDF-2pZAShYa1o) **Source -[wikipedia.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=7de01465a96142a9b26cab13335b2f75&_e=3RKKSDuCIwF0--P9KJuqZg188ybJA7b9NbDxsMPMCdLYgKIBsQDINhqYwtVonvuem3i_-OlbRA02zn2zGMyTnT9d_E6bnBxRPEsL7Jpueuv2XH66fzOZ5UZ5rk17DoEa5minXJCxdKuKqxZ1UI3oQAqE5ZhuI2URzukpGy1ufkkyJ7MdKIU6ATneCcgopzjrIUHu4Y5NeW9eNX26FeCxJ9knZNtktxJsA_DroeFD_MMdHwYpSwuiwnGSwkS31ToT)**

[**May 26, 1927:** After 19 years of production, the Ford Motor Company held a ceremony at the company’s Highland Park plant to finalize the ending of Model T manufacturing. The estimated number of Model Ts produced was 15 million, so the final car was dubbed the Fifteen-Millionth Ford and officially proclaimed the “last Model T.”](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=7de01465a96142a9b26cab13335b2f75&_e=3RKKSDuCIwF0--P9KJuqZqTJA0t2LqtfvAskVR2Pj0gFQcbGhRRhWuwDheGMdKRB-g58KlJTbEp128SJ50IWIxbCVbG2IoDvc5q4ht0HBHH_XsqZu7y3p4bnX4dS-LBEwMDRYMf2vaD50JfCKWblUYd8i9-1F0jyfgE_7tsMczoZ18SsTrYuWQULif9lvAr24bSOwu0G0ocNXtsaeafJZtCUVDD3Nap3nncytRqM7q3T40aLmQhcNiMC9idCfsQcNB2_c0ntQExrzZHoXdxDYhsgQcDk7gY6M5FWaTKAjurHE3G2ioLcRPCUTz8nC8rR) **Source -[thehenryford.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=7de01465a96142a9b26cab13335b2f75&_e=3RKKSDuCIwF0--P9KJuqZqTJA0t2LqtfvAskVR2Pj0gFQcbGhRRhWuwDheGMdKRB-g58KlJTbEp128SJ50IWIxbCVbG2IoDvc5q4ht0HBHH_XsqZu7y3p4bnX4dS-LBEwMDRYMf2vaD50JfCKWblUYd8i9-1F0jyfgE_7tsMczpT4KL_20ySFiedOZ9nu8RkId4tcmRdy40TEwTE8s_oFrTDdbR63pR0tHvcoYvdBgJ7wvXO_mop8hShJ4p67ouNF8gblQXznHbO5h1EEGIz7aoBApNmrs2dNy6u1QrokgIrxRl3mlihbHMXqfybCdwk)**

body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8681?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230526_FR_FightFascismFund_0_SP48_OurRevolution_NA_NA_FightFascismFund&t=1009&akid=4319%2E5885482%2E76SqBk ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

As soon as June 1, America could default for
the first time in history and trigger an economic catastrophe – all
because fascist Republicans are refusing to do their duty and pay for
spending they already authorized unless Joe Biden agrees to horrific
budget cuts.

Bernie Sanders warned of this exact scenario before the midterm elections
and urged Congress to take action to ensure our bills were paid before
Republicans took over.

Because corporate Democrats failed to listen, we are now just days away
from a default that could end social security payments for tens of
millions of vulnerable seniors and disabled folks, spike unemployment to

name: Colin Allred
subject: this is why I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
| | |
---
Hi, Peter, I wanted to tell you why I'm running for Senate, but I know you're busy, so I'll keep this short.
1\. As a father, I'm running to build a better world for my kids and yours, to create more opportunities for them and their peers to succeed and to ensure our country lives up to its promises for the next generation.

2\. As a Texan, I've watched Ted Cruz fail our state for more than a decade, doing what's best for Ted Cruz and _not_ for Texas families. I'm running to be a voice for Texans in the Senate, and I promise to always put you first.

3\. As a civil rights attorney, I'm running to defend our fundamental rights. Ted Cruz and his allies are waging an all-out war on our right to vote, which is the basis for all other rights. Expanding our Democratic Senate majority is our best hope of stopping them.
**If you're with me in this fight, I'm humbly asking:[ Will you please split $5 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Letitia James' campaign to raise $50,000 before midnight? Every dollar helps as we work to unseat Ted Cruz, protect the Senate and build a better future for our families. →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63886083/408299336/1337142349?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1089-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmEyNWNmYS0wOGZjLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8a3gN403T5Gcjw03zQatH3HxI_nQUY0MynT9Sgq1L6o=)**

name: Team Kennedy
subject: In Focus - Ukraine (Test Text)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
| [ ](http://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=in_focus_ukraine_text&n=1)
---
Dear Peter -- From time to time we will send you newsletters about the issues that are a high priority in Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.’s campaign. Today our focus will be on the **Ukraine War**. Mr. Kennedy believes that (like many recent U.S. military actions) the Russian invasion is a murderous and illegal action under international law. **However, it did not happen in a vacuum** , but was the predictable result of American foreign policy going back decades. The Maidan uprising of 2014 expressed a deep-seated yearning of the Ukrainian people to be free of Russian domination and corrupt domestic oligarchs. They wanted real democracy. Tragically, their authentic aspirations were cynically exploited to serve the geopolitical aim of removing Russia as an impediment to American global hegemony. Numerous foreign policy experts have for years told of the dangers of expanding NATO to Russia’s borders and deliberately provoking that nation. **[This compilation](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=fi8ohR5yafVpuvZ6s-I2tudS6jGelH4WUdiR3ll22rXDpajcLia5-IUiqdFPkE2C&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=in_focus_ukraine_text&n=2)** by Donald Smith of CODEPINK helps illuminate the magnitude of our blunder. Rather than learn from their mistakes, the U.S. foreign policy establishment continues to do everything it can to **escalate the conflict.** The most recent escalation is the announcement that F-16 jets will be provided to Ukraine, an extremely provocative gesture. Just as they did during the Iraq War, America’s jingoistic press outlets bear a major responsibility for this unnecessary war that has caused Ukraine to hemorrhage blood and America to hemorrhage **[treasure](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=7zsaTrYaHbXYUUvtUozf0ugCvGcybDzfS6xyXZKl1FbU_bWvYgiCsfw8OJ98_8utJRS7byk26i9rkroE-YSaFaUCPNyNv8peHqW4sj1ZYKs&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=in_focus_ukraine_text&n=3)****.** Rather than seeking to contextualize events properly for their readers, the U.S. media systematically deceived Americans about the causes and course of the war while faithfully parroting the Neocon propaganda narrative. Here is a succinct **[summary](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=_NdnEzZ46Sf0WFo7xBKTzD7JFfPK9Hx0y3VekblryQziVr_GC_4o8JwekkHluLhBNCKmnYqQSGN7cZ0qSGEWUW5rlbBNUu3znpW9g9a8VfedRjEzjVbd4YusWznsHobV&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=in_focus_ukraine_text&n=4)** of the Neocon agenda, published the year BEFORE the Ukraine war. Some foreign policy experts are well aware of the folly of our present course. Mr. Kennedy agrees with the **[assessment](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=fTVha7KQid6-6PRaQf4mFxXr1CiC2h0-A70gDBfz_yqNv1umcK4SgHYdt47nAJ6xUhKfcPJYy5_uY0_UltXOnA&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=in_focus_ukraine_text&n=5)** of the Eisenhower Media Network’s 14 retired military commanders, Presidential advisors, and other experts. The results of decades of provocation were predictable. At the very least, policymakers should carefully consider this perspective, to balance out the relentless warmongering and myopic Russophobia of the foreign policy establishment. The point here is not to excuse the Russian invasion, but to understand the full set of circumstances behind it. With understanding, we can negotiate a just and lasting peace, and avoid starting more wars in the future. If this perspective resonates with you, please consider making a [**donation**](https://www.kennedy24.com/support?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=in_focus_ukraine_text&n=6)** to the campaign.** Team Kennedy
[](http://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=in_focus_ukraine_text&n=7)[http://www.kennedy24.com/](http://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=in_focus_ukraine_text&n=8)
* * *
PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.kennedy24.com/unsubscribe?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=in_focus_ukraine_text&n=9).

But sadly, RINOs would rather let Biden get 4 more years in the White House so long as it means that I’m not the President in 2025. At my 2017 Inauguration, I declared that “What truly matters is not which party controls our government, but whether our government is controlled by the people.” My presidency is all about putting the American people first, which is why the corrupt special interests who’ve made a fortune off of putting you dead last are out to “stop” me. I don’t have mega-donors giving $200 million. But I do have millions of MAGA patriots like YOU giving $1, $5, $10, $24. Even $1 from you today can mean the difference between saving America or letting special interests buy the White House yet again. Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

body:

Peter — You’re probably close to logging off for the long weekend, but before you do we hope you’ll give us a second of your time. name: Team Pramila
subject: Real power comes from the people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We wanted to take a moment to explain to you why your contribution is so critical to our movement to support Pramila and continue growing our momentum:
#
Peter, we wanted to take a moament to explain to you why your contribution is so critical to our movement to support Pramila and continue growing our momentum:
1. **Pramila is one of the few progressive voices in Congress** who is dedicated and determined to hold bad actors accountable for keeping our democracy in a gridlock.
2. As we head towards the end of the quarter next month, we'll need **all the strength and support we can gain** from the grassroots to show our opposition the true strength of our movement.
3. **Pramila and our collective values are under constant attack from right-wing extremists.** We need to have her back as much as she has ours to ensure their hateful and broken ideologies do not continue to spread in our communities. That starts with keeping our movement totally stocked with the tools and resources to continue organizing and planning to come out on top.

As a grassroots movement, Pramila does not accept any money from corporate PACs or special interest groups. She knows that the real power comes from the people, and relying on grassroots donors to chip in what they can when they can is the key to building a people-powered movement.
[**Peter, we need to ramp up our numbers before our end of the month deadline on Wednesday. That's why we're reaching out to ask if you can make a donation of $3 or more today to help us reach our goal of $7,585.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42218?source=em20230526-2529&t=1&akid=2529%2E420207%2EaSn-qI)
**[Donate](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42218?refcode=em20230526-2529&t=20&akid=2529%2E420207%2EaSn-qI)**
Together,
Team Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230526-2529-footer&t=21&refcode2=2529_420207_aSn-qI&akid=2529%2E420207%2EaSn-qI)**

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LATEEFAH FOR CONGRESS
body:
Help us set our campaign for Lateefah off right by supporting our campaign kickoff today.
# [](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/39?t=1&akid=31%2E1163%2ERliDiL)
We wanted you to be one of the first to know: It's finally time to bring our campaign to the community. We're hosting an official kickoff in the heart of Oakland -- _and doing so is going to take resources._
**[Can you chip in $5 or anything you can afford right now to directly support our campaign kickoff event on June 10?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230526-2?refcode=em20230526-2&refcode2=31_1163_RliDiL&akid=31%2E1163%2ERliDiL)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230526-2?amount=5&refcode=em20230526-2&refcode2=31_1163_RliDiL&akid=31%2E1163%2ERliDiL)**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230526-2&refcode=em20230526-2?refcode2=31_1163_RliDiL&akid=31%2E1163%2ERliDiL)
It's important to Lateefah and the rest of our team that this event is as FUN and accessible as possible, and here are just a few of the costs we'll need to be able to afford to make it happen:
* Venue rental
* Lateefah for Congress merch
* Transportation for our team and community volunteers to ensure the campaign kickoff runs smoothly
* Food
* Assortment of materials like plates, paper, pens, etc.

**[A donation of $5 would really help us out as we budget out the event and is a great way to directly support the start of this campaign! Can we count on your $5 donation today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230526-2?refcode=em20230526-2&refcode2=31_1163_RliDiL&akid=31%2E1163%2ERliDiL)**

Team Lateefah

This August, we’re working to win three special elections to re-elect Justin Jones in Nashville, Justin Pearson in Memphis, help Lori Love flip District 3, and pass common sense gun laws during the August special legislative session. **So today, we’re launching our August Accountability Fund. This fund will help fuel our efforts to:**
1. Register and mobilize voters across the state ahead of the August 3rd special elections for Districts 3, 52, and 86
2. Support our Run Tennessee initiative — to recruit, train, and equip new candidates to run in their communities

clean_body: Will you chip in right now and be a founding donor? | = Hey Peter — I’ve got something important to ask of you today. This August, we’re working to win three special elections to re-elect Justin Jones in Nashville, Justin Pearson in Memphis, help Lori Love flip District 3, and pass common sense gun laws during the August special legislative session. So today, we’re launching our August Accountability Fund. This fund will help fuel our efforts to: 1. Register and mobilize voters across the state ahead of the August 3rd special elections for Districts 3, 52, and 86 2. Support our Run Tennessee initiative — to recruit, train, and equip new candidates to run in their communities 3. Build our organizing team to help us execute the statewide strategy we need to win all three seats and pass common sense gun legislation to protect communities across Tennessee Will you chip in right now to help us meet our $10,000 founding donation goal before the end of the month to hold Republicans accountable this August? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = By June, we’ll need to have the money and resources that can help us expand our organizing team and mobilize all 95 counties across Tennessee. We’ll have to recruit volunteers from every corner of the state, and train them with the tools and knowledge they need to combat the GOP misinformation machine and get folks energized to hold Republicans accountable at the end of the summer. Peter — We have work to do if we’re going to restore Justin Pearson and Justin Jones back to their status as full members of the General Assembly and flip District 3 to elect Lori Love. We woke up the nation to what’s going on in Tennessee, and we must build on that momentum. Will you make a founding contribution today, Peter? Anything you can pitch in today will pay back in dividends in August. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you for your continued support, Peter. Yours in justice, Hendrell Remus, Chair Tennessee Democratic Party 4900 Centennial Blvd Suite 300 Nashville, TN 37209 United States | mailto:info@tndp.org | CAROL V. **[We have to do all that we can to defend this seat and our Democratic majority in the Senate. Derek, can you join our team by splitting a donation between our campaign and Josh Shapiro’s campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63889270/408301195/-1645383944?refcode=email_052623_jds-casey&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmJjYjYxMi0wYmZjLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-VVCWedGAqUoOb98hHWwTm9t5uZHbmIEK9ykQROy1FI=)**

clean_body: Earning votes in every one of these counties is how we’ll win. Hi friend, Since I announced I’m running for re-election, you know what that means — the map is back! = When Republicans look at this map, they see an opportunity to take back the Senate here in Pennsylvania. The NRSC is already launching attack ads against me and recruiting candidates to take back this seat in 2024. = Families, union workers, and middle-class Americans across our state see something else in this map: massive investments in next-generation infrastructure and family-sustaining jobs. That’s what we can achieve if we earn the votes of Pennsylvanians in every county, from Erie to Bucks. = | | = You can be sure you’ll see more of this map soon — and we’re putting the work in NOW to ensure it stays blue on Election Day. body:
Last month, Kamala and I launched our campaign for reelection. | | |
---
Peter, I don’t send emails like this often. So, I hope you’ll give me a chance to explain just how far we’ve come over these past two years and why **[every contribution our campaign receives right now is important.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ymOoaZ2Tr-ojHUJEEb0iKbe46rgXAelUYiv0eD9jFoyIzlD58zhHvtdSE4fpvKt0e1vTEKJx-6pwmmVw3dvwD-zHwa8ctCZWalV2wqaVB5vMJGck0VtZOy7fOfYPsUi5intUhEFO39C3C4NuSwdegVmn1oCEii8HW7uN1zjTuHVEX7jFWetq4xoPMRRI1DKRMYK9WlRQJQ1C55TExYy9K0yMWG3v1L6hOVsXHsgnYkIE9F41Q_9inMKx6ljBz-9_UwCYy0xbcuSf3i_eDB1y8R_2DJSRaPca1NeEpdvJdiiS8itQHDCa4yMYbDcG6f3GN3lFr-nPZmJb2bJhJS129Mto4qItsyFjqDNxEb7Csxyb0MH2gT8-u8Q0ztDUcRrIh4ds6xdTY4OU9sUWhw8LUB5Kc5ctiDCwAB_OCZlr9hWRgZ8QwSf5M-dpitEreXBs_h04sPPF2nE7ZzmZuWxMG0_pAVU1M0agCen2qaQ4nP8Q/3wi/v9yzIs0yS1uIofY4juc4YA/h0/KgjBSuKbYY_ADV3Bh1OyBTGWLQXUXf75P0Gxi6-4TQY)** We have accomplished so much since Kamala and I were sworn in in January of 2021: We confirmed Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court; passed the first significant federal gun safety law in nearly 30 years; passed the biggest investment in combating climate change in our nation’s history; got to work lowering costs for working families; brought the unemployment rate to its lowest in 50 years... the list goes on. **I believe there’s not a thing we can’t do if we do it together -- and I really mean that.** Folks like you who support our party and our work made all of this possible. Peter, for as much as we’ve accomplished, we have some unfinished business on our agenda. We simply can’t afford to become complacent now. _We must finish the job._ **Will you chip in $25 to our reelection campaign today? Whatever you are able to afford will go a long way toward helping us build a winning reelection campaign.**

clean_body: Last month, Kamala and I launched our campaign for reelection. | | | Peter, I don’t send emails like this often. So, I hope you’ll give me a chance to explain just how far we’ve come over these past two years and why We have accomplished so much since Kamala and I were sworn in in January of 2021: We confirmed Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court; passed the first significant federal gun safety law in nearly 30 years; passed the biggest investment in combating climate change in our nation’s history; got to work lowering costs for working families; brought the unemployment rate to its lowest in 50 years... the list goes on. I believe there’s not a thing we can’t do if we do it together -- and I really mean that. Folks like you who support our party and our work made all of this possible. Peter, for as much as we’ve accomplished, we have some unfinished business on our agenda. We simply can’t afford to become complacent now. We must finish the job. Will you chip in $25 to our reelection campaign today? Whatever you are able to afford will go a long way toward helping us build a winning reelection campaign. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thanks to folks like you who donated time and money to support our party through the midterms -- we are delivering on our agenda. But we’re not done yet. Thanks, Joe Joe Biden

body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Our Squad is holding the line on debt ceiling negotiations, and they are
ensuring that we fight to raise the debt ceiling without any cuts to
critical programs like SNAP:

Speaker Kevin McCarthy and Republicans are trying to make cuts to critical
and life-saving programs like SNAP and Medicaid by implementing harsh work
requirements.

It is immoral for a country to give tax breaks for private jets and yachts
and then work to destabilize people’s lives by threatening to cut vital
social services. Justice Democrats in Congress are holding the line
against Republicans who are working to strip people of critical programs.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134698?refcode=em20230526-29140&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=29140%2E1203867%2EtkM1sh ]Help us recruit, elect, and expand our bloc of Justice Democrats in
Congress who will fight for solutions that match the scale of the crises
we face by making a $3 contribution right now.

Right now we have eleven Justice Democrats in Congress — imagine if we had
20 or even 30 folks who fight every single day for the 99%? Running
against the entire political establishment takes a lot of resources and we
operate on a shoestring budget — which means your grassroots donations
have an incredible impact.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134698?refcode=em20230526-29140&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=29140%2E1203867%2EtkM1sh ]Contribute $3

Together we will continue to fight for the soul of the Democratic Party,

Team JD

this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank

name: Peggy Lorinser
subject: Amount doesn't matter.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
Bob's monthly books close in 4 days
We want a massive list of small individual donors reflected on our FEC report to show the Nation just how much energy is behind our cause.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-dr-bob-1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-dr-bob-1]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-dr-bob-1]
Hi ,
We truly hate asking for donations. Big money doesn't belong in politics.
It's why Bob Lorinser for Congress [bit.ly/FundDrBob] depends on grassroots support. We're up against an end-of-the-month fundraising deadline and are humbly requesting you chip in a small amount, $5, $10, $15, or whatever you can afford, to increase the people-power -- not the dollar-power -- behind our movement.
Any amount you can give greatly appreciated.
So far, 1,300 individuals have donated this year! , will you be 1,301?
Bob is running against corporate PACs and dark money, and we need representatives who will act in our best interest, not to appease special interest groups. But, to stay competitive, w e need to hire more staff and cannot lose momentum.
Thank you for your continued support, loyalty, and generosity. Have a blessed Memorial Day weekend.
Peggy
Peggy Lorinser
"I Do the Books"
Bob Lorinser for Congress
MAKE A CONTRIBUTION [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-dr-bob-1]

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Dead grizzly bear found brutally murdered by Yellowstone
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1792390?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **YOUR SIGNATURE IS NEEDED: A dead grizzly bear was just found brutally murdered near Yellowstone. SAVE innocent bears from being slaughtered: [Take action now!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1792391?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** As a grizzly bear, you don’t understand the concept of state borders or the politics of your species' protections. Your only priority is survival and the survival of your baby cubs who are relying on you to scrounge for food to keep them nourished until they are strong enough to survive on their own. You leave your cubs asleep in the den in search of food. You pick up the scent of a potential meal and follow it, having no idea that you’ve crossed outside of Yellowstone -- **_and that outside of the park, Wyoming permits the brutal hunting of bears like you..._** You’re frightened of humans, but the coast seems to be clear. You carry along your way, following the smell. Ahh, here it is! You’re tempted to gobble it all up, but you know you need to feed your cubs. Okay, maybe just a small bite... but as you reach for the yummy treat -- _***CLAMP***_ \-- a powerful metal contraption _**crushes its metal teeth around your paw, and you scream out in excruciating pain as it pierces your fur and blood pours out.**_ You cannot move. Soon, the trophy hunters who set this cruel bait and trap will come to finish killing you and **bring your dead body back as a souvenir.** You think of your babies, alone and scared. _**Without you, your orphaned cubs will likely DIE OF STARVATION or HYPOTHERMIA.**_ Friend, ruthless trophy hunters are _**BRUTALLY MURDERING**_ innocent grizzly bears like this right now, and we’re running out time to SAVE these precious animals. **[Won’t you speak up today and be a voice for defenseless bears and bear cubs before it’s too late? Add your name now!>>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1792392?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1792393?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The Trump administration tried to gut the Endangered Species Act and even succeeded in removing life-saving protections for grizzly bears. Today, it’s still completely _**LEGAL**_ for vicious trophy hunters to **_indiscriminately MURDER_** these beloved native mammals, including harmless bear cubs asleep in their dens!
In the states bordering Yellowstone (Idaho, Montana, and Wyoming), bears **lack the necessary protections** keeping them safe from merciless hunters, so innocent grizzlies are being **_SLAUGHTERED_** in droves: like the poor helpless bear found **violently killed** a few weeks ago, _only 14 miles outside of Yellowstone._
But the GOP isn’t stopping there. **Extremist Republican lawmakers like Lauren Boebert** are actively proposing bills that would _strip away ESA protections_ even further, leaving vulnerable animals like grizzly bears and gray wolves -- along with their cubs and pups -- at high risk of being **MASSACRED** by cruel trophy hunters.
_**We know you’d be heartbroken if these iconic species went extinct, Friend.**_ That’s why we’re calling on YOU and other activists from your area to help STOP brutal trophy hunting of innocent animals. **[Your signature is urgently needed to DEMAND federal protections of grizzly bears -- SIGN NOW>>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1792394?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1792393?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for your activism.
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Allyson Damikolas
subject: I’m running because I don’t want other families to continue to suffer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Allyson for Congress
body:
Friends,

Growing up, I didn’t have much. So I had to work harder than everyone else. After scorching years of constant work and school, I became a chemical engineer.

But when my daughters developed serious medical conditions, I left my career to focus on them. My kids drive my passion for making the world better than the way I found it.

I’ve spent countless nights on the phone arguing with insurance companies, trying to get them to cover my daughters’ medical bills. And I know, there are many other families in this district who are struggling with the same thing.

Unfortunately, career politicians like Congresswoman Young Kim have lost touch with the struggles folks in California-40 face. They power their campaigns with money from big pharma and end up working for corporate special interests, not Californians.

Together, we can stand up to them.

I’m hoping that I can count on you to be one of my campaign’s very first donors. The donation itself is much more important than the amount, and I’m grateful for every penny.

DONATE >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_email_2023q2?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.05.26_B1_warmup1

We should be doing everything we can to ensure families and their children have access to the medical care they need to treat medical conditions without worrying about going bankrupt.
I’m going to give it my all to fight for this but I can’t do it alone:

Please make a donation of any amount to join the fight, friends.

DONATE >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_email_2023q2?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.05.26_B1_warmup1

Thank you for standing up for the families in this district!

– Allyson

Paid for by Allyson for Congress
Allyson for Congress
PO Box 1813

clean_body: Friends, Growing up, I didn’t have much. So I had to work harder than everyone else. After scorching years of constant work and school, I became a chemical engineer. But when my daughters developed serious medical conditions, I left my career to focus on them. My kids drive my passion for making the world better than the way I found it. I’ve spent countless nights on the phone arguing with insurance companies, trying to get them to cover my daughters’ medical bills. And I know, there are many other families in this district who are struggling with the same thing. Unfortunately, career politicians like Congresswoman Young Kim have lost touch with the struggles folks in California-40 face. They power their campaigns with money from big pharma and end up working for corporate special interests, not Californians. Together, we can stand up to them. I’m hoping that I can count on you to be one of my campaign’s very first donors. The donation itself is much more important than the amount, and I’m grateful for every penny. DONATE >> We should be doing everything we can to ensure families and their children have access to the medical care they need to treat medical conditions without worrying about going bankrupt. I’m going to give it my all to fight for this but I can’t do it alone: Please make a donation of any amount to join the fight, friends. DONATE >> Thank you for standing up for the families in this district! – Allyson Paid for by Allyson for Congress Allyson for Congress PO Box 1813 Tustin, CA 92781-9998 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

Friend,

A lot of campaigns are urging you to donate before their self-constructed fundraising deadlines. They’re probably making you feel terrible if you don’t contribute too, aren’t they?

At Team DeSantis we’re taking a different approach.

Our entire fundraising & digital program’s foundation is built on this principle: Our donors are a part of our team; they are NOT our personal piggy bank.

Look, I get it. Times are tough thanks to Joe Biden's Economy and our team doesn't want to pressure you towards donating if you can’t afford it.

You will never receive a solicitation from this campaign that promises a fake match or degrades you for not donating.

No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.

That’s what this campaign is all about, and I promise you, that's the kind of President you will have when I am in the White House.

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America’s veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---

Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Friend,
George Soros has gone on record to say that he wants a long, drawn-out Republican primary so that he can quietly buy the White House for Crooked Joe.
**But I will not give Soros what he wants.**
_And I know YOU won’t either._

subject: Insult to Injury
body:
What You Need To Know Today! No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-alilluy-trhiujldw-v/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alilluy-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Good Morning and Happy Friday.[_Trump had a bizarre reaction_](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alilluy-trhiujldw-y/) to DeSantis' announcement.**
**Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alilluy-trhiujldw-j/) **Target on the Refuse to Buy List** A**[right-wing investment fund has given Target Corp. the boot](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alilluy-trhiujldw-t/), **adding to the mounting fallout over the retailer's Pride merchandising plans. **We Are Not Terrorists** The Biden administration is doling out taxpayer money through an anti-terrorism grant initiative to a university program that has**[explicitly lumped the Republican Party, as well as Christian and conservative groups, into the same category as Nazis](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alilluy-trhiujldw-i/).** **Insult to Injury** So many crazy stories out of Colorado lately. A former social worker **f[aked brain cancer to dodge prosecution](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alilluy-trhiujldw-d/)** after she made up a story about a councilwoman molesting her own child.

**FBI in Contempt** The GOP is officially threatening FBI Director Wray with contempt. **[But will they DO anything about it?](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alilluy-trhiujldw-h/)** **Another Company to Boycott** I can't keep track of all the companies that are putting their companies at risk because of boycotts. **[There is a new one](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alilluy-trhiujldw-k/)**! **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alilluy-trhiujldw-u/)!**
* Simple **[tutorial](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alilluy-trhiujldw-o/).**
* **[Yikes](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alilluy-trhiujldw-x/)!**
* Those**[people](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alilluy-trhiujldw-m/).**
* **[Warning](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alilluy-trhiujldw-c/) labels.**

Do you have a minute, folks? I want to share how I’ve been fighting to deliver results for New Mexico. **First and foremost** , I refuse to let House Republicans’ manufactured debt ceiling crisis cut into critical benefits like Social Security — and I’m working to strengthen programs that support seniors, workers, and families. **Next** , I’ve introduced legislation to address our shared priorities — including strengthening childhood cancer research, ensuring our service members can take medical leave for abortion and reproductive healthcare in any state, and improving transmission planning so we can build a strong clean energy infrastructure. **Finally** , I’m committed to defending our Senate Majority so we can build on our progress. But it will take all of us coming together to defend the 23 Democratic seats up for re-election — that includes my seat in New Mexico. **That’s why I’m asking:** **[Can you pitch in any amount to my re-election campaign before our end-of-month deadline? clean_body: Do you have a minute, folks? I want to share how I’ve been fighting to deliver results for New Mexico. First and foremost , I refuse to let House Republicans’ manufactured debt ceiling crisis cut into critical benefits like Social Security — and I’m working to strengthen programs that support seniors, workers, and families. Next , I’ve introduced legislation to address our shared priorities — including strengthening childhood cancer research, ensuring our service members can take medical leave for abortion and reproductive healthcare in any state, and improving transmission planning so we can build a strong clean energy infrastructure. Finally , I’m committed to defending our Senate Majority so we can build on our progress. But it will take all of us coming together to defend the 23 Democratic seats up for re-election — that includes my seat in New Mexico. That’s why I’m asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = I can’t thank you enough for your support. — Martin | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner.
