Team, Yesterday, Kirsten joined a rally in Times Square to support the Writers Guild of America in their fight for a fair contract: _"Writing is one of the hardest jobs...you need to be original...creative...harness the power of the human spirit into words...**what you are demanding in this strike is not only fair, it's necessary."**_ \- Team Gillibrand

|
* * *
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63892932/408307063/1575385346?refcode=2023_05_26_ND&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWVhN2M5Ny0xNGZjLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GUtoyYGqz4GthSCr-NKZ_RAmfbdoTpj3tWUPsYaf6lc=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. subject: I’ll keep this quick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zak for Congress
body:
#
Hey, it's Zak Malamed -- the Democrat running against George Santos.
**Here 's the truth: no other candidate running for this seat has the history of defeating extreme MAGA Republicans that I do.**
This is critical because our race will determine whether control of the House swings back to Democrats -- or stays in the hands of Kevin McCarthy and his radical, right-wing cronies. But party leaders have told me that they need to see us maintain our early fundraising momentum for them to support our campaign.
[**To show them that we have what it takes to win, our team has set an ambitious fundraising goal -- $25,000 by May 31.**](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=16bd5f84c6&e=15d98230e6)
In 2021, my town had its first Republican wave in 30 years. A year later, George Santos became the second Republican to represent my home district in the _**over 60 years**_ my family has lived here.
I know we can defeat the MAGA madness because my neighbors, Republican and Democrat alike, know George Santos and his fellow extremists have been an embarrassment to our community.
[**This will be the most high-profile, consequential congressional race in the country. We will only be able to win with your generous support. Before you start your weekend, can you chip in to help us build a winning campaign?**](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=46b7554796&e=15d98230e6)
**[Chip in $5»](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=7efd1b18b1&e=15d98230e6)**
With gratitude,
Zak
**[Donate](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=383bd833dd&e=15d98230e6)**
---
Paid for by Zak for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=9bec16b14b&e=15d98230e6&c=154f9cd054). Mail us: Zak for Congress, PO Box 220421, Great Neck, NY 11022.

clean_body: Yes, really, just one dollar. = | Team, Ohioans are ready to re-elect for-the-people champions like Senator Sherrod Brown and Representatives Greg Landsman, Marcy Kaptur, Emilia Sykes, Joyce Beatty and Shontel Brown. These are leaders who have proven they are laser-focused on the needs of working families and know what it means to represent Ohioans. But, with National Republicans and the Ohio GOP prepared to spend MILLIONS to buy these races, we can't afford to fall short on any of the fundraising goals we set from now until Election Day. And we're coming up on our next big fundraising deadline in just a couple of days. = | = Yes, really. We're asking for just $1 from our best grassroots supporters. And while it may not sound like a lot, if enough people step up and chip in before our deadline, every $1 donation adds up to ensure we reach our goal. Look, Republicans know that winning Ohio will be crucial for holding onto control of their razor-thin House majority and taking back the Senate. But with your support, Democrats have an opportunity to shape the future of Ohio. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you, Ohio Democratic Party The Ohio Democratic Party is working year-round to elect Democrats who will fight for working families all over the Buckeye State. body:

---
| | Don’t miss the **FREE world premiere livestream of The Great Awakening,** a new documentary from the creators of Plandemic! You’ll get a front-row seat to a red-carpet event, the film debut, interviews with your favorite truth-tellers, and more. I can't wait!

The livestream event is FREE and hosted by The HighWire. Spread the word with hashtag #TheGreatAwakeningFilm

It all happens on **Saturday, June 3rd, at 6pm CT** (UTC-5:00)!

Sign up today at [PlandemicSeries.com](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=8929372b3c&e=3a42edfdc4)

clean_body: BREAKING: Texas Senate Update | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Maybe it's his relentless attacks on our fundamental rights. Or his loyalty to Trump, even as he spewed lies, pushed conspiracy theories and cheered on the mob on Jan. 6. Or the fact that he abandoned our state and flew to Cancun during a deadly winter storm. There are a lot of reasons to vote against Ted Cruz — and he knows it. Polling showed more Texans disapprove of the job he's doing than support him, and CNN ranks him as one of the most vulnerable incumbent senators on the ballot next year. He's already calling this race a "firefight" and launching lie-filled attacks against Colin Allred. We're not scared of Ted Cruz, but we know failing to fight back against his lies could doom our campaign before it even gets off the ground. We have a real chance to defeat Cruz, but only if we have the money we need to compete. So we set a rapid-response goal to raise $250,000 by midnight, and we're urgently asking for your help, Peter: | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Colin Allred and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Thanks for giving what you can to help us defeat Ted Cruz! Together, we can hold him accountable, flip Texas blue and defend the Senate. Team Allred The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: =?utf-8?Q?Kelvin=20King?=
subject: Check out what we've been up to this spring!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lwfaa/check-out-what-weve-been-up-to-this-spring?e=cb396c52a2)
---
| |
---
| | Friend,

We want to start by wishing you and your family a happy and safe Memorial Day. As a veteran, Memorial Day means so much to me. The men and women I served with are some of the strongest and bravest people I know, and to the ones who paid the ultimate price for freedom, we can’t thank you enough. Freedom is not without sacrifice. Please remember to thank God on this Memorial Day for the brave soldiers who died for our country. These folks paid the ultimate sacrifice so that our families could live peacefully in freedom.
---
|
---
| What an exciting spring it's been for us at Let's Win for America Action! From our wildly successful Bourbon & Blazers event to traveling the state and spreading our message to breaking the woke narrative on social media, our team has had a blast these last few months, and we're just getting started.

We couldn't be prouder of what we achieved at Bourbon & Blazers on May 4th. The energy in the room was electric, with attendees and special guests from all over the country gathered to celebrate our efforts to expand the Republican party and promote the American Dream. Thanks to our attendees and supporters, we raised thousands to encourage growth in our party. We can't wait to see the success of this event next year. The sky is the limit.
---
|
---
|
---
| But the hustle hasn’t stopped there! Janelle and I have continued to travel in every direction, speaking to folks like you on the importance of reaching diverse communities in our next election cycle. Earlier this month, we were honored to participate in the swearing-in ceremony for the new Towns County Republican Party officers. And in the spirit of convention season, we immensely enjoyed attending the banquets for the 2nd and 9th Districts. We can’t thank these groups enough for having us!
---
|
---
|
---
| We have also been making waves on your televisions! This week, I was elated to join [Fox & Friends First](https://LWFAA.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e05b015cc2e6982fdaa22b89&id=4a9864808d&e=cb396c52a2) to weigh in on Russiagate and the recent Supreme Court ruling. [Janelle also appeared on the show](https://LWFAA.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e05b015cc2e6982fdaa22b89&id=3c5c471aa4&e=cb396c52a2) to discuss the recent ridiculous op-ed on Black Republicans. We always enjoy having fantastic conversations with the Fox & Friends First crew!
---
|
---
|
---
| Remember to follow us on all social platforms below and check out [our website](https://LWFAA.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e05b015cc2e6982fdaa22b89&id=6e85ea5661&e=cb396c52a2)! Our mission is to spread the message that the American Dream is alive and well, and we have tons of videos and posts showing evidence of that.

Facebook: [Let's Win for America Action](https://LWFAA.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e05b015cc2e6982fdaa22b89&id=eb33863dc4&e=cb396c52a2)
Twitter: [@LWFAA_](https://LWFAA.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e05b015cc2e6982fdaa22b89&id=b65cabfd0d&e=cb396c52a2)
Youtube: [Let's Win For America Action](https://LWFAA.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e05b015cc2e6982fdaa22b89&id=568757abab&e=cb396c52a2)
Instagram: [@lwfaa_](https://LWFAA.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e05b015cc2e6982fdaa22b89&id=754275eb08&e=cb396c52a2)

Thank you for your prayers, encouragement, and contributions to LWFAA. We are more than blessed to be able to travel this state and devote our time to creating tremendous growth in the GOP, but we wouldn't be able to without your support. If you'd like to join our mission to expand the Republican party for a successful election season in 2024, [you can send your support here](https://LWFAA.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e05b015cc2e6982fdaa22b89&id=24e773d194&e=cb396c52a2).

God Bless,

clean_body: | | | | | | | Friend, We want to start by wishing you and your family a happy and safe Memorial Day. As a veteran, Memorial Day means so much to me. The men and women I served with are some of the strongest and bravest people I know, and to the ones who paid the ultimate price for freedom, we can’t thank you enough. Freedom is not without sacrifice. Please remember to thank God on this Memorial Day for the brave soldiers who died for our country. These folks paid the ultimate sacrifice so that our families could live peacefully in freedom. | | What an exciting spring it's been for us at Let's Win for America Action! From our wildly successful Bourbon & Blazers event to traveling the state and spreading our message to breaking the woke narrative on social media, our team has had a blast these last few months, and we're just getting started. We couldn't be prouder of what we achieved at Bourbon & Blazers on May 4th. The energy in the room was electric, with attendees and special guests from all over the country gathered to celebrate our efforts to expand the Republican party and promote the American Dream. Thanks to our attendees and supporters, we raised thousands to encourage growth in our party. We can't wait to see the success of this event next year. The sky is the limit. | | | But the hustle hasn’t stopped there! Janelle and I have continued to travel in every direction, speaking to folks like you on the importance of reaching diverse communities in our next election cycle. Earlier this month, we were honored to participate in the swearing-in ceremony for the new Towns County Republican Party officers. And in the spirit of convention season, we immensely enjoyed attending the banquets for the 2nd and 9th Districts. We can’t thank these groups enough for having us! | | | We have also been making waves on your televisions! This week, I was elated to join to weigh in on Russiagate and the recent Supreme Court ruling. to discuss the recent ridiculous op-ed on Black Republicans. We always enjoy having fantastic conversations with the Fox & Friends First crew! | | | Remember to follow us on all social platforms below and check out ! Our mission is to spread the message that the American Dream is alive and well, and we have tons of videos and posts showing evidence of that. Facebook: Twitter: Youtube: Instagram: Thank you for your prayers, encouragement, and contributions to LWFAA. We are more than blessed to be able to travel this state and devote our time to creating tremendous growth in the GOP, but we wouldn't be able to without your support. Maybe it's his relentless attacks on our fundamental rights. Or his loyalty to Trump, even as he spewed lies, pushed conspiracy theories and cheered on the mob on Jan. 6. Or the fact that he abandoned our state and flew to Cancun during a deadly winter storm.

**There are a lot of reasons to vote against Ted Cruz – _and he knows it._**

Polling showed more Texans _disapprove_ of the job he's doing than support him, and CNN ranks him as one of the most vulnerable incumbent senators on the ballot next year. He's already calling this race a "firefight" and launching lie-filled attacks against Colin Allred.

We're not scared of Ted Cruz, but we know failing to fight back against his lies could doom our campaign before it even gets off the ground. We have a real chance to defeat Cruz, but only if we have the money we need to compete. So we set a rapid-response goal to raise $250,000 by midnight, and we're urgently asking for your help, Peter:

clean_body: BREAKING: Texas Senate Update | BREAKING: Ted Cruz worried 2024 race will be a "firefight" = Maybe it's his relentless attacks on our fundamental rights. Or his loyalty to Trump, even as he spewed lies, pushed conspiracy theories and cheered on the mob on Jan. 6. Or the fact that he abandoned our state and flew to Cancun during a deadly winter storm. There are a lot of reasons to vote against Ted Cruz – and he knows it. Polling showed more Texans disapprove of the job he's doing than support him, and CNN ranks him as one of the most vulnerable incumbent senators on the ballot next year. He's already calling this race a "firefight" and launching lie-filled attacks against Colin Allred. We're not scared of Ted Cruz, but we know failing to fight back against his lies could doom our campaign before it even gets off the ground. We have a real chance to defeat Cruz, but only if we have the money we need to compete. name: Sen. Cory Booker
subject: We need to support Joe and Kamala with everything we have
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I’m going to do everything in my power to reelect Joe and Kamala on November 5, 2024. Are you with me? | | |
---
Peter, Throughout my life and my career, I’ve had one guiding principle: _Love._ There’s no such thing as too much love -- it’s what keeps folks safe, gives us hope in dark moments, and inspires us to keep building the America we know is possible. I’ve made it my mission -- and I hope you’ll make it yours too, Peter -- to turn that care and concern into real action. That action extends beyond my service in the U.S. Senate -- it motivates me every day to help elect more leaders who put the interests of the American people before their own. Leaders like Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. **It’s why I was proud to join the Biden-Harris campaign’s National Advisory Board earlier this month, and why I’m going to do everything in my power to reelect Joe and Kamala in 2024. But I can’t do it alone, so I’m asking:** **[Will you join me in supporting Joe and Kamala’s campaign by becoming a Founding Donor today?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZolpNtnxhhD-1AkF4SxfyYkjCYJCv2caeuzF8aIRa565VY4L159NKQNd3CXIer3KJ64Tte1dBDBIJmbwsTJYd5jfB4sSmLZa05J5CH6xpMnFMhkqMjKOo0BM0KRXA9eg5W69HpVW8TQeY5rQUWv7A2zUhODMyEfykF4Lb1JX430Gn-vNkAsmZ_v8ijAY9scQY7dvZ_3Km-_blXwao0UFEIue5WYewrkBazFrVhBHsvzsmT66AHIUnzdf8VptGdSFpXvg7W8ziatn0h56GGadCSpbEfznCKFNsoNgDM4j1S9mX2Aq2GGpfrr8WjoL1rEhpVQX4B5RPnUvU2w_8N-yA-Fa2aB3HEoIyaCvy8v7JMKCBuvss1eudDI7ilmFsGtY5mq59tSsT-IssYMqK042Dbcgd3GYBKoKTPxvZZR2j0KNPHqMH1xyET626vl9pqwBC7y-yIu5Hzsbn7yaJ8bg1sw/3wi/-0bl8BrTRfC3hj3Nyf_HPw/h0/oc8TR6i92XxMj7MeHUHhEiBeB8oM9dOb5EwndMg1b1w)**

clean_body: I’m going to do everything in my power to reelect Joe and Kamala on November 5, 2024. Are you with me? | | | Peter, Throughout my life and my career, I’ve had one guiding principle: Love. There’s no such thing as too much love -- it’s what keeps folks safe, gives us hope in dark moments, and inspires us to keep building the America we know is possible. I’ve made it my mission -- and I hope you’ll make it yours too, Peter -- to turn that care and concern into real action. That action extends beyond my service in the U.S. Senate -- it motivates me every day to help elect more leaders who put the interests of the American people before their own. Leaders like Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. It’s why I was proud to join the Biden-Harris campaign’s National Advisory Board earlier this month, and why I’m going to do everything in my power to reelect Joe and Kamala in 2024. But I can’t do it alone, so I’m asking: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Joe and Kamala lead with compassion and empathy -- and, yes, love too. They recognize that we’re all better off when we fight for one another, when we work together to create a country we can all be proud of. Whether it’s passing the Inflation Reduction Act to lower costs for working families or helping create more than 12 million jobs, they’re working every day to build, as the late Congresswoman Barbara Jordan once said, “an America as good as its promise.” But it'll take all of us coming together to finish the job. So I’m asking: Thanks for being a part of this team. With love and gratitude, Cory Cory Booker U.S. Senator, New Jersey
